listings.description:
Light-filled apartment with high ceilings in a safe and very calm area 15-20 minutes away from downtown Stockholm with local transportation, 3 minutes away from a nature reserve and 10 minutes away from swimming. 

Our kitchen has all that you will need apart from a fancy coffee/espresso machine.

The beds are comfy, but please note that the biggest one is only 140 cm wide and the other two 120 cm.

The bathroom is very basic and quite outdated but has a nice tub and a washer and drier. 

The li
listings.area_description:
Safe and very calm residential area close to downtown Stockholm. 

We have a large green park just outside our windows. Our guests appreciate the combination of the proximity to downtown Stockholm, but also running into deer and hares in the park just outside, picking blueberries in the nature reserve and swimming at Tanto beach or one of the jetties nearby.

Basic swing sets for kids and a basket ball hoop just outside the door.

Great jogging loop of 6.6 or 9 km along the water and several out

We used to have a cat (more than five years ago), so if you are extremely allergic to cats, this home is probably unsuitable for you. Sorry! :(

It´s quiet, it´s close to shopping, it´s close to public transport, it´s close to a great park with the crownprincess house and different museums.

7 nights minimum.

ABBA, Wasa, the archipelago and everything a capital can offer

The big Haga-park where you can walk, bike, swim, eat and perhaps get a glimpse of the Crown Princess and her family.

listings.title: Spacious apartment in central location
listings.description:
We are looking for one long or several longer or shorter exchanges in Paris and/or Normandy or other interesting places not too far from Paris from September 2024 to June 2025. Open for suggestions regarding time and place.

We live in a building from around 1880. It is a very charming house with a very nice and private back yard with barbecue. The flat is spacious with a large social part, three nice bedrooms two newly renovated bathrooms and a newly renovated kitchen. 
We live on a quiet stree
listings.area_description:
Our home is situated in the older parts of Södermalm, in the area of Mariatorget.  Once a working-class neighbourhood, it’s now home to hoards of independent shops, cafés, bars and cashed-up hipsters. With mostly beautiful 17th-to early 20th century architecture and spectacular city views. The ideal place to discover Stockholm from.
At the end of our street you find Monteliusvägen, Stockholms most beautiful view, a 500-meter long (quarter mile) walking path with a magnificent view of Lake Mälare
listings.other_notes:
High speed Internet (500-1000 Mb/s) 
Bedroom 1: Master bedroom with double bed 210 cm wide.
Bedroom 2: small double bed 140 cm wide. Possible to add an extra bed (80 cm wide folding bed).
Bedroom 3: 80 cm bed that can be pulled out into a 160 cm wide double bed.
Open plan between kitchen, diningroom

details.full_description:
We are looking for one long or several longer or shorter exchanges in Paris and/or Normandy or other interesting places not too far from Paris from September 2024 to June 2025. Open for suggestions regarding time and place.

We live in a building from around 1880. It is a very charming house with a very nice and private back yard with barbecue. The flat is spacious with a large social part, three nice bedrooms two newly renovated bathrooms and a newly renovated kitchen.

details.full_area_description:
Our home is situated in the older parts of Södermalm, in the area of Mariatorget.  Once a working-class neighbourhood, it’s now home to hoards of independent shops, cafés, bars and cashed-up hipsters. With mostly beautiful 17th-to early 20th century architecture and spectacular city views. The ideal place to discover Stockholm from.
At the end of our street you find Monteliusvägen, Stockholms most beautiful view, a 500-meter long (quarter mile) walking path with a magnificent view of Lake Mälaren, City Hall, and Riddarholmen, especially at sunrise and sunset. The path is lined with charming houses on one side and a beautiful view on the other.
https://www.visitstockholm.com/guides/see-the-sights-of-sodermalm/

High speed Internet (500-1000 Mb/s)

Bedroom 3: 80 cm bed that can be pulled out into a 160 cm wide double bed.
Open plan between kitchen, diningroom and livingroom with tiled stove.
Balcony with room for four people to sit comfortably.

listings.title: Karin's house
listings.description:
PLEASE DONT MESSAGE UNLESS WE HAVE VACANT DATES/YOU HAVE A HOME IN CENTRAL LONDON OR LA THAT YOU WANT TO EXCHANGE. 

Our home is in the heart of Södermalm, just by the lovely square/park Nytorget. We have all of our favourite bars, restaurants, shops and playgrounds at our door step. We have two kids, born 2020 and 2022, and so our place is very kids friendly with all the toys, high chairs, changing mats, cots, etc needed! 
We renovated the apartment completely in Autumn 2022. There is an open
listings.area_description:
From our home, you can easily access all the tourist attractions in Stockholm , either by foot (approx 30 min walk) or bus or subway. It’s also easy to walk down towards the water where you can catch a boat to the tourist attractions. 
There are heaps of restaurants, bars, cafes, shops and great parks in our area.

details.full_description:
PLEASE DONT MESSAGE UNLESS WE HAVE VACANT DATES/YOU HAVE A HOME IN CENTRAL LONDON OR LA THAT YOU WANT TO EXCHANGE. 

Our home is in the heart of Södermalm, just by the lovely square/park Nytorget. We have all of our favourite bars, restaurants, shops and playgrounds at our door step. We have two kids, born 2020 and 2022, and so our place is very kids friendly with all the toys, high chairs, changing mats, cots, etc needed! 
We renovated the apartment completely in Autumn 2022. There is an open plan kitchen /living room, three spacious to decent sized bedrooms, one bathroom, one toilet and one balcony. 
Our apartment is on the third floor (there is a larger lift that fits our double pram!), with a balcony overlooking a quiet street. We live in an amazing building with a fantastic communal courtyard where there are swings, a slide, lots of space to ride scooters (which we have!) and a grill with seating. 
We cycle to many places, and we have two bikes with kids seats that we can lend you.

Please don’t message regarding dates that are not marked as available (unless you have a home in London to exchange, as we often want to go to London to see family).
details.full_area_description:
From our home, you can easily access all the tourist attractions in Stockholm , either by foot (approx 30 min walk) or bus or subway. It’s also easy to walk down towards the water where you can catch a boat to the tourist attractions. 
There are heaps of restaurants, bars, cafes, shops and great parks in our area.

listings.title: Cozy studio close to central Stockholm
listings.description:
Welcome to my cozy and 20m² studio apartment, perfectly located in the heart of Kungsholmen, just steps away from Fridhemsplan and main attractions in the city center of Stockholm. Tucked away in a calm street, this small but thoughtfully designed space is a peaceful retreat in a vibrant part of Stockholm.

The apartment is a building from the beginning of last century that comes with all the comforts of a contemporary home, soundproof walls, and double-glazed windows to ensure a quiet and comfo
listings.area_description:
Kungsholmen is one of Stockholm’s most livable and beautiful districts, combining the convenience of central city life with the calm of nearby nature. The apartment is just a few minutes’ walk from Fridhemsplan, a major hub with metro connections on both the green and blue lines, making it easy to get anywhere in the city.

The area offers a fantastic mix of local shops, trendy cafés, bakeries, and excellent restaurants. A short walk takes you to Rålambshovsparken and the waterfront promenade al
listings.other_notes:
I am not able to receive pets.
Please send your request as early as possible so I can plan ahead.

listings.title: Josefin's apartment
listings.description:
The apartment has a lovely living room with lots of windows and a big comfy sofa. There is a huge and wonderful bed in the master bedroom and two bedrooms for the kids (with lots of toys!). The big bathroom has a bath tube. During summer, there is balcony to hang out at.

The apartment has the perfect location in the bustling area of Hornstull at Södermalm. Although it is very close to restaurants and shopping, it is equally close to a big park with both possibilites to take a swim and play at a
listings.area_description: Södermalm is the best of the central Stockholm areas in our opinion. It has everything and more. The particular area of Hornstull (where our apartment is at) is relaxed, hip and bustling.

listings.title: A great apartment centrally located in a charming part of Stockholm
listings.description: You will enjoy the coziness of our home, the well equipped apartment, the beautiful backyard where you can enjoy meals as well as
listings.area_description: You will  love the surrounding neighborhood with stores, restaurants and parks. You will also like the great communications with busses and metro just around the corner.

listings.title: Urban + Nature Stockholm
listings.description:
Hello and welcome!
My name is Björn, and I live in Stockholm, Sweden. I’m a graphic designer who enjoys nature, long walks, swimming, and spending time with my dog, Roxy – a small and very friendly companion. 
I live in a bright and spacious 3-room apartment in Stockholm. I can offer:
A private bedroom with a double bed and shared spaces, together with my Italian flatmate, who is very easy-going, friendly and respectful.
Stockholm is a beautiful city with both vibrant culture and amazing nature
listings.area_description:
There is some really nice “attractions" in Gröndal. Here is a list of them in my opinion.
1. Trekanten beach, just outside the house
2. Vinterviken Garden, with great ecological restaurant/café and wonderful flowers.
3. Winterviken Café, Alfred Nobels (the man who invented the Nobel price) old dynamite factory that been transformed to a top class restaurant/café with decent prices.
4. Gröndal, rocky beach that overlooking Stockholm. Great place for a picknick or just sit and read a book and enjo
listings.other_notes:
All doors are accessible by door codes.
No smoking
Dogs are allowed (but put linen on the sofa for protection)

listings.title: The bright and comfy flat on the 7th floor - Anna & Patrik’s City Home
listings.description:
Very feel-at-home on the 7th floor with a modern touch, completely renovated 2022.  Great floor plan, fully equipped, vintage furniture, art on the walls and large windows making a wow-effect. Everybody feels at home here!

A nice balcony with a stunning view over one of Stockholms most known and loved landmarks - the DN-building. Sun shines on the balcony from lunch to  evening during summertime.
listings.area_description: Perfect location on Kungsholmen, lots of restaurants, cafes, shopping and food stores. Kungsholmen is a very popular and central part of Stockholm, and one of the 14 islands that makes Stockholm the beautiful city it is with water everywhere. The Rålambshov Park and Lake Mälaren is very close, literally 2-3 mins. City Hall a 20 minute walk along the waterfront, and communications via subway and buses are great at Fridhemsplan, 3 mins walk including direct bus to Arlanda, our airport.
listings.other_notes:
Washing capabilities in the shared laundry room in the building.

The second bedroom has a 160cm loft bed.
The double put-up bed is in the living room, very good sleeping quality.

Furthermore, Hornstull has lots of supermarkets and restaurants, whether you want to takeaway or to eat out, there is something for all tastes and occasions.

listings.title: The modern flat

Our apartment is open and light in the middle of Stockholm city. It’s a two bedroom apartment with one bathroom. The bathroom has washing machine and dryer. 

It’s a modern building with a wide elevator and secured room to keep strollers. Ground floor offers a laundry room with two washing machines, one dryer and a drying cabinet.

It’s very close to restaurants, cafés, bars, parking garage and shopping.
There are outdoor gyms and outdoor swimming pools by walking distance.

Our garden has a playground, BBQ area, water fountain and sprinklers for playing in. We also include a men’s adult

listings.title: Stockholm: private room with shared bathroom
listings.description:
This is a generously sized, bright room with a high ceiling in our primary home, an apartment in a safe and very calm area 15-20 minutes away from downtown Stockholm with local transportation, 3 minutes away from a nature reserve and 10 minutes away from swimming. 

As a guest, you must share the bathroom, kitchen and living room with me (there will be no kids here while you are present). I will give you some great Stockholm tips for your exploration of the city, I promise. 

Our kitchen has all
listings.area_description:
Safe and very calm residential area close to downtown Stockholm. 

We have a large green park just outside our windows. Our guests appreciate the combination of the proximity to downtown Stockholm, but also running into roe deer and hares in the park just outside, picking blueberries in the nature reserve and swimming at Tanto beach or one of the jetties.

Great jogging along the water and several outdoor, public gyms are closeby.
listings.other_notes:
Our home is 100% smoke free. You CANNOT smoke inside. However, there is a small garden (and a huge park) where you can smoke.

This is our home, our safe haven. Please treat it as you would your own.

details.full_description:
We live in a bright apartment from the beginning of the century. It’s bright, spacious and cozy. We who live here are creative people, engaged in culture, who love to welcome friends and family to our home. The apartment is well equipped with everything you need and has a lot of soul.

We live in the middle of Södermalm, in a lively neighborhood, but since only one room has windows directed towards the street and the apt is equipped with 3 glass-windows, it’s quiet and calm inside. Nearby you can find restaurants, cafés, shops, boutiques, foodstores, good playgrounds for children, green areas and water, a really good bath house with swimming pools and saunas, bars, bookshops… We live in a friendly area where you can find nightlife as well as really good playgrounds for kids and family activities.

We have connections to everywhere right outside out door, subway and buses. Distance to the city centre and Central station is 7 minutes with the subway, 30 min walking. It’s possible to rent bikes right around the corner (recommended way of getting around in the city!).
details.full_area_description: We live in the middle of Södermalm. Nearby are bars, restaurants, playgrounds, grocery stores, an indoor swimming pool with an aqua park, shops, public transport, parks and green areas.

listings.title: Beautiful apartment close to nature and downtown Stockholm
listings.description:
Beautiful top floor apartment with large living/dining room, excellent kitchen and a small but cozy bedroom with a double bed. Perfect for a couple or solo traveler. 

There is a very simple small foldable guestbed as well, see the last picture.
listings.area_description: Beautiful and quiet neighboorhod, close to the national park in Norra djurgården but also really close to downtown Stochkolm.

listings.title: A gem downtown Stockholm *available dates for reciprocal in mid July, spain greece italy Nice
listings.description: A nice 3bd/2ba in downtown Stockholm in a newly built area. The apt is fresh and comes with everything you need. Kid friendly as we have three kids on our own so plenty of toys to play with here. We can host 7 or 8 people. Fully stocked kitchen big screen TVs in every room and the living room has digital tv with plenty of channels. Playstation console and board games to keep you occupied at night or on a rainy day.
listings.area_description: My home is in the heart of the city. You can more or less walk everywhere. We have nice parks and just a short walk down to the water to go swimming or dine or both. The subway station is around the corner and takes you to the central station in no more than 5 minutes. Stockholm is super bike friendly and we have a couple of bikes you can use. A major grocery store just around the other corner of the building for easy grocery shopping. You have all Stockholm has to offer within close proximity s

listings.title: Modern 4-room lake view apartment at Sodermalm
listings.description:
Our home has room comfortably for 5 people, but there is room for one or two persons extra. There is one kingsize bed in the master bedroom, one king size sofa bed in the second bedroom and a bunk bed for children in the third bedroom. The kitchen has plenty of space and everything you need. The bathroom is tiled and very fresh and there is also a smaller guest bathroom. The balcony is facing lake Mälaren and has a great panoramic view.

The house is centrally located at Sodermalm, in close walk
listings.area_description: Less than five minutes walk (just down the stairs) to be able to swim in lake Mälaren. In the neighbourhood there are cafés, restaurants, theater saloons, parks for recreation and workout. Calm neighborhood but still walking distance to the city center and to all the central tourist sites.

listings.title: Helena's penthouse with sunny terrace
listings.description:
Welcome to our cool and cozy penthouse located in the vibrant Södermalm district, right by Mariatorget. With modern décor and charming rooftop windows, our apartment bathes in natural light and offers a warm, homely atmosphere.

Enjoy morning coffee or evening wine on our sunny terrace while soaking in views of Stockholm’s iconic black tin rooftops and chimneys. The apartment features a comfortable double bedroom and a spacious open-plan kitchen and living area—perfect for relaxing after a day o
listings.area_description:
Our neighborhood is rich with character and convenience, filled with hip cafés, buzzing bars, and cozy restaurants. Everything you need—from grocery stores to bakeries—is just around the corner. It is also a neighborhood filled with parks and plenty of green spaces.

listings.other_notes: We are retired and thus are flexible in our planning. We believe our perfect exchange is around a month long, and it goes to an interesting place in the world where we can stay long enough to start to "feel as locals". The apartment is situated in the popular area Kungsholmen (one of many islands in Stockholm city) on the top floors of a house from 1913. 
First floor: Here you'll find our kitchen and li

It offers walking distance to popular tourist sites as Stockholm City hall (15 min walk) and the Royal castle. Still in the centre of Stockholm, we live close to lake Mälaren with a sand beach (10 min walk) and parks with playgrounds for children nearby as well as shopping and many restaurants. Perfect location in central Stockholm
Nice surroundings with cosy restaurants

details.place: City of Ciutadella de Menorca, Spain

details.full_description:
The city of Stockholm is the Capital of Sweden and a wonderful city all year. We live in a central area (Kungsholmen) near both city center, tourist attractions and the sea and parks. Our home is a wonderful and light 4,5 room apartment in two stories (in total 100 m2). We have a small balcony with evening sun. The apartment is situated in the popular area Kungsholmen (one of many islands in Stockholm city) on the top floors of a house from 1913. 
First floor: Here you'll find our kitchen and living room with balcony, fireplace and TV. Here is also a guest room/library with a bed sofa (futon bed style) and a bedroom with one big bed (120 cm). On this floor we have a bathroom with shower. 
Second floor: Here is our master bedroom with a double bed and a second bedroom also with a double bed. On this floor we have a large bathroom with bathtub and shower. 
There is a WIFI spot at home.
details.full_area_description:
Stockholm is a city by the sea. Our home is on the island Kungsholmen in the very center of Stockholm. It offers walking distance to popular tourist sites as Stockholm City hall (15 min walk) and the Royal castle. Still in the centre of Stockholm, we live close to lake Mälaren with a sand beach (10 min walk) and parks with playgrounds for children nearby as well as shopping and many restaurants. The Central Station is only two stops away with the metro (4 min with the blue line) or 8 minutes by bus.

We are experienced exchangers and have done several exchanges over the last 15 years.

details.full_area_description:
When you have travelled it is so nice to know that you only have a two minute walk back home from the Central Station and Arlanda Express. When you arrive at our home you are located approximately 200 meters from Sergels Torg, that is the most central place in Stockholm. We live on a quiet, central street in a mid 19th century building. This central part of Stockholm is called The Klara Quarters.

We enjoy all restaurants and cafés and the fact that we can buy groceries and medicines (should we need it) 24 hours a day. Just 100 meters from our door you'll for example find Swedens best restaurant, Franzéns (nr 21 in the world) and Vetekatten, Stockholms best "fika". 

It is great to have all subway and train lines just around the corner. It makes it so easy to take a day trip to other parts of beautiful Stockholm or to nearby small towns. 

We also love the fact that we can escape to our country home in the archipelago in just one hour from our apartment. Our country home is a red house with an ocean wiew. Here we can go kayaking, walk in the forest or just relax on the veranda.
details.full_other:
We can make simultaneous and non-simultaneous exchanges and you can combine your stay with some vacation time in our Country Home in the archipelago. 

We are a couple that love to travel! We have made 18 successful exchanges through this site and through Intervac and love this way of traveling. Our children are  all grown up, 26 and 23 years old, and rarely travels with us anymore. 
 
We are always interested in nice weekend getaways!

details.full_area_description:
Historic Charm: Södermalm is filled with well-preserved buildings dating back to the 18th and 19th centuries, offering a glimpse into Stockholm's rich history. The cobblestone streets, colorful facades, and charming squares create a picturesque atmosphere.
Artistic Vibes: Known as Stockholm's bohemian and creative hub, Södermalm is home to numerous art galleries, independent boutiques, and vintage stores. Tourists often enjoy exploring the area's unique shops and vibrant street art scene.
Scenic Views: The district's elevated terrain provides stunning panoramic views of Stockholm's skyline and the surrounding islands. 
Café Culture: Södermalm boasts a lively café culture, with countless cozy coffee shops and bakeries scattered throughout the area. Tourists can relax with a cup of Swedish coffee and indulge in delicious pastries while soaking in the local atmosphere.
Eclectic Dining Scene: From traditional Swedish cuisine to international fare, Södermalm offers a diverse range of dining options to suit every palate and budget. Tourists can sample everything from trendy restaurants to casual eateries serving global cuisines.
Green Spaces: Despite being a bustling urban district, Södermalm features several parks and green spaces where tourists can unwind and enjoy nature. Tantolunden Park and Vitabergsparken are popular spots for picnics, leisurely strolls, and outdoor activities.
Nightlife: Södermalm comes alive after dark, offering a vibrant nightlife scene with hip bars, clubs, and live music venues. Tourists can experience the district's buzzing energy by exploring its eclectic array of bars and entertainment options.
The underground will take you to city centre in 5 minutes, by foot you reach the waterfront in 10 minutes, where you can take a walk or go for swim. There are several playgrounds and a large outdoor pool nearby.

details.full_description: Clean and light 3-bedroom apartment with high ceilings and wooden floors.  Master bedroom with king size bed and two additional bedrooms. In one of the additional bedrooms is a trundle bed that can accomodate two people on different levels; the other one is a small double size mattress, 200x120 cm. Bathroom with rainfall shower, washer and dryer.  Combined kitchen and living room with spacious dining area and cosy TV space. Fully equipped kitchen with microwave and dish washer. 46-inches wall-mounted flatscreen SONY TV, Apple TV with Netflix and PS5. Wireless internet. Communal backyard with grill facilities, that can be reached directly from one of the bedrooms.
details.full_area_description:
Our apartment is located in Stockholm's trendiest neighbourhood Södermalm, with tons of design shops, vintage boutiques, cafés, restaurants and bars – it was actually named on of the 15 trendiest neighbourhoods in the world according to a 2014 issue of Vogue. Still it's only a 15 minute walk to the historic Old Town, and a 10-minute walk from the leafy waterfront where you can take a swim in Stockholm's glistening water, or jump in one of the many outdoor swimming pools at Eriksdalsbadet (including a children's pool).

For families with kids, Södermalm has a lot to offer. From our apartment it's a 4 minute walk to the large playground Rosenlundsparken, a 5 minute walk to the gorgeous 1900th century theme playground Bryggartäppan and a 10 minute walk to the fantastic Stora Blecktornsparken, hosting a large playground and farm animals like pigs, rabbits, guinea pigs, sheep and goats. 

15 minute walk from our apartment, you can take a ferry to the green island of Djurgården with many of Stockholm's most popular children's attractions within walking distance from one another. Here you'll find the fairytale world of Junibacken, The Viking Museum, The Vasa Museum, and Skansen – a popular open-air museum, complete with historical buildings, Nordic animals, a children's zoo, and an aquarium. Stockholm's amusement park Gröna Lund is located beautifully along the water and a great place to visit for a memorable day.  Stockholm is overall a very a child-friendly city. Kids up to 12 go for free in the subway and on buses in the company of parents, and parents with a stroller ride for free on buses. 

- Buzzy restaurants: Bleck, Punk Royal, NOOK, Pat's Place, Café Nizza
- Cool bars: Mikeller's, Riche Fenix, Indigo, Babylon, Snövit
- Cozy cafés: Il Caffé, Beck
- Retail therapy: Grandpa, Acne, L:a bruket
- Bit of culture: Fotografiska museum
- Walks in the park: Nytorget, Rosenlundsparken, Stora Blecktonsparken, Lilla Bläcktornsparken
- Spot of exercise: Large outdoor swimming pool 10 minute walk from house
- Day tripping: Lots of beautiful islands in the Stockholm archipelago that can be reached by car or boat over a day, Drottningholms castle, hiking in Tyresta National Park.

details.full_area_description: Lägenheten är omgiven av natur och vatten, trots att den ligger mitt i Stockholm. Det tar bara minuter att promenera över bron och tillgång till storstadspuls. Vi har en liten trädgård där du kan grilla och njuta av utsikt över vattnet och staden. Huset är byggt 1835 och totalrenoverat varsamt för 7 år sedan.
details.full_other: Jag hinner tyvärr inte besvara alla förfrågningar, jag får ca 10 per vecka. Jag vill helst byta direkt med någon, och inte få guest points. Söker nu boende i Frankrike i juli 2026, Paris, Atlantkusten samt runt Lyon.

listings.title: City center in minutes – Subway every 5 mins
listings.description:
Welcome to our bright and spacious apartment, designed with comfort and creativity in mind! With room for up to eight people, it’s the perfect retreat for families or groups looking to unwind after a day of adventure.

Our modern living space is equipped with all the latest technology, including a fully stocked kitchen featuring state-of-the-art utensils for those who love to cook. For entertainment, you’ll find a karaoke machine ready for some fun-filled sing-alongs and a PlayStation for gaming
listings.area_description:
Our neighborhood is a hidden gem, perfect for those who love nature and community! With a charming old forest right in our backyard, you can enjoy peaceful walks or adventurous explorations. Just a short stroll away is the local boat club, where you can rent kayaks for a day on the water or take a refreshing dip at our small beach.

For animal lovers, you can visit small ponies, horses, goats, and even chickens that roam freely at 4h farm close by. It’s a great way to connect with nature and exp
listings.other_notes:
For those driving, there are parking spaces in the garage with normal parking fees. You’ll find a couple of stores and a delightful bakery within walking distance, perfect for grabbing essentials or treats.

For shopping enthusiasts, Solna Centrum and the Mall of Scandinavia are just a 10-15 minute

listings.title: Charming flat in Sofo
listings.description: My traditional turn of the century flat has been undergoing renovations and is now a charming home with big volumes and afternoon sun in the summer months.
listings.area_description: The flat is located in the vibrant area of Sofo, filled with restaurants, cafés and terraces. Ideally close to the metro on the dynamic götgatan and the cosy vitabergsparken. The old town is only two metro stops away and a 10 minutes cycle ride.
listings.other_notes: No smoking or parties.

listings.title: Bright 3,5-duplex apartment in the heart of Stockholm by the canal
listings.description: Bright duplex apt with a beautiful terrace, large windows overlooking the canal & a modern open-plain kitchen
listings.area_description: Located in a quiet residential neighborhood in Södermalm with a 10-minute subway ride to city center. Great cafés, restaurants and shops just a 10 min walk away at Södermalm & beautiful walking and jogging trail right outside your window.

listings.title: Private bedroom in modern, bright, and well equipped apartment with balcony in Stockholm
listings.description:
Welcome to a nice private bedroom in our three bedroom apartment on the island Kungsholmen in the inner part of Stockholm. 

The apartment is very bright, quiet and modern and is part of a pleasant small condo built in 2003. It’s situated just a few hundred meters from Lake Mälaren and has a nice sea view from the balcony which is optionally glassed-in on windy or chilly days, or completely open when the weather is warm and nice.  Stockholm City is by one half-hour nice walk along the lake from
listings.area_description:
The apartment is situated a few hundred meters from Lake Mälaren in a very quiet and green neighborhood. Stockholm City is by one half-hour nice walk along the lake from the property.  

Walking the other direction immediately leads to a nature trail with rocks next to the lake, suited for sun bathing, picnics and a swim in the lake on warm days.  

There’s also a place for renting canoes by the hour.  

Right outside the front door there’s a bus stop for bus number one which brings you to the c
listings.other_notes: The apartment is strictly smoke-free, also on the balcony. Please also note that smoking is not allowed in public spaces in Sweden. This goes for all indoor spaces and also many outdoor spaces such as close to public transportation, at bus stops, on restaurant terraces, at playgrounds, in entrance a

listings.title: Apartment in green area
listings.description:
The home was renovated in 2023.

BEDROOMS
There are three bedrooms.
Bedroom 1 has a super king size bed (180x200).
Bedroom 2 has a small king sized bed (140x200).
Bedroom 3 has a single bed (90x200).
We also have an armchair that is possible to fold out as a bed (74x193).

It's also possible to create some additional sleeping places.
The couch in the living room is possible to sleep on.
An air mattress and/or a foldable bed can also be installed.

We have two bathrooms - one with toilet and show
listings.area_description:
The home is perfectly located.
With walking distance you can reach Scandinavia's largest shopping mall (Mall of Scandinavia). Next to the mall is one of the biggest arenas where Swedish football national team plays and where all the big concerts happen.
There are a lot of green areas where you can do sports, swim or just relax on the cliffs by the water.
If you are coming with kids there's a public outdoor pool and also a small sand beach with docks.
You can even walk to the old town, city hall
listings.other_notes:
From Stockholm you can travel to nearby cities. Stockholm is also perfectly located for you to take a ferry cruise to some of the Baltic cities like Helsinki, Tallinn and Riga.

Before your arrival I will send you additional information and suggestions of what you can do. You will of course also rec

listings.title: Lake view in central Stockholm ;)
listings.description:
Hey:) I have been getting so many requests that it has been a challenge to respond everyone in a timely manner. I will try to see how I can solve the volume of messages. In the meantime, please bear with my responses. 

My apartment is located in central Stockholm and sports a magnificent view of a lake and a park.  My friends say I have one of Stockholm's best views ;) 

The apartment is ideal for one person or a couple. Fully stocked kitchen - great for anyone who loves cooking. Hi-fi audio se
listings.area_description:
The apartment is in Hornstull, Södermalm - a vibrant neighborhood in Stockholm.  Restaurants, bars, and nature all at the doorstep. 

If you visit during summer months, there are a plenty of swimming spots around.  

2-minute walk to metro station Hornstull and a few stations to the old town (Gamla Stan).  A direct bus from the main airport stops near the house.
listings.other_notes:
The house is located next to the bridge/ road and it can be noisy from the traffic in summer months when the window is open. The bedroom, however, is isolated and I find it calm for sleeping.

The bedroom and the living room are separated by a thin wood wall, which may not allow enough privacy if gu

listings.title: Spacious 3br apartment in Södermalm
listings.description:
Our apartment is a bright and comfortable family home where we live our everyday life. It has a living room, a modern fully equipped kitchen, three bedrooms, one bathroom, a separate WC, and Wi-Fi.

The master bedroom has a 180 cm king-size bed. The second bedroom has a 120 cm bed, and the third bedroom has a bed that can be used as an 80 cm single or opened into a 160 cm double.

There is a washing machine in the bathroom, although we rarely use it, as the building also has a shared laundry roo
listings.area_description:
The apartment is located in Södermalm, close to Hornstull, a lively yet family-friendly area of Stockholm. Cafés, bakeries, grocery stores, playgrounds, and public transport are all within easy walking distance.

Tantolunden Park is just nearby and offers green spaces, walking paths, summer activities, and popular swimming spots enjoyed by locals during the warmer months. Drakenpark, a fun and well-loved playground for children, is only a few minutes’ walk away. The area is perfect for families

listings.title: Centrally located modern apartment
listings.description: Our home is a well-organized fresh apartment with views on 2 sides. It is based on the 4th floor. There is a park in front of it with a football field (AG), basketball court and many other fun things to do for kids.
listings.area_description:
It is located in the popular Birkastan (area in Vasastaden/Vasastan). 
Great spots nearby:
- Rörstrandsgatan (with many restaurants and bars)
- Vasaparken (great city park where you can ice skate during the winter)
- Hagaparken (great park)
- Karlbergsparken (great park for training)
- Abba's studio is in our street where they recorded their greatest hits
- St Eriksplan (subway)
- Odenplan (train station)
- City centre (just 10 min away by bike, 5 min away by car or 5 min away by subway - 3 stop
listings.other_notes: Minimum of 3 nights for periods with a short availability and 7 nights for periods with a long availability.

listings.title: Lovisa's house
listings.description:
NB - For summer 2026, we already finalized an Guest Point exchange.

Our two-bedroom apartment offers a comfortable and practical living space with an open-plan kitchen and living area. It also features a private terrace, perfect to unwind after a day out and about.
listings.area_description: Located on a quiet pedestrian street in Upper Östermalm, the apartment is surrounded by historic buildings from the late 1800s, green spaces, and a variety of cafés and restaurants. The neighborhood is peaceful and residential, yet just a short walk from Stockholm’s city center, where you’ll find shopping, attractions, and nightlife. The subway and buses are right outside the door if you want to get out and explore Stockholm even further.

Hammarby Sjöstad is a modern and sustainable waterfront district in southern Stockholm. Known for its innovative urban planning, green architecture, and scenic canals, it offers a vibrant mix of residential areas, restaurants, parks, and walking paths. The neighborhood has excellent public transport connections and is popular with families, professionals, and visitors who enjoy a relaxed yet urban lifest

Our home is on the 7th floor with a magnificant view over the water front of Södermalm in the innercity of Stockholm. Private and calm with a large balcony facing East/south. One bedroom has a 160 cm bed and the other bedroom a 140 cm bed. There is also an extra mattress if you want a separate bed next to the 140 cm bed.
There’s a shared garden with a sm

It’s ten minutes by foot to a big public swimmingpool (Eriksdalsbadet) and 15 minutes to small bridges from where you can jump into Mälaren.

listings.title: 2-flat bedroom in the heart of Stockholm close to Djurgården
listings.description:
Welcome to our bright apartment with a sunny balcony!

We have two bedrooms (double bed in one of them and a bunk bed in the other), a fully equipped kitchen, a bathroom with toilet, bathtub, washing machine and dryer and a separate toilet. We also have high speed WiFi, TV and Xbox.
listings.area_description:
Located in the peaceful residential area Gärdet, Östermalm, it's a perfect location to explore Stockholm.

Walking distance to the lush and vast Djurgården park, perfect for walking, cycling or visiting museums such as the open air museum Skansen, the Vasa museum, the ABBA museum and the amusement park Gröna Lund. 

Many restaurants and nice cafés in the area. There is also a public swimmingpool, beach volleyball courts, basket court, outdoor gym and a playground nearby. Grocery store in the hou

listings.title: Lovely apartment with balcony in the middle of Stockholm
listings.description:
If you want to visit Stockholm this is the perfect match for you.
We live in a newly renovated apartment, in a house from the 1920s, with three bedrooms, a large open kitchen and living room, and a nice balcony towards a green yard.
The bedrooms are one master bedroom, and two almost identical rooms perfect for kids.
There is a bathroom with a combined bathtub/shower and a washing machine, and a separate smaller bathroom with a toilet.
listings.area_description:
Located in central Vasastan, one of the most popular parts of Stockholm, it is just a walk or a short ride with bus/subway to all the attractions.
The neighbourhood is quiet, in the summer you can sleep with the windows open, but still right in the heart of Stockholm.
There are restaurants, bakerys and cafes everywhere just around the corner, and a 2 min walk to the train station Stockholm Odenplan with connections all over the city.
You also have beautiful Hagaparken, the largest park in Stockh
listings.other_notes: We are a family, Pär (43 years), Jill (43), Bianca (13) and Alicia (10) who lives here. Pär works with sports TV, Jill is a psychologist, Bianca loves dance and reading, and Alicia plays football.

In my house there is a wonderful wine bar and there are restaurants, bars and coffee places on every corner, yet it's never loud. Inside it is peaceful at all times. Nature is never far away. This is a small city with a good transportation system. You can swim and bathe - or skate, if you visit in the winter - in the middle of the city, in or on lake Mälaren and there are
listings.area_description: A lively but peaceful neighborhood with bars, cafes, restaurant, ecological shops, interesting boutiques, interesting people. Treelined street that is closed for cars in the summer. Walking distance to Old Town and close to trains, subways, buses.

details.full_description:
Our home is from 1905 with 3,5 meter high ceilings, beautiful rooms, lots of space in a beautiful and friendly neighborhood. In my house there is a wonderful wine bar and there are restaurants, bars and coffee places on every corner, yet it's never loud. Inside it is peaceful at all times. Nature is never far away. This is a small city with a good transportation system. You can swim and bathe - or skate, if you visit in the winter - in the middle of the city, in or on lake Mälaren and there are great routes for walking or biking.
We have a cat, Mitchi. She will be home if you want her to, otherwise we arrange for another place, but it is not an allergy-free home.
details.full_area_description: A lively but peaceful neighborhood with bars, cafes, restaurant, ecological shops, interesting boutiques, interesting people. Treelined street that is closed for cars in the summer. Walking distance to Old Town and close to trains, subways, buses.

It's within close walking distance to Strandvägen, Djurgården, Vasa Museum, Historical Museum, Skansen, Gröna Lund, Humlagården, Stureplan and more. The Karlaplan T-bana (subway) is a 3 minute walk from the apartment which takes you to the central station in 5 minutes.

listings.title: Stockholm Rooftop charm : SOLO TRAVELLERS,  min 10 days or long stays
listings.description:
Welcome to my little attic in the heart of hipster Stockholm

I am happy to welcome travellers for a minimum of 10 DAYS (or long stays) to my lovely attic.

A small but extremely well planned, charming top floor with a view over Stockholm rooftops and an ample balcony to have breakfast in the sun or dinner out  in the summer months. 

The building is from 1939 and has been designed by the architect who designed the Swedish pavilion in the 1929 Barcelona world exhibition in functionalism style. T
listings.area_description: The location is in the middle of “Söder” or southern island a couple of hundred meters from the water. This is one of the trendiest neighbourhoods in the city with a vibrating pulse, the apartment is a few meters from restaurant and hipster-cafes, like the popular Svedjan Bakery around the corner. The subway is located right down the street and the apartment is a 5 min to bathing areas and nature parcs.
listings.other_notes:
The bedroom is quite small and the double bed is 120cm, we can also lend you an inflatable mattress for you to sleep more comfortable if you need it.

-Minimum stay is 10 to 14 days, preferably longer
-Check out time  is at 12:00
-We don’t allow sleeping in the sofa 
-We don't allow smoking in the a

listings.title: Ulrika & Vidar home
listings.description:
We live in a house designed by the famous Finnish architect Alvar Aalto in 1961. The architecture of the house is very typical of Scandinavian functionalism and consists of eight floors. Our apartment, on the third floor is very well maintained and functionally equipped. Our furniture is of high quality and comfort and our interior is characterized by art and design. 
From our balcony (8 sq meters) we see greenery and a playground and hear the children at the kindergarten next door. In the eveni

Royal Djurgården is within walking distance with museums, art galleries, the Vasa Museum and lots of restaurants. We have excellent communications and the bus to the city stops right outside the house. It is a 5-minute walk to the metro. It takes 10 minutes

details.full_description:
Our Modern Oasis in the Heart of Vasastan

Welcome to our stylish and spacious 120 square meter apartment, nestled on the top floor of a beautiful building in the vibrant Vasastan district of Stockholm. With four bedrooms and ample living space, our home can comfortably accommodate up to 8 guests.

Inside:
Step into a light-filled haven featuring a modern, fully-equipped kitchen perfect for whipping up culinary delights. The expansive living room is an entertainer's dream, offering plenty of space to relax, socialize, and enjoy quality time together.

The Neighborhood:
Vasastan is renowned for its elegant architecture, charming cafes, and trendy boutiques. You'll be within walking distance of:

Hagaparken: One of Stockholm's most picturesque parks, perfect for picnics, strolls, and enjoying the serene atmosphere.
Observatorielunden: A lovely park with stunning views over the city.
Rörstrandsgatan: A bustling street lined with shops, restaurants, and cafes.
Excellent public transportation: Easy access to buses and the metro, allowing you to explore all that Stockholm has to offer.

Why Our Home is Perfect for Your Exchange:
Prime location: Experience the best of Stockholm right at your doorstep.
Spacious and comfortable: Plenty of room for everyone to spread out and relax.
Modern amenities: Enjoy all the comforts of home, including a well-equipped kitchen and comfortable furnishings.
Ideal for families and groups: Our home is perfect for creating lasting memories with loved ones.
details.full_area_description:
Vasastan is a truly wonderful neighborhood to experience Stockholm like a local! Here's why:

A Foodie Paradise: Imagine having hundreds of restaurants, bars, and cafes right outside your door! Whether you're craving traditional Swedish fare, international cuisine, or just a cozy fika (coffee break) with delicious pastries, Vasastan has it all.

Shopper's Delight: Discover unique treasures and local designs in the area's many independent shops and boutiques. From fashion and homeware to books and antiques, you're sure to find something special.

Green Escapes:  Escape the city bustle and relax in one of Vasastan's many parks. Hagaparken, with its stunning royal grounds and historical buildings, is perfect for a leisurely stroll or a picnic. Observatorielunden offers breathtaking views over the city.

Easy Access to Everything: With Odenplan as your transportation hub, you can quickly reach any corner of Stockholm within 10-15 minutes. Hop on the metro or a bus and explore museums, historical sites, and vibrant neighborhoods with ease.

Charming Atmosphere: Vasastan perfectly blends a relaxed residential vibe with a vibrant city atmosphere. You'll love strolling along the charming streets, admiring the elegant architecture, and soaking up the friendly local atmosphere.

In short, Vasastan offers the perfect mix of convenience, charm, and excitement, making it an ideal base for your Stockholm adventure!

details.full_description:
Welcome to our bright and comfortable top-floor apartment located on Vanadisvägen in the heart of Vasastan, one of Stockholm’s most charming and vibrant neighborhoods. The apartment is about 84 m² and offers a peaceful atmosphere with plenty of natural light throughout the day.

The apartment features two spacious bedrooms, a large and airy living room, and a modern kitchen with a dining area. The layout is practical and family-friendly, with plenty of space for relaxing or spending time together. The apartment was recently repainted and is in excellent condition.

The building has a large elevator with plenty of space. A double stroller or wheelchair fits easily, making the apartment convenient and accessible for families with young children or guests who need step-free access.

The balcony faces a quiet, newly renovated inner courtyard and park that becomes a green and pleasant oasis during the summer months. Despite being centrally located, the apartment is calm and quiet, especially thanks to its top-floor position.

Just behind the building there is a very cozy and well-equipped playground, which is perfect for families with children. We have a three-year-old and a baby, so there are plenty of toys available that guests are welcome to use during their stay.

The kitchen is fully equipped with a brand new dishwasher and washing machine (both installed in 2024).

The apartment includes all modern comforts to make your stay easy and enjoyable. We have fast and reliable high-speed WiFi throughout the apartment. In the living room there is a smart projector that creates a cozy home cinema experience, with surround sound and access to several streaming services. We also have Google Home speakers in three rooms, making it easy to play music or control the environment throughout the apartment.

For additional sleeping arrangements, the apartment has a comfortable master bedroom with a very cozy king-size bed (180 cm wide), providing plenty of space for a restful night’s sleep. There is also a children’s room with a 120 cm bed, suitable for one adult or one to two children. The rooms are quiet and face the inner courtyard, making them ideal for relaxing after a day of exploring the city. We also have a 180 cm wide air mattress that can easily be set up in the living room, and also a sofa suitable for one person - making the apartment suitable for larger families or guests traveling together.
details.full_area_description:
The location is ideal for exploring Stockholm. Within a short walking distance you will find Odenplan and S:t Eriksplan, where there are many cafés, restaurants, bakeries, grocery stores, and shops. Some of Stockholm’s trendiest bars and restaurants are just around the corner, making the neighborhood lively and exciting while still feeling safe and relaxed.

Just behind the building there is a very cozy and well-equipped playground, which is perfect for families with children. 
Several grocery stores are located nearby, with the closest one only about a one-minute walk from the apartment, making everyday shopping very easy.

Public transport connections are excellent, with metro, commuter trains, and buses nearby, making it easy to reach all parts of the city.

Several beautiful parks are within walking distance, including Vasaparken and Vanadislunden, perfect for walks, playground visits, or relaxing outdoors.

It is a perfect home base for discovering Stockholm during the summer.

listings.description: Central Stockholm location at the trendy Södermalm island. 7 minutes walk to direct train for airpot. 50+ restaurants within 15 minutes walk. 5 minutes walk to a sandy beach (!) if you want to go for a swim. Nice large balcony if you want to chill at home.
listings.area_description:
The island of Södermalm forms the southern part of the main city and is the definition of urban Stockholm. This once working-class neighborhood, is now a hot-spot for artists, musicians, hip designers, bohemian cafés, edgy shops, and funky restaurants.

This area is home to some of the most diverse and sought after addresses in all of Stockholm, from the Art Nouveau apartments on Mariatorget to centuries-old cottages stacked on the cliffs above the sea on Mälarstrand and Fjällgatan.

details.full_other:
The Airport:
When you arrive to the airport the most easy thing is to ask for THE PENDEL TÅG to SÖDER and you will arrive two blocks from where we live. Remember to get off at SÖDER STATION. The ride takes aprox. 50 min. It leaves every half hour. If you take the same train back to the airport, when you leave, remember to keep your ticket, because you have to leave it at the check point in the airport to get into the terminals.
You can also pick a taxi at the airport, but be careful – you have to pick a taxi with a fixed price, so if you are more persons, it is valuable. If you do not pick a taxi with a fixed price, the amount can be without limit/high in the sky! 
There is also a fast train ARLANDA BANAN from the airport to the Central Station. It takes 20 min but then you have to take a taxi from The Central Station to our apartment. Or you take the subway from the central station to Norsborg or Fruängen ( end stations) and get off at Mariatorget station. 6 minutes walk to our apartment. You can pay the subway directly with your creditcard.

Washing room:
If you want to wash your clothes, there is a washing room in the cellar with entrance from the backyard. You need a special key, which you will find in the kitchen just above the sink (a colourful key holder).  If you want to use the big washing machines, you have to book time and date in the book down there. Just write our names: Bodil and Sören. The small washing machine should alway be non-booking available.




Kitchen:
To turn on the light over the kitchen table, you have to turn on two very small switchers – one at the side of the refrigirator near the kitchen shelf and one under the above shelf near the stove!



The Stove:
It only works if you put a saucepan or pan on the stove, when you want to start the firestones. If you turn one of the buttons all the way to the right and you see an P on the display, then it goes very fast heating up whatever. But you have to be careful, you can easily burn things – so screw it back to the number on the display, you need for your specific cooking. 

The Bathroom:
Under the sink, you can find washing powder to use in the washing machines in the cellar.

TV
Two remote controllers - a black one ”Samsung for all the streaming channels - and the white on for all the TV channels around the globe.

I-phone amplifier
On the left side of the TV flatscreen there is an amplifier for your Iphone, so you can listen to your own playlists. There is a small round box you have to press on until the light shows green, then you can plug the electric flex into your I-Phone and start dancing


We have nice nabours, so just go down to the backyard (during summertime)
 and sit down at a table and start talking – or take a grill downthere and start your own grill-party. You will find tablecloths in the small line room just beside the stove on the right side. 

Across the road you can follow a small path and you will reach a nice playground for the younger and smaller children.
Please look in the brochures we have put on the table. You will find everything about Stockholm - shops, museums, bars, nightclubs, boat- and bus trips etc. etc

Enjoy your stay

Best
Bodil & Sören

* a large balcony on the park, with a barbecue
* a 1st bathroom, with
listings.area_description:

Note there will be a few plants, and two young hypoallergenic cats (Siberian and Russian Blue) to take care of during your stay :)

We will ask for 40 €|450 SEK in cleaning fee, upon your departure (GP), unless reciprocal exchange and mutual cleaning is arranged.

details.full_description: The apartment is very stylish, yet  cosy, in an old building (1906) with high ceiling and great atmosphere. It can easily fit 4 people, one room having a comfortable convertible bed sofa. Adjacent is the living room with a comfortable coach and big chairs and a fire place. The kitchen is spacious and sits easily 6 people. In conjunction with the Master bedroom there is a balcony facing the interior court yard, where you have access to do your own barbecue and dining. The bathroom is modern, tiled floor to ceiling and has a nice shower and toilet. The apartment is fully equipped with kitchen utensils, dish washer, laundry and drier, Wi-Fi, TV sets in all rooms (CNN,BBC etc). The apartment is 83 square meter, well planned and spacious.
details.full_area_description: In the very city centre of Stockholm the most beautiful city in Scandinavia, in the most exciting part and rather sophisticated area of the city (Östermalm/Vasastan), you will have a chance to experience culture, shopping, wonderful dining, recreation. Around the corner you can find subway and buses as well as grocery stores, restaurants, night clubs, movie theater, clothing stores, dry cleaner and just about anything. In 5 min walking distance you can access the Royal National City Park; the Haga Park, with lovely walking and running tracks, picnic areas etc .Here you can also go for a swim or just watch the busy boat life. Stockholm is a perfect city to explore on a bicycle. The area is fairly quiet but still close to the most busiest part where many of the hip night clubs and the high street fashion stores are. The Old Town, the Royal Castle, the Opera house and much more, are within walking distance or can easily be reached by bus or underground.  Take a short bus ride (10mins) or walk (20 mins) and you will be able to jump on a boat that will take you for a day cruise/excursion out in the Archipelago, 8000 wonderful islands for you to visit. Many of them have restaurants or you can bring a pic-nic. In the summer there are many places to get off and enjoy the fresh water for a swim or sun bathing.
details.full_other:
Exciting and interesting city life.
Close to a beautiful national park (Hagaparken)
Easy access to the archipelago (1000s of Islands)
Children welcome
We will ask for 40 €|450 SEK in cleaning fee, upon your departure (GP), unless reciprocal exchange and mutual cleaning is arranged.

listings.title:
Irina's apartment at Södermalm, Stockholm.
Looking for a 2-3 weeks reciprocal exchange in summer 26.
listings.description:
my apartment is located in the center of Stockholm,at island that is called Södermalm. Metro -Mariatorget. 
It has an absolute perfect location, right next to supermarkets ,cafes,museums and even beaches :-) nature is everywhere in Stockholm!
This apartment is for a single traveler or couples only.
It has 1 living room and 1 bedroom with a bed for 2 people. The sofa in the living room is a bedsofa.
listings.area_description:
Lovely artistic neighbourhood in the very heart of the city
Good infrastructure -bus stop behind the corner, but everything you need is just a walking distance
Beautiful nature, Långholmen beach is just 10 min walk
Lots of bars and restaurants around
Montelius vägen, Skinnarviksbergetwith its heartbreaking view is 300m away
listings.other_notes: I am interested in reciprocal exchanges (2-3 weeks) during summer 2026.

listings.title: Jessica's house
listings.description:
The Nook by the Park

A studio-style one-bedroom apartment overlooking one of Stockholm’s most beautiful parks, Vasaparken - complete with a football and ice-skating field, basketball court, mini golf, and endless green lawns perfect for picnics. There’s also a large playground and a serene yoga temple just around the corner.

Right across the street, you’ll find one of Stockholm’s most charming contemporary art museums, and just next door are a boutique ice cream shop, grocery store, and liquor
listings.area_description:
Just around the corner, find Stockholm’s top-rated restaurants—perfect for those who love city life, culture, food, and drinks.


Across the street in Vasaparken, there’s a football field in summer that turns into an ice rink in winter — so bring your skates! You can also borrow a sled or snowracer when the park’s hills transform into the best snowy playground around. The park also features a boules court, a basketball court, and northern Europe’s most award-winning playground.

Available for yo
listings.other_notes:
A few practical details:

Minimum nights: 3 
I personally welcome my guests, preferably during reasonable hours whenever possible.
A cleaning fee of 30 euros applies for each stay.
That said, I have no doubt that guests will take good care of this little studio, of course!

details.full_description:
✨ Historic charm meets modern comfort in this newly renovated apartment in vibrant Vasastan. Perfect for families, with parks, cafés, and top restaurants just steps away.

Why you’ll love it
 Bedrooms – Sleeps up to 6 (ideal for families)
 Large balcony with seating for 5 – perfect for breakfast in the sun
 Free indoor garage parking – rare in central Stockholm
 2 modern bathrooms – one with bath & laundry facilities

The Space
Master Bedroom: 160 cm double bed, balcony access
Bedroom 2: Bunk bed for kids (up to ~12 years)
Bedroom 3: Loft bed (140 cm) for 2, private en-suite bathroom & sofa
Living Room: Comfy sofa & flat-screen TV
Kitchen: Fully equipped, open to living area, dishwasher included
details.full_area_description:
Location Highlights
Walk everywhere – city center in 15 min, parks in 2 min
1 min to Odenplan – subway & commuter trains
Super Market 1 min
Vasaparken: 2 min walk – playgrounds & cafés
Hagaparken: 15 min walk – meet locals (and maybe the Royal Family)
Karlberg Castle: 15 min walk
Ferries to the archipelago: 10 min by bus / 30 min walk
details.full_other: From Arlanda Airport: Just 35 min by commuter train to Odenplan – 1 min walk from the apartment.

Here we live close to lovely restaurans, shops, public transportation and nice walks along the water. The apartment is spacious, facing both street and courtyard, on the fourth floor (with elevator) of a building from 1929.

After a long day of exploring you may want to come and sit by the warm fire, enjoy the rooftops of the buildings around us from our balcony or curling up to watch a movie in ou

Parks and playgrounds are plenty and not far in between. There are nice walking/running paths along the water close by, there you can also visit the charming “workers garden”, swim in the lake or in the big outside or inside pools at Eriksdalsbadet. It will take you about 20-30 minutes to walk to the Old town, and then 30 more to the city center. If you want to

Södermalm is considered to be one of the trendiest neighborhoods in the world.
€120 cleaning fee per guest points stay and minimum 5 nights.

details.full_description:
Welcome to our newly (2020) renovated apartment in the trendy and quaint neighborhood called SOFO. Here we live close to lovely restaurans, shops, public transportation and nice walks along the water. The apartment is spacious, facing both street and courtyard, on the fourth floor (with elevator) of a building from 1929.

After a long day of exploring you may want to come and sit by the warm fire, enjoy the rooftops of the buildings around us from our balcony or curling up to watch a movie in our tv-room.

There is a master bedroom with bathroom en suit, large bed, tv and balcony facing north.
There are two kids bedrooms with single beds.
Nice living room wich opens up to the kitchen, The Kitchen has everything you need to cook up something nice.

The apartment has WIFI (600 Mbit/s)
details.full_area_description: Södermalm and especially Nytorget is a very popular part of Stockholm. There are small cafes, restaurants and shops around every corner. Parks and playgrounds are plenty and not far in between. There are nice walking/running paths along the water close by, there you can also visit the charming “workers garden”, swim in the lake or in the big outside or inside pools at Eriksdalsbadet. It will take you about 20-30 minutes to walk to the Old town, and then 30 more to the city center. If you want to take the bus or subway (Skanstull) they stop just outside our bildning. There is also an indoor shopping center around the corner from us.
details.full_other:
Södermalm is considered to be one of the trendiest neighborhoods in the world.
€120 cleaning fee per guest points stay and minimum 5 nights.

listings.title: Sophias apartment
listings.description: A charming apartment from 1904 on the top floor, with beautiful views over a park. The rooms have since been rearranged and redecorated (for the better, in our opinion) - see the last photos. We’re happy to send more pictures on request.
listings.area_description: Central apartment in Stockholm Vasastan. The location is ideal - right in the heart of the city. Vasastan is a wonderfully charming neighborhood, known for its great restaurants, cozy cafés, and all the conveniences you might need. The apartment is just a few minutes from Odenplan, a major hub for public transportation, making it easy to get anywhere in the city. We love living here.
listings.other_notes: We have a cockerpoo dog, an allergy-friendly one.

listings.title: Modern Gem near Södermalm & Nature
listings.description:
Welcome to our cosy and modern apartment, ideal for relaxing while making the most of the surroundings!
The apartment is bright and quiet with a fully equipped kitchen and a comfortable living area. It’s a great place to unwind after a day out, and there is also a dedicated Workstation if you need to bring your laptop.
listings.area_description:
The location is very convenient. You are within walking distance to both Södermalm and Hammarby Sjöstad, as well as the nature at Nackareservatet and Årstaviken. If you are attending an event, Avicii Arena and 3Arena are just around the corner.
Getting around:
7-8 min walk to closest metro station 
10 min by metro to the city center
30 min walk to Södermalm

listings.title: Rosys House
listings.description: Welcome to my cozy Stockholm apartment. It’s a small but charming space designed in a Scandinavian–bohemian style, with light colors, natural materials, and a calm atmosphere that makes it a perfect place to relax after a day exploring the city.The apartment overlooks a quiet green garden, so even though you’re in the city, it feels peaceful and private. I love sitting by the window with coffee in the morning while looking at the trees and greenery. The location is very convenient: it’s only abo
listings.area_description:
Just a short walk away you’ll find Gärdet Park, a huge open green space perfect for walking, running, picnics, or simply enjoying the fresh air. Locals come here to exercise, relax, and enjoy beautiful sunsets.

The neighborhood is close to the water as well, and within walking distance you can reach Djurgården, one of Stockholm’s most beautiful islands with museums, nature, and scenic waterfront paths.

Nearby you’ll also find:
	•	Nice cafés, bakeries, and restaurants
	•	Grocery stores and loca

listings.title: 3-bedroom home, in central Stockholm, near city pulse, even nearer to green family-friendly park

Bright and well-planned top-floor apartment (6th of 6) featuring three bedrooms, two of which are ideal for children or teenagers, and a master bedroom with a double bed and an en-suite bathroom with shower. There is a second bathroom with a bathtub, as well as a washing machine and dryer.

listings.area_description: Located in Östermalm, Stockholm, with easy access to public transport, green spaces, an big park with wading pool and rose bushes, shopping, outdoor pool, the city centre, and attractions such as Gröna Lund and Skansen.

listings.title: Apartment right by the water in Stockholm's best area.

The apartment is located in one of Stockholm's trendiest areas where you will find small bars, cafes and pop-up markets along the waterfront and a unique variety of restaurants from all corners of the world. The area we live in is calm and quiet, but just a few minutes away you'll find the vibrant pulse of the

We have a bathing jetty right below the apartment, and a stone's throw away is a sandy beach suitable for children with access to food trucks, boules courts, and mini-golf. This area is perfect to live in during Sweden's lovely summer mon

listings.title: Modern charm
listings.description:
Cute modern apartment in older charming building for single or couple traveller. Contemporary design style in warm colours. The bed is 140 cm. I also offer an spare mattress (120 cm) to place in the living room, for extra - though perhaps less comfortable - sleeping options. The sofa is not appropriate as a sleeping option. Fully equipped kitchen, nice hot shower, and access to laundry room.

listings.other_notes: 3rd floor by stairs. No elevator. Very quiet apartment. In summer, the bedroom is quite bright in the morning despite the blackout curtains.

listings.title: Lovely apartment in Stockholm

listings.other_notes:

listings.title: Home of Mats och Veronica
listings.description: Our apartment is very centrally located on Södermalm, which is buzzing with life and activity. Despite this, the apartment is completely undisturbed. The house from 1870 is charming with many turn of the century details. The apartment consists of a large open living room adjacent to the well-equipped kitchen. Upstairs there are two bedrooms, a library, a bathroom and a terrace with a view of Stockholm's rooftops. The property includes a lush courtyard with a fountain and seating furniture.

details.full_description:
We have a beautiful 102 m2 apartment located in a building dated from 1900, 10 minutes walk from Stockholm's central station.

Fully equipped kitchen with dish washer and more machinery than you probably need.

Master bedroom with double bed and desk.

Child room one: one single bed and two additional loft beds for children (approx. 165 cm each). Not to forget, lots of toys!

Child room two: a loft for adult (140 cm wide).

Child room 3: One single bed.

Living room with balcony facing the inner garden and Stockholm's biggest mural (protected), "the garden party".

Two bathrooms. Washing machine, dryer. Elevator. Wi-fi.

Modern design mixed with classics. Not to forget loads of books in nine different languages... Enjoy this lovely apartment with 3,30 m ceilings with central Stockholm at your doorstep!
details.full_area_description:
Really nice area with many cosy cafes, trendy restaurants and small shops. Just by Norr Mälarstrand, one of the most popular water front walks in central Stockholm, along the water - walk for ten minutes and you are at the townhall for the Nobel prize party!

We have a bus and subway close by - but you really can walk everywhere. Alternatively, hire a bike about 50 meters from our apartment. Several parks close-by, you can go swimming (city beach at 15 minutes walk) or maybe kayaking? Sail boats can also be rented or you can go fishing just by the parliament, 15 minutes walk from our apartment - quite cool for being in the center of a European capital.

All of (central) Stockholm is very safe.
details.full_other:
The best location - central, still quiet at night
Beautiful house from 1900
Big and has all features we could ever wish for!

listings.title: Spacious family friendly apartment in a calm street with a beautiful view (and a kayak!)
listings.description:
Our big green kitchen with a view over the Hammarby channel is the heart of our home. In the summer you can bring your drink to our lovely balcony and watch the boats wait for the lock to open. 
We have three bedrooms and a living room with a view over the park. Two bathrooms, one with a shower and one with a big bathtub if you are here in the winter and want to warm up.
We also offer a double kayak if you want to discover Stockholm from the waterside.
listings.area_description:
We live on a calm street and it is quiet here in the evenings. But if you take a ten minute walk you are in the middle of SoFo with all its restaruants, bars and small boutiques, second hand and second hand stores. There is a big play ground where you also can watch sheep, goat and pigs, just five minutes away.
You can take the boats to Djurgården, a bus stays just outside our door and the metro is 10 minutes away. 
If you like walking you can walk close to the water for hours from our house, an
listings.other_notes:

listings.title: Kristoffer's place
listings.description:
Two-room apartment, at the moment mostly suitable for solo travelers because of furniture. 

Fresh and clean, with everything you need for a pleasent stay. 

Nice neighbours, and very quiet :-)
listings.area_description:
Located in popular Birkastan, just by Sankt Eriksplan. All the best galleries in the vincinity. Trendy cafées and shops, close to water, forests and parks for wonderful strawling. 

Stockholm Central station within walking-distance (or 4 stops by subway).
listings.other_notes: The flat is a non-smoker space (as most Swedish homes), there is however a lovely backyard where you can relax.

details.full_description:
We are a family of five and we love to travel. We live in the heart of Stockholm, in a family oriented area with lots of great parks and shops nearby.  We have a big and personal apartment and hope that you will enjoy our home as much as we do. 

Our house was built in the late 60's and the apartment has the original details, but was refurnished a few years ago. Situated on the 5th floor (but with a large elevator to take you up and down), there is plenty of daylight flowing in through the panorama window. The apartment has two newly renovated balconies and a big garden with children's playground accessible for use. The apartment has three bedrooms where our kids sleep and is very suitable for families, but have full size beds and can also be used for adults. Apart from this there is a master bedroom as well as two bathrooms with showers and one of them also has a bath tub. There is also a separate laundry room with a washing machine and dryer. 
The kitchen is partly integrated with the living room and very modern. The living room has a comfortable sofa and a flat screen TV. There is also a flat sceen tv in the master bedroom.

We recently bought a very cuddly cat named Cleo and if you love a friend in the house we would love to leave her at home to be looked after. She is very low maintenance and doesn't require more than cuddles, food and change in the litter bow.
details.full_area_description:
Our apartment is situated in Vasastan, one of Stockholms most charming areas, mainly built in the early 20th century. You can find shops and restaurants for every taste and price range within a few minutes walking distance, and several parks  just around the corner. Just around the corner is the lovely park Vasaparken with football courts as well as minigolf and a large playground and cafés. You can take a stroll to central Stockholm or walk in the opposite direction and be in Royal Hagaparken with its vast lawns, leafy woods and beautiful lake Brunnsviken in no time. Perfect place for swimming or just hanging out. For trips to other parts of Stockholm, subway, buses and commuter trains also minutes away.
If you want to visit the beautiful archipelago of Stockholm, you find the ferries a ten minute bus ride away.

Subway and buses: 2 mins walk
Commuter trains: 2 mins walk
Supermarket: 1 min walk

City central: 10 mins walk
Hagaparken: 15 mins walk
Vasaparken: 2 mins walk
Karlbergs castle: 15 mins walk
Ferry to Stockholm Archipelago: 10 mins by bus
details.full_other:
Situated in the heart of Stockholm
Close to several of Stockholm's nicest parks
Spacious, light and beautiful apartment

details.full_description:
Escape to the heart of Stockholm's Södermalm with our exclusive home swap/vacation rental opportunity! We welcome you to our dream home in the heart of Stockholm's charming Södermalm – a spacious 5.5-room apartment, including 4 bedrooms, nestled on the cozy Bysistorget. 

Perfect Location: Nestled in the heart of Södermalm, our home is situated on the quaint Bysistorget. Enjoy easy access to the subway, commuter trains, and buses, making it a breeze to explore Stockholm's treasures. A quick 5-minute subway ride lands you in the historic Gamla stan.

Local Delights: Indulge in the culinary wonders of the neighborhood with a plethora of charming restaurants. Grocery stores and the Systembolaget are within arm's reach, ensuring you have everything you need for a delightful stay.

Scenic Views: Admire the beauty of Stockholm from your private balcony. Revel in the stunning view of the city hall and soak in the atmosphere of Bysistorget's lively square.

Spacious Retreat: Our apartment boasts 5.5 rooms, offering ample space for a family or group of friends. Experience comfort and style in every corner of this carefully curated space.
details.full_area_description:
Discover Södermalm:

Södermalm is known for its unique blend of historic charm and modern vibrancy. This district, often referred to as "Söder" by locals, offers a diverse range of experiences. From trendy boutiques and art galleries to cozy cafes and lively bars, Södermalm has something for everyone.

The area around Mariatorget and Its Charms:

Nestled within Södermalm, Mariatorget stands out as a cultural and social hub. Here, the bustling square is surrounded by a mix of historic architecture and contemporary designs, creating an atmosphere that seamlessly blends the old with the new.

listings.title: Magnus's house - coolcation in Stockholm
listings.description: Vårt hem är en charmig och bohemisk lägenhet högt upp i ett hus från sextiotalet med tidstypiska detaljer bevarade. Vi har fantastisk utsikt över grönområden och sjön Mälaren som ligger 50 meter från porten. Lägenheten har tre sovrum, ett stort och rymligt vardagsrum, kök och plats för ett stort matbord för trevliga middagar. Det finns två badrum och en stor balkong. Bostaden nås enkelt med hiss eller trappor.
listings.area_description: Vårt kvarter ligger i en lugn del av stadsdelen Södermalm, en station med kollektivtrafik från Stockholms centralstation. Det ligger vid Mälarens strand, med strandpromenad, badbryggor och parker alldeles intill. På några minuter når du stadens puls med restauranger och sevärdheter. Perfekt för ”coolcation” i Norden.
listings.other_notes: Vi har fantastiska grannar och vi är del i en kollektiv grönsaksodling utanför huset som gäster kan skörda från.
