Vi har fantastisk utsikt över grönområden och sjön Mälaren som ligger 50 meter från porten. Lägenheten har tre sovrum, ett stort och rymligt vardagsrum, kök och plats för ett stort matbord för trevliga middagar. Det finns två badrum och en stor balkong. Bostaden nås enkelt med hiss eller trappor.
details.full_area_description: Vårt kvarter ligger i en lugn del av stadsdelen Södermalm, en station med kollektivtrafik från Stockholms centralstation. Det ligger vid Mälarens strand, med strandpromenad, badbryggor och parker alldeles intill. På några minuter når du stadens puls med restauranger och sevärdheter. Perfekt för ”coolcation” i Norden.
details.full_other: Vi har fantastiska grannar och vi är del i en kollektiv grönsaksodling utanför huset som gäster kan skörda från.

listings.title: Big 1 bedroom+living+balc+kitch.Trendy area, water, parks
listings.description: It's a beautiful 1920s two-room apartment with one big bedroom, a living room, a kitchen and a balcony. It's got great lounging potential with very good sound system, vinyl player, projector and 135 inch screen hidden away when not watching. Location is perfect - trendy Södermalm and more specifically Hornstull (Wants to be Brooklyn in Stockholm, a laughable comparison, but still!), next to bars and restaurants, main busline stop 6 mins away, other bus lines 2 minutes away, buses in Stockholm no
listings.area_description: One of the most popular neighborhoods in Stockholm thanks to urban life with bars and restaurants combined with a (tiny) beach, multiple spots to go swimming, and beautiful park-like islands just a stone's throw away to go jogging or canoeing.
listings.other_notes:
Old (in a good way!) beautiful apartmant with great views and a nice balcony. 
Five-ten minutes walking from nature: Great place to swim outdoors and to go jogging or kayaking. 
Trendy area and two minutes from a central bus line (as of 2023 5 minutes) and five-six minutes from central metro.

listings.title: Private bedroom in modern, bright, and well equipped apartment with balcony in Stockholm
listings.description:
Welcome to a nice private bedroom in our three bedroom apartment on the island Kungsholmen in the inner part of Stockholm. 

The apartment is very bright, quiet and modern and is part of a pleasant small condo built in 2003. It’s situated just a few hundred meters from Lake Mälaren and has a nice sea view from the balcony which is optionally glassed-in on windy or chilly days, or completely open when the weather is warm and nice.  Stockholm City is by one half-hour nice walk along the lake from
listings.area_description:
The apartment is situated a few hundred meters from Lake Mälaren in a very quiet and green neighborhood. Stockholm City is by one half-hour nice walk along the lake from the property.  

Walking the other direction immediately leads to a nature trail with rocks next to the lake, suited for sun bathing, picnics and a swim in the lake on warm days.  

There’s also a place for renting canoes by the hour.  

Right outside the front door there’s a bus stop for bus number one which brings you to the c
listings.other_notes: The apartment is strictly smoke-free, also on the balcony. Please also note that smoking is not allowed in public spaces in Sweden. This goes for all indoor spaces and also many outdoor spaces such as close to public transportation, at bus stops, on restaurant terraces, at playgrounds, in entrance a

listings.title: Cosy flat with park view close to city and sea
listings.description:
Family friendly part of Stockholm and close to the City. This is a small, cozy 2 bedroom apartment with balcony facing a green park and swimming opportunities close by. Great for one couple or a small family looking for a calm gem in Stockholm. 
Restaurants by the sea and great communications with subway to central Stockholm within 5 minutes walk.  Play grounds for kids and two swimming pools for toddlers (free) within few minutes walk. (Summer)
There are several restaurants, cafés and bars near
listings.area_description:
Calm, safe, cosy area great for walking, strolling, swimming and dining. The neighbourhood offers many great restaurants,  play grounds for kids and a big green park area perfect for running or walking alongside the water. 
Close to Stockholm City, 5 minutes with subway or around 10 euro with taxi. 

- Buzzy restaurants: The whole promenade strip by the water have many restaurants, For example Texas Long horn, Primo  Italian restaurant, Lily´s Burger, Coc Fine Döner, Piren
- Cool bars: Piren is

listings.title: Modern Stockholm home in the heart of Södermalm
listings.description:
Hi and welcome to my place. 

I’ve been living in my lovely apartment since 2019, and I truly enjoy living here. During the summer of 2024, I renovated both the bedroom and the kitchen, which made it even more comfortable, and I’m sure I’ll be staying here for many years to come.

In the newly renovated kitchen, you'll find all the appliances and tools you need for an everyday life. A spacious fridge/freezer, gas stove, dishwasher, and a combined microwave/convection oven. Plenty of storage and
listings.area_description:
My apartment is located in the most vibrant, yet relaxed, part of Stockholm called Södermalm. It's located on a quiet one-way street, but with the city buzz just around the corner where you'll find popular restaurants, cafés, bars, grocery stores, pharmacies and charming shops. Just around the other corner, you'll find the absolutely best panorama views of Stockholm. 

The nearest subway station (Mariatorget) is just a 3-4 minute walk from the apartment. From there, it's only 3 stops to reach th
listings.other_notes:
I will be living abroad during the period 7th of December until mid February. Hence I would prefer a longer booking using Guest Points during this period. I would appreciate at least 28 days. 

Cleaning
My only requirement is to leave the flat as clean as you found it :)

Extra Bedding

listings.title: Chic apartment in the best area of central Stockholm
listings.description: Newly renovated, classic apartment. High standards, all amenities, perfect location.
listings.area_description: Located in the central part of Stockholm, in an area packed with good restaurants, coffee shops etc. Walking distance to all sights, a wonderful park (Vasaparken) and the beach. The subway is 100 meters away.

listings.title: Beautiful city apartment in Stockholm
listings.description:
Our home is in the beautiful city of Stockholm, 121 square meter apartment in trendy Södermalm, Stockholm, close to everything. We have a large kitchen, two bathrooms, two living rooms, one master bedroom and one large room for children. From the kitchen we have a balcony and we have three fireplaces. 
Please don't hesitate to ask for more pictures or anything you would like to know!
listings.area_description:
Stockholm is a wonderful and very beautiful city, built on islands with lots of water. Our apartment is in Sodermalm, right in the centre of the city. Sodermalm is a lively part of town, with many restaurants, bars and shops around. From our home you can easily walk to the Old town in 10 minutes.

Please read this wonderful travel report about Stockholm, http://edition.cnn.com/2011/TRAVEL/09/08/newnam.stockholm.trip/
listings.other_notes:
Great location in a trendy part of the city. The building is from 1899 and holds lovely historical characteristics with high ceilings and fireplaces. 
Close to everything with both walking distance, buses and underground.

listings.title: Family Friendly Central Stockholm Apt
listings.description:
Welcome to Stockholm, one of the worlds most beautiful capital cities! Enjoy all the city has to offer with our centrally located apartment perfect for a couple or small family. 

Start your mornings in our homey apartment by borrowing a book and sipping a strong cup of Swedish coffee on the sunny balcony, or sleep-in and cook a big brunch in our well equipped food lovers kitchen. With an open plan to let in maximum light, our Scandi style apartment offers everything you could need to feel home
listings.area_description:
Årstadal is a newly built family-oriented neighborhood, located in south-west Stockholm. Just a mere 5 minute walk away from your front door you'll arrive at Sjövik square where you can dive into the fresh water of Årsta bay from the family-friendly docks, find nature trails for morning runs and afternoon walks, and visit the many parks for children of all ages. You'll also find two grocery stores, local restaurants with all types of cuisines, as well as a bakery and ice cream shop. 

Walk 10 mi
listings.other_notes: This apartment is a smoke free and pet free environment. No parties allowed. Quiet hours for the complex are from 10pm-8am.

listings.title: 2 bedrom in the heart of Stockholms best area
listings.description:
We have a cozy 2bedroom apartment in central Stockholm. Södermalm.

2 large bedrooms
A bathroom and an extra WC
A balcony
A playarea suitable for a toddler
listings.area_description:
Södermalm is at the heart of stockholm city. Walking distance to restaurants, parks, galleries, art galleries and night life.  In the sumer a short ferry ride takes you to the archipelago, or you could go bathing on the beach in nearby tantolunden.

In the middle of everything but still right next to a park in a calm zone.
listings.other_notes:
Right now looking for exhange weekends during the spring, and whoole weeks during july or beginning of august.

listings.title: Beautiful home in scenic district in central Stockholm
listings.description:
Located in a beautiful late 1800's building. 
The apartment is bright, spacious, beautifully furnished and fully equipped. Livingroom, two bedrooms, bathroom, restroom and a large foyer. 
All necessary amenities, WiFi and Netflix / HBO accounts and a PlayStation for the gamer. Great neighbours and friendly atmosphere.
listings.area_description:
Located in the city center of Stockholm 
Mosebacke Torg is one of the city's most classic and charming parks
A stone’s throw from the Old town
In the heart of the Millennium Trilogy global success 
Magnificent view of Stockholm and its’ waters just outside
Subway hub and ferries around the corner, very (!) good transportation
Located in the arty part of of the city 
Plenty of good restaurants around the corner

listings.title: 3 rooms flat in the centre, 2 balconys and a wide view
listings.description: We think that our guests will love to be able to have breakfast at one balcony in the morning sun and have dinner at the other balcony in the evening sun!  It is located in the center of Stockholm and in the center of the more trendy part of Stockholm, Södermalm!  It ´s walking distance to most places and still close to subway and buses. It is a light and welcoming apartment.
listings.area_description: It is very central but still very quiet since its no traffic in our street and we are at the top of the house.  Its a lot of restaurants and bars in these quarters. There is also a park nearby with fresh water lake, you can swim in the middle of the city.
listings.other_notes: It´s a very quiet apartment, despite it is in the center of Södermalm.  It has e great view. The house has no elevator though, we live on the 3rd floor.

listings.title: 5-room apartment with garden in the city centre of Stockholm
listings.description:
We love our apartment! Located in a building from 1906, it has high ceilings, large windows and a very nice ambiance. There is a wonderful park - Stureparken - just outside the building - and we have the large kitchen and living room facing this park. The four bedrooms are facing the quiet inner garden of the house, from which we have a private entrance to from the guest room. 

The location is just super. It is extremely close to the busy city center, just 5 minutes walk, and communication to o
listings.area_description: Our flat is situated in Östermalm in central Stockholm, an area that Wikipedia describes as "one of the most popular districts in Stockholm. It is a wealthy area, having the highest housing prices in Sweden". It is a 500 meters to the busy city center with shops, restaurants and bars, but also very close to the nature. Beautiful island Djurgården is only 1 km away and the forest Liljanskogen is 500 meters away. This location is perfect for couples as well as for families.
listings.other_notes:
Best location possible! As central as it gets. 
Nice and calm street, quiet and safe area.
Private garden with BBQ and large park very close by.

Please note #1. - we only do exchanges - not just guest points arrangement.
Please note #2 - this is our first home, so we can only do exchanges when we a

details.full_description:
We love our apartment! Located in a building from 1906, it has high ceilings, large windows and a very nice ambiance. There is a wonderful park - Stureparken - just outside the building - and we have the large kitchen and living room facing this park. The four bedrooms are facing the quiet inner garden of the house, from which we have a private entrance to from the guest room. 

The location is just super. It is extremely close to the busy city center, just 5 minutes walk, and communication to other parts of the city is easy with buses and subways just around the corner. In Stockholm you can swim in the middle of the city or just take a boat out in the beautiful archipelago over the day. Djurgården with Skansen and many other sights also close by as well as Stureplan and nice shops and restaurants. Our home is very suitable for children and there is a big playground in Humlegården - a big park close by.

We have 4 bedrooms: One with a double bed (180 cm), one with a pull-out couch 160 cm, one with 140 cm bed and one with a 120 cm bed.
details.full_area_description: Our flat is situated in Östermalm in central Stockholm, an area that Wikipedia describes as "one of the most popular districts in Stockholm. It is a wealthy area, having the highest housing prices in Sweden". It is a 500 meters to the busy city center with shops, restaurants and bars, but also very close to the nature. Beautiful island Djurgården is only 1 km away and the forest Liljanskogen is 500 meters away. This location is perfect for couples as well as for families.
details.full_other:
Best location possible! As central as it gets. 
Nice and calm street, quiet and safe area.
Private garden with BBQ and large park very close by.

Please note #1. - we only do exchanges - not just guest points arrangement.
Please note #2 - this is our first home, so we can only do exchanges when we are away - on school holidays.

listings.title: Beautiful seaview Stockholm apartment
listings.description:
Welcome to my beautiful 2 room apartment in the center of Stockholm. One bedroom with a doublebed and a big balcony, a livingroom with a stunning view and another balcony over Riddarfjärden. Fully equipped kitchen and newly renovated bathroom. SmartTV, Internet. Laundryroom.
Fantastic garden just by the water front. The apartment is located on Södermalm, the trendy island of Stockholm, full of restaurants, beaches, parks, theatres and shopping. 
https://vimeo.com/147338723 Check the video out!
listings.area_description: Stockholm is built up on several islands in the beautiful Archipelago of Stockholm, surrounded by water wherever you look. The apartment is located on Södermalm, the southern island, which has a lot of parks, beaches and historical buildings with incredible views over Stockholm and its waters. Södermalm is very trendy with nice restaurants, bars and cafés as well as shopping and  theatres. You can walk or bicycle easily in the city as well as take buses and subways.
listings.other_notes:
2 balconies with fantastic views over the sea.
Perfectly located on trendy Sodermalm
Very quite but still in the middle of the city.

listings.title: Cosy apartment in the new Vasastan district
listings.description: My home is cosy and very confortable in a recent building made by a famous renowned Swedish architect. At the floor 11, it offers a great light coming in especially in the morning. There is also a shared terrace rooftop. The window is childproof securized. Plenty of storage space for bikes.
listings.area_description: My home is very good located very close to the center of Stockholm. In the Vasastan neighbourhood, located north of central Stockholm, is a popular district for its classic Nordic architecture, numerous parks and lively atmosphere. It's a residential and professionnal neighborhood with a rich cultural offering, including museums, theaters and the famous Stockholm Public Library. Metro is located 10 min walk from Odenplan station and Eriksplan station, 5min from Katerina bus station or Torsplan s

listings.title: Apartment in central Stockholm (Mariatorget)
listings.description:
Three-room apartment in a 1885 building in Södermalm (Mariatorget), Stockholm.

The apartment is on the fourth floor and combines original features with modern updates. The kitchen is fully equipped and suitable for everyday cooking and dining. The tiled bathroom has underfloor heating and a bathtub.

The layout includes two bedrooms facing the courtyard and a spacious living room. 
We also have a balcony and access to a shared inner courtyard with outdoor seating and a grill (summertime).

The
listings.area_description:
Mariatorget is a central square and park in Södermalm, Stockholm. It’s a popular local meeting spot with green lawns, trees, benches, and a playground. Around the square you’ll find cafés, restaurants, small shops, a pharmacy, and a grocery store.

The area has a relaxed neighborhood feel while still being lively. There is a metro station at Mariatorget, and Stockholm Södra commuter train station is within walking distance, making it easy to get around the city.

details.full_description:
Three-room apartment in a 1885 building in Södermalm (Mariatorget), Stockholm.

The apartment is on the fourth floor and combines original features with modern updates. The kitchen is fully equipped and suitable for everyday cooking and dining. The tiled bathroom has underfloor heating and a bathtub.

The layout includes two bedrooms facing the courtyard and a spacious living room. 
We also have a balcony and access to a shared inner courtyard with outdoor seating and a grill (summertime).

The apartment is located near Mariatorget, with restaurants, cafés, shops, and public transport within walking distance. The street itself is quiet.

listings.area_description:
Our apartment is located on Hornsgatan, right by Mariatorget, in one of Stockholm’s most sought-after neighborhoods. Hornsgatan is part of the Slow Fashion District, which has been featured in Time Magazine. The area is brimming with restaurants, cafés, unique boutiques, and green parks. Just a short walk away, you’ll find Monteliusvägen, a picturesque walkway offering breathtaking views of Stockholm’s waterways and skyline.

listings.title: Jenny & Stefan's apartment
listings.description:
Welcome to this bright apartment built in 1912. The apartment has recently undergone an extensive and careful renovation with preserved original floors, stucco, high original windows and built-in kitchen.
The apartment has a large and spacious living room and two bedrooms facing a quiet courtyard. Renovated bathroom with Swedish charcoal marble, underfloor heating, shower and washing machine. The apartment also has a guest toilet for maximum comfort.
listings.area_description: The house is a beautiful Art Nouveau building located in the corner of Östgötagatan and Tjärhovsgatan one of Södermalm's best locations. Södermalm - also called Söder - has developed into one of Stockholm's hottest neighborhoods. The atmosphere is relaxed, creative and trendy, and the neighborhood offers a myriad of vintage, fashion and design shops.
listings.other_notes: In addition to smaller boutiques and galleries there is an abundance of places to eat and drink. Many of the places are located in style-conscious SoFo (South of Folkungagatan), Hornstull and Mariatorget. Söder also has many parks and breathtaking panoramic views of Stockholm. Two of the best viewpo

details.full_description:
Welcome to this bright apartment built in 1912. The apartment has recently undergone an extensive and careful renovation with preserved original floors, stucco, high original windows and built-in kitchen.
The apartment has a large and spacious living room and two bedrooms facing a quiet courtyard. Renovated bathroom with Swedish charcoal marble, underfloor heating, shower and washing machine. The apartment also has a guest toilet for maximum comfort.
details.full_area_description: The house is a beautiful Art Nouveau building located in the corner of Östgötagatan and Tjärhovsgatan one of Södermalm's best locations. Södermalm - also called Söder - has developed into one of Stockholm's hottest neighborhoods. The atmosphere is relaxed, creative and trendy, and the neighborhood offers a myriad of vintage, fashion and design shops.
details.full_other: In addition to smaller boutiques and galleries there is an abundance of places to eat and drink. Many of the places are located in style-conscious SoFo (South of Folkungagatan), Hornstull and Mariatorget. Söder also has many parks and breathtaking panoramic views of Stockholm. Two of the best viewpoints are Fjällgatan and Monteliusvägen.

details.full_description: Our home is centrally located on Kungsholmen, next to Stockholm’s main police station. The building dates back to the early 1900s, and while the apartment is fully modernized, you’ll still appreciate classic features like high ceilings (3.3 meters) and large, beautiful windows that fill the space with light.
details.full_area_description: Experience the best of Stockholm from our apartment on Kungsholmen — right in the heart of the city, with shopping, bars, restaurants, and cozy ice cream spots just around the corner. At the same time, you can easily enjoy the relaxed local vibe, for example by going for a swim or spending time in one of the nearby parks like Kronobergsparken or Rålambshovsparken, offering great playgrounds for kids or why not a game of basketball for the whole family (we’ve got the basketball).
details.full_other:
The apartment is ideal for a family of four. There are also two extra floor mattresses available if needed. 
The main bedroom has a 180 cm wide double bed and an en-suite bathroom. Note that the shower is only accessible through the main bedroom, which might not be ideal if you’re traveling as a group. There’s also a separate WC (without shower) next to the children’s rooms.

In the kids two separate rooms there is a 90 cm wide bed and in the other room the bed is on a cozy loft reached by the stairs shown in one of the photos. That bed is 120 cm wide.

OBS! Additional information for 2026: the building currently have some scaffolding up (seen in the pictures) as two floors have been added. However, main constructions are done and the plan is for the scaffolding to be removed during the spring.

details.full_area_description:
Kungsholmen is a calm and family-friendly island in central Stockholm. Just a few minutes away you’ll find beautiful waterfront promenades along Lake Mälaren, perfect for walks, runs, or bike rides. The nearby Hornsbergs Strand area has a lively boardwalk with cafés, restaurants, swimming spots, and great playgrounds for children.

The neighbourhood is safe, green, and very convenient for families, with grocery stores, bakeries, parks, and playgrounds all within walking distance. Stockholm’s city center and the historic Old Town (Gamla Stan) are only about 10–15 minutes away by metro, bus, or bike.

calendar.summary: 8 booked periods, 7 other (AVAILABLE, AVAILABLE, AVAILABLE, AVAILABLE, AVAILABLE, AVAILABLE, AVAILABLE)

details.full_description:
The apartment is very bright, quiet and modern and is part of a pleasant small condo built in 2003. It’s situated just a few hundred meters from Lake Mälaren and has a nice sea view from the balcony which is optionally glassed-in on windy or chilly days, or completely open when the weather is warm and nice.

Stockholm City is by one half-hour nice walk along the lake from the property.

The entrance is comfortable and welcoming with a sober dark floor tile.

To the right is the main bathroom with shower, underfloor heating, towel warmer, towel cabinets, and a washing machine, and a tumbler.

To the left of the entrance is one of the bedrooms where our son sleeps today. In the room, which has a view towards the yard of the condo, there's one three quarter (120 cm) bed, a desk, and three wardrobes. There's also a tv-set and a connected PS4. 

Next to the bedroom and the entrance is the living room with pleasant oiled oak parquet as in the bedrooms and the kitchen. There are large windows facing the yard of the condo, a dining table for up to ten people, a modern couch, a Samsung 46" Smart 3D LED-TV with a connected Apple TV 4k, and a piano.

A window door leads to the balcony which is facing the yard and can be used almost all year round, using the glassed-in option when needed.

From the living room a wide opening leads to the well equipped kitchen with fridge, freezer, a six burner induction cooktop, microwave, and dishwasher. The windows are facing the street and there’s a large bar table where four persons can eat.

From the living room you also reach the second bedroom with a comfortable king size (180 cm) bed in natural materials and a large window facing the balcony.

Next to the bedroom is a second bathroom with shower and underfloor heating.

After the bathroom and next to the kitchen is the third bedroom where our daughter sleeps today. In the room, which faces the street, there's a three quarter (120 cm) bed, a desk, and a wardrobe. 

There’s wireless high speed internet in the apartment and a hifi sound system.
details.full_area_description:
The apartment is situated a few hundred meters from Lake Mälaren in a very quiet and green neighborhood. Stockholm City is by one half-hour nice walk along the lake from the property.

Walking the other direction immediately leads to a nature trail with rocks next to the lake, suited for sun bathing, picnics and a swim in the lake on warm days.

There’s also a place for renting canoes by the hour.

Right outside the front door there’s a bus stop for bus number one which brings you to the city in ten minutes, around the clock (bus number 91 at night). You pay for the bus by tapping your bank card.

Across the street you'll find a sports center with gym and swimming pool, open seven days a week. 

A few blocks away there’s a well-stocked supermarket, bank, pharmacy, wine shop, and other services.

The Stockholm area is rich of culture, museums, theatre, restaurants, night life, and vast areas of nature with trails in the forest only a few minutes from the town.

Just an hour away by bus, by car or by ferry is the beautiful Stockholm archipelago with tens of thousands of small islands, many of which are uninhabited.

Winter time there are lots of tracks for cross country skiing and even a couple of small slopes equipped with ski lifts for downhill skiing and snow boarding. Most years there are also good possibilities to go ice-skating on the lakes around Stockholm at winter.
details.full_other:
The apartment is strictly non-smoking, including the balcony. Pets are not permitted, and we kindly ask that you refrain from wearing shoes indoors. 

We normally charge a cleaning fee of €80. However, if we’re unable to arrange cleaning, we kindly ask our guests to clean the apartment before leaving.

During the summer months (June–August), we normally require a minimum stay of 7 days.

Please also note that smoking is not allowed in public spaces in Sweden. This goes for all indoor spaces and also many outdoor spaces such as close to public transportation, at bus stops, on restaurant terraces, at playgrounds, in entrance areas, at sports camps etc. The ban also includes e-cigarettes.

details.full_area_description:
The house used to belong to the church opposite the apt. It is part of an old cultural heritage. Our house as well as most of the houses surrounding it dates back to 1700. 

The area is quite unique with a Paris Montmartre feel but without the herds of tourists although there are quite a few tourist walks in the area. If you want to experience part of the old Swedish architectural heritage this area will be on your list.

It is nice and quiet still in the middle of the most vivid part of Stockholm.

Södermalm is home to a multitude of unusual, interesting and contemporary boutiques for fashion, design, interior décor, vintage merchandise and curios. In general the selection on Södermalm is trendy, young, fashion forward and creative. 

Söder is also home of the caracters in Stieg Larsson’s novels The Millennium. You can see the house where Lisbeth Salander lived from our house!

The Old town is walking distance, a stroll along the waterfront takes you to the Royal Palace. From the Old town you may take a ferry to many interesting sights such as The Vasa museum, Skansen outdoor museum, Thielska, and ABBA The Museum.

There are several grocery stores including health food stores, farmers market, restaurants from luxury to local joints, vegan, vegetarian, high street cooking, swedish meatballs, french galettes, pubs and bars, quaint little artistic shops, as well as shopping gallerias all around the corner.
details.full_other: Enjoy the view, the ambience, and the awarded private green garden in our home, very quiet but still in the city centre.

details.full_description:
The apartment is 150 m2 and is on the second floor of a stunning turn-of-the-century building with preserved original details such as very high ornamented ceilings, double doors between rooms and beautiful chevron wood floors. The flat has two bedrooms next to each other, a very large living room connected to the dining room through a sliding door, a third bedroom with a king size double bed, kitchen, a full bathroom and a guest toilette. There are also two balconies, one against the street with afternoon sun and a smaller one viewing the inner patio (morning sun).

The apartment is a corner apartment full with natural light from the many tall windows. It also has a fantastic view of the Gustav Vasa Church which is just across the street.

The location is one of the best in the city. In the heart of Vasastan which nowadays is considered the hottest and trendiest neighborhood. Also very central just a few meters away from Odenplan (plaza), one of the most important connection hubs of the city, including a metro and train station and it is only about 10 min walk from the central station with transit to the airport. The neighborhood has the perfect balance between an amazing city life and family/community feeling. This is in part because of the beautiful and very popular Vasaparken, considered one of the best parks in the city. This was also the neighborhood of Astrid Lindgren and many of her books take place in the area.

In summary, it is not easy to find such a beautiful and large apartment so central in Stockholm. You will love it!
details.full_area_description:
Our home is located at the heart of Vasastan bourough, which is known for its nice atmosphere and great variety of restaurants and coffee shops. Our favorite restaurant is called Flippin Burgers and is at a 3 mins walk from our home and is considered to have the best burgers in Stockholm. 
Our building is situated almost in front of the plaza Odenplan and from there you can connect to practically every part of the city. Our street is called Odengatan and is the typical shopping street with wide sidewalks with many restaurants, cafes and stores.
In spite of having a fantastic city life you still get a neighborhood feeling in part thanks to the amazing park (Vasaparken) which is just 50 m away from our doorstep. The park is very big and has a large playground for kids, football fields, green areas, etc.
details.full_other:
Building from 1901 with typical details such as high ceilings and window bays.
Neighborhood feeling with everything at hand from stores to trendy restaurants.
About 50 mts away from one of the best parks in Stockholm.

details.full_description:
Our home is a spacious and light-filled apartment in a beautiful turn-of-the-century building in Södermalm, one of Stockholm’s most vibrant and creative neighborhoods. With high ceilings, original wooden floors, and a charming decorative tile stove, it combines historic character with modern comfort.

The apartment has three bedrooms, a cozy kitchen perfect for shared meals, and a welcoming living room where you can relax after exploring the city. There’s also a small balcony where you can enjoy your morning coffee or the evening sun. It’s ideal for couples, families, or anyone looking for a comfortable and inspiring stay in Stockholm.

We’ve designed our home to be both functional and warm, with space to unwind, play, and connect. It’s family-friendly, quiet, and close to everything—parks, cafés, restaurants, and public transport.
details.full_area_description:
Our home is located in Södermalm, one of Stockholm’s most lively and creative neighborhoods. It’s known for its unique mix of bohemian charm, cultural venues, independent shops, and a thriving restaurant and café scene. You’ll find cozy bakeries, vintage boutiques, art galleries, and record stores just a short walk away.

Despite its urban buzz, Södermalm also offers easy access to nature. There are several beautiful parks nearby—perfect for picnics or walks with a view over the water—and you’re never far from a place to swim or watch the sunset.

Public transport is excellent, with both metro and bus stops close by, making it easy to explore the rest of Stockholm. The historic Old Town (Gamla stan), city center, museums, and the archipelago are all within easy reach.

Whether you're looking for a quiet stroll, a cultural outing, or a trendy dinner spot, our neighborhood has it all.

details.full_description:
We live in a very spacious modern apartment with two large sunny balconies, three bathrooms and four bedrooms. The house was built in 2006 and has a large nice courtyard with greenery, children's playground, barbecue and outdoor furniture.

The location is central, yet quiet, with walking distance to the city center (30 minutes) and very good transport links - only five minutes to the heart of Stockholm city by subway 50 meters from house. We live close to parks, walking trails along the water, fun playgrounds and swimming as well as shopping, bars, cafés and restaurants.

Our apartment is fully furnished and equipped. Double 180x210 cm, single 105x200 and 90x200 cm and bunk bed in standard sizes. Two of the bathrooms have both washer and dryer. Parking space in the house. There are several restaurants and a small grocery shop in the same building.
details.full_area_description:
Kungsholmen, our part of the city, is primarily a residential island, where you'll have a great opportunity to mix with the locals. Lots of good restaurants, bars, and cafés are found here. Kungsholmen is also home to the most prominent building of the Stockholm skyline, the City Hall.

The walk along the sea side Norrmälarstrand offers unparalleled views of Södermalm and boats sailing on the lake. You can stroll around the whole island along the water, which is a popular track for locals. It is often either finished or started with a brunch in one of the many cafés in the area.

During summer, there are several nice places to go for a swim on the island, for instance in the big green area of Rålambshovsparken and especially at the new beach life hot spot Hornsbergs strand. For a truly exotic experience, try a swim from the rocks of Fredhällsbadet.
details.full_other:
Stockholm is a beautiful city with lots of things to do for adults as well as kids and youths. The archipelago is wonderful and there are nice attractions, museums, shopping, cafes and restaurants. The part where we live is called Kungsholmen and is one of the islands that Stockholm is built upon. It is central but yet quiet and cosy - a perfect place for a vacation in the capitol of Sweden at any time of the year. 

www.visitstockholm.com

We are open for suggestions on exchanges but timewise July is our major preferred month. (School starts in the middle of August in Sweden.)

details.full_description:
We live in an artistic and light-filled penthouse apartment in central Stockholm in the trendy SoFo district surrounded with the best Stockholm has to offer: great restaurants, fika places and cafes, specialty boutiques, gardens, wine bars, as well as greenery in one of Stockholm's most culture filled parks (theatre, outdoor concerts, 18th century cottages). The apartment has five rooms and two bathrooms. There is also a gorgeous large shared sun terrace with flowers, tables and greenery half a staircase down. The kitchen is spacious with everything you could possibly need. Windows throughout and facing several directions, with a fantastic view over Stockholm skyline as well as the luscious greenery of one of the largest parks in Stockholm right when you step out the door.

We have wifi, dishwashing machine, washing machine for clothes. Grocery stores and fika places nearby. Super safe neighborhood. Walking distance and buses, metro and boat to other parts of the city right by.

details.full_description:
Welcome to our cozy city apartment in the cultural and green neighborhood of Södermalm, a short walk to the city center of Stockholm. The best location just a block from great shopping and trendy restaurants - you will be in a quiet apartment in the middle of vibrant city life. The metro and busstops are around the corner. 

The apartment is spacious with high ceilings and with a well cured scandinavian interior. It has been completely remodeled and decorated with a new kitchen 2020. 
There is a quiet inner yard where you can have some quiet time and also let the kids play if you don't feel like taking a walk to one of the nearby parks. The building is from year 1894 and the whole apartment has a Victorian feeling that makes it even more special.

The kitchen is where we spend a lot of time as we love to cook and we we have all the utensils you might need to make a nice dinner after a day exploring the city.
There are three bedrooms. Bedroom 1 which is the master bedroom has a kingsize bed. Bedroom 2 and 3 has a single beds.  Bedroom 3 is also a great kids room as we do have a lot of toys, a wall bar and even roman rings if you feel acrobatic.
Our bathroom has a nice hottub and we also provide you with towels. We also have a guest bathroom.
We have a cozy patio (with afternoon/evening sun)where you can enjoy great views of the green inner yard while sipping your Chardonnay :)

As we have children we can provide you with all kids amenities required such as  highchair, stroller and a LOT of toys. Just make sure to request it upon your arrival.
We also have PS4, Netflix and a highspeed wi-fi internet for rainier days :)

As our neighborhood and the city of Stockholm is nice to explore by bike (or by foot) we also provide 2 adult bikes if you would like.

Hopefully you will enjoy our family home and take care of it, as we'll surely do with yours!
details.full_area_description:
Södermalm is (if you ask us) the nicest neigbourhood in Stockholm. A lot of green parks, nice places to swim, cool restaurants and shops. You can find whatever your looking for without ever leaving Södermalm (although the central station is no more than 5 minutes away with the metro ) Lots of restaurants, cafes, pubs and bars to explore and the area is also burstling with cultural events. Just a couple minute walk away you reach the top of Skinnarviks berget, the highest hill in Stockholm city, from where you have the absolute best panoramic view over Stockholm, it's magic to watch the sunset from there. 
We would like to name some of the gems and our favorites places to visit in our neighbourhood. 
One of the best coffeshops in the world according to The Telegraph is just a couple of blocks away named Johan & Nyström, and believe us-it´s great!
Further down our street you find some really nice design clothes in shops like NittyGritty and A.P.C. You also find the yummiest food at Delikatessen Bistro, they serve lovely french-inspired food in a lovely atmosphere.
In summertime a great tips is to  take a culinary adventure and visit the weekend flea market at Horntulls strand with their popular food trucks.
We also need to mention that the Hotel Rival also houses its own theatre, restaurant, bars and café. Like Södermalm in miniature! The hotel, located on the beautiful square Mariatorget (a block away from the apartment) is just a 10 minute walk from the historic Gamla Stan and ferries to Djurgården, is the perfect place to enjoy a brunch if you wish to both explore the main tourist sites as well as get a feel of the authentic vibe of Södermalm

So enjoy "Söder" and the rest our beautiful capital city and feel free to ask us more about places of interest, we will happily give you all the info you might need to make your stay the best!
details.full_other:
It´s spacy, modern and cozy and located in the best area in Stockholm, Södermalm
Close to many great restaurants and shops, you can walk!
Next to the metro and 5 minutes to the central station,Gamla stan and the royal castle.

details.full_area_description:
We live in Östermalm, a quiet, posh area very centrally located. All major attractions in Stockholm are either in walking distance or a short bike/boat/bus ride away. One of the best parks (with a big playground and a small football pitch open for the public) in Stockholm 100 meters from the apartment. Bus line that takes you to Old Town 50 meters from the door step. Bikes included. A great place to stay if you visit Stockholm with your family - Playstation 5 in the teen age room ;-). Total space 115 m2. Additional studio apartment in the same building available on request (45 m2).

Restaurants, bars and grocery stores are around the corner. Two small cinemas across the street.  If it is getting hot, there are is a small lake side beach 2 km away. The forrest with mountain bike, running and walking paths are 800-1000 m away.

The streets are lined with everything from Swedish design shops to quirky record stores and natural wine bars, giving the area a distinctly local, lived-in feel.

Yet the environment around the apartement building from 1935 is quiet. The balcony is facing a green courtyard where you actually both see a lot of birds and here them singing.

The courtyard

I also have access to a rooftop terrace with a stunning view of the inner city of Stockholm.

details.full_area_description:
Södermalm, often shortened to just Söder, is the southern district of Stockholm City Centre.
You’ll find most of the Stockholm trendsetters and hipsters on the Södermalm island, though in a city as hip and cool as Stockholm, you’d be hard-pressed to find an area lacking in lattes and bearded boys. Just 5 min walk from our place you have an amazing panoramic view over Stockholm at Fjällgatan. 
Södermalm is the home to Stockholm’s most trendy fashion boutiques, vintage stores, barbershops and great restaurants, this is clearly Stockholm’s hipster neighborhood. Located just south of Folkungagatan street (that’s where the district gets its name SoFo) on the eastern side of Södermalm island, the district is just a short walk from the city’s public transportation . SoFo, you’ll find cafés that also sell clothes, vintage clothing stores with in-house barbers or even hotels that sell their furniture—nothing is ever just one thing in SoFo! In particular, the area around Nytorget park has many great restaurants and shops, plus it’s the place for people-watching during the summer months. 
Around Mariatorget (12 min walk from our apartment) there are many shops and restaurants along Hornsgatan. For another incredible (and free!) panoramic view over the Stockholm skyline, walk just 5 minutes up Blecktornsgränd street at the northern edge of Mariatorget square.
Stockholm Old Town "Gamla Stan" — area of Stockholm is also the most touristic and is a 15 min walk from our place. The old town is the most picturesque if medieval, cobblestoned streets are your thing. It’s the site of most tourist attractions in the city, including the Royal Palace, the Stockholm Cathedral and the Nobel Museum. Many of the pedestrian streets are full of shops selling bric-a-brac and lots of touristic items like postcards and silly souvenirs.
details.full_other: We have a cat so even if the place is really clean when you arrive it might not be suitable for persons with cat allergy

listings.title: Family flat in the heart of Stockholm

You will also find two children's playgrounds less than five minutes' walk from the appartement,  including the very funny one in Humlegården park.

details.full_description:
Welcome to our apartment off the tourist beat, but very central in Stockholm, and with a feel of Paris!

We moved here from a house in a sea-side suburb not that long ago, and simply love the area for its access to water (Norr Mälarstrand), its city-yet-quiet vibe, closeness to the main parts of Stockholm, and proximity to services. 

The flat has three bedrooms with tiled stoves, a central social area and a large family kitchen, and a west-facing balcony and is well equipped for any but the most extravagant occasions (if you seek that, we would recommend the Nobel dinner in Stadshuset nearby).
details.full_area_description:
The apartment is situated on a section of the street with restaurants (Asian-fusion, Bengalese, Lebanese, French), wine-bars, a coffee place and a bakery, and just 100 meters from Kungsholmstorg with supermarket with deli dish, a wine/beer/spirit store and an off license.

Further down Kungsholmstorg, you arrive at Norr Mälarstrand, the lakeside area which is quickly becoming the go-to summer area for Stockholm locals with lots of (more!) restaurants and bars, swimming areas and so on. There are several family swimming areas also in (slightly longer) walking distance.

The tube station is around the corner, but you barely need it, because walking to the main attractions in Old Town is probably quicker. The central train station is also an easy promenade from the flat.
details.full_other:
For information: two bathrooms with WC but only one with shower/bathtub. 

Situated on the 2nd floor (considered the 'ideal' floor when the house was built in early 1900s) with an older elevator with limited width. 

Inquire for potential access to street parking (depending on where we are/what we are doing, street parking should usually be doable), e-bikes, kite-surfing etc etc.

The main bedroom (first bedroom pictures) and the other large bedroom (second picture) face the street which does have a little bit of city noise. The third bedroom faces a quiet yard. All bedrooms have good blinds and curtains to make it dark. 

The flat is dependent on weather in the sense that it gets warm when it is hot outside. Keep a good draft through it and it stays decent; we have supplemental fans in needed.

High-quality wireless audio system and home cinema. 250Mbit internet/mesh wifi.

The flat is situated in one of the most popular areas in Stockholm - Södermalm. In the area there are lots of restaurants and cosy coffee shops as well as parks. There are nice walks by the water, as Södermalm actually is an island, and walking distance to Old Town. There is also walking distance to the boats that take you out to the archipelago of Stockholm and to Finland.
The flat is very close to metro, buses and trains to take you around the city and recreation areas close by. 30 minuts to International Airport, Arlanda.

details.place: City of Palma de Mallorca, Spanien
City of New York, Amerikas Förenta Stater

details.full_description:
Welcome to our newly renovated (2025), spacious and cozy 4-bedroom apartment in the heart of Stockholm!
Our home combines modern comfort with clean Scandinavian design — bright open spaces, high ceilings, and stylish details throughout.

The apartment is fully furnished and equipped, featuring a modern kitchen, two bathrooms, and a sunny balcony perfect for morning coffee or evening drinks. The layout includes a master bedroom with a large 185x200 cm bed, a second bedroom with a 120x200 cm single bed, and a third bedroom with a 90x200 cm loft bed. The fourth room includes a loft bed (90x200)and serves as a flexible guest room or home office.

In the larger bathroom, you’ll find both a bathtub and a separate shower, while the second bathroom offers added convenience. A washer and dryer are available in the recently renovated laundry room in the basement of the building.

Located in a quiet yet central neighborhood, you’ll be within walking distance of cafés, restaurants, parks, and excellent public transport connections — just minutes away from Stockholm’s Old Town, Södermalm, and Djurgården.

Perfect for families or couples who want to experience the best of the Scandinavian capital while enjoying all the comforts of home.
details.full_area_description:
Our apartment is located on the beautiful island of Kungsholmen, in the vibrant area of Fridhemsplan — one of the major hubs in central Stockholm. Here you’ll find everything you need right at your doorstep. Metro lines and several bus routes are literally around the corner, and the airport coach stop is just one block away, making it easy to explore the city or reach the airport.

It’s a safe and lively neighborhood with a wide range of restaurants, cafés, bars, and shops within a five-minute walk — and there’s even a 7-Eleven in the building for your convenience.

Families will appreciate the nearby public playgrounds and the scenic waterfront promenade along Norr Mälarstrand, where you can enjoy peaceful walks by the water leading all the way to Stockholm’s majestic City Hall (Stadshuset) — one of the city’s most iconic landmarks.

Just a few minutes away, the large green park Rålambshovsparken offers perfect picnic spots, outdoor cafés, and a small urban beach. For those who enjoy sports, there are areas for beach volleyball, basketball, and a popular skate park.

From Kungsholmen, you’re also within easy reach of Stockholm’s main attractions — explore the cobbled streets of the Old Town (Gamla Stan), the lively restaurants of Södermalm, or the museums and beautiful nature of Djurgården — all just minutes away by metro, bus, or bike.
details.full_other:
We have completed one home exchange so far and truly loved the experience — we’re very keen to continue exploring the world this way. We usually travel abroad at least twice a year and are excited to discover new destinations through home exchange.

We prefer simultaneous exchanges, but we’re also open to non-simultaneous arrangements — especially during summer, since we often spend June to August at our second home in Sweden.

All parts of Europe are of interest to us, as long as the home suits a family and offers swimming opportunities nearby — whether it’s a pool, a lake, or the sea.

We also dream of exchanging homes in North America, particularly in the USA (New York, Los Angeles, Chicago, San Francisco, or Florida) and Canada.

We’re a responsible, travel-loving family and will take excellent care of your home — just as we hope you’ll enjoy ours here in Stockholm.

details.full_description:
Our home is a cosy and spacious townhouse apartment with own entrance at the front and direct access to a children friendly shared inner courtyard with garden furniture at the back. Our 109 m2 apartment is welcoming with a social, open-space kitchen-livingroom part on ground floor and 3 bedrooms offering six comfortable sleeping accomodations. Our modern kitchen is fully equipped with stove, oven, dishwasher, fridge, freezer, cook- and tableware for up to 12 persons. 

We love our bright and welcoming townhouse appartment because it is close to everything. Within 15 minutes public transport distance you reach the city center with shopping, dining, cultural events, museums, the royal castle and the ancient city gamla stan but are only a 10 minutes walk from the city's foremost recreational area the royal national city park where you can take a jogging tour or go bathing at sandy beaches.
details.full_area_description:
In our direct urban neighbourhood you will find everything you need within 5 min walking distance: a local supermarket and lots of restaurants (from budget to fine dining). 

It takes you also only a 5 min walk to different bus, metro and commuter train stations towards loads of attractive locations: the city center (10 min), the ancient town Gamla Stan (12 min), royal Djurgården with the famous Vasa museum the open air museum Skansen and Stockholms amusement park Gröna Lund (20 min), Stockholm archipelago (50 min), Stockholms large event-arenas "Globen" (30 min) and "Friends Arena", the exclusive "Mall of Scandinavia" (10 min) and you reach Arlanda airport with a 40 min bus ride.

Our lovely home offers a perfect combination of metropolitan area being only a stone's throw away from Stockholm's most well-visited recreational area Hagaparken, part of the royal national city park (www.nationalstadsparken.se/default.aspx?id=1777) where you will find children-friendly sandy beaches (www.badkartan.se/046763/Brunnsviksbadet), jogging-paths, garden-cafés, a kayak-rental, the Bergianska botanical garden (www.bergianska.se/english/) and the museum of natural history (www.nrm.se/en/16.html).
details.full_other:
Welcoming spacious townhouse appartment in urban environment in central Stockholm 
Walking distance to Hagaparken with children-friendly sandy beach, kayak rental and garden cafés
Close to restaurants, Stockholm city center, shopping centers, cultural events, touristic attractions and direct bus to Vaxholm, the capital of the archipellago

listings.other_notes:

Stockholm is built on 14 islands, and we live on the island

details.full_description:
Not available for guest points - only reciprocal exchange.

Magnus' 112 sqm (1299 sq feet) modern apartment is perfectly situated for anyone who wishes to experience Stockholm, but still have the chance to get away from the hustle and bustle of the city. The address is smack in the middle of downtown Stockholm, but the surrounding area is very quiet. 10 minute walk to the City Hall. Three minute walk to the subway and major bus lines.

Stockholm is built on 14 islands, and we live on the island of Kungsholmen. Running around the island is a 9k run, along the waterfront. You'll meet a lot of other runners, enjoying the same route. This is a run I make several times a week, so I know it very well. You'll be at the waterfront two minutes after leaving the apartment.

The apartment is fully equipped with dishwasher, washing machine, big flat screen TV, PS3, XBox and high-speed WiFi.

Transportation: Subway and major bus lines (Line 1 & 4) are just across the street, reaching the Old Town or the City Center in under 10 minutes.

Parks & Play: You are minutes away from Kronobergsparken and the famous Rålambshovsparken, which features one of the city's best playgrounds and a sandy beach at Smedsuddsbadet.

Convenience: All major supermarkets (ICA, Coop, Lidl) and Västermalmsgallerian mall are right around the corner for easy grocery shopping.

Public transit, waterfront walking paths, restaurants, grocery stores, cafes and shops are all within a 5 minute walk. Despite the city amenities, we are also located at the edge of a large nature reserve with a small ski hill, swimming lakes, communal gardens and many kilometres of forest trails to explore.

listings.title: Cozy apartment on Stockholm’s doorstep

Welcome to our home in Stockholm! Our bright, spacious apartment is our little oasis in the city — and we’re excited to share it with you.

One of our favorite spots are our two glassed-in balconies, which we enjoy all year round — whether it’s sunny summer breakfasts or cozy winter evenings with a blanket and a book. The larger balcony gets tons of afternoon sun and is perfect for grilling and lounging in the warmer months.

Inside, the apartment has a modern, fully equipped kitchen, two bathro

Our apartment is only a few minutes’ walk from Solna Centrum, where you’ll find a subway stop, plenty of local buses, and the Tvärbanan (light rail line), making it super easy to get around (it also only takes around 30min to get to the airport by car, or 1h by public transport from here!).

details.full_description:
Ett underbart boende mitt i Vasastan.
Lägenheten ligger i en vacker byggnad från sent 1800-tal, vars charm kombineras med modern komfort. Trots det centrala läget är det lugnt och stilla tack vare högt läge och välisolerade fönster – här känner man sig hemma direkt.

Det är generöst tilltaget i takhöjd med ett fantastiskt ljusinsläpp. Lägenheten erbjuder stora sociala ytor för umgänge och avkoppling, samtidigt som det finns tre rymliga sovrum där man kan dra sig tillbaka i lugn och ro.
details.full_area_description: Vasastan är en av Stockholms mest levande och intressanta stadsdelar. Här finns allt man kan önska: butiker, caféer, barer, restauranger, parker och utmärkta kommunikationer.

listings.area_description: Our flat is near a metro station, allowing for easy access to the entire inner Stockholm. In addition, it is within walking distance to the rest of Södermalm and to Gamla stan.

Gamla stan is located on a small island so the sea is always present. During summer you can take the family for a swim at Riddarholmskajen only 5 minutes walk from the apartment.
details.full_area_description: Gamla Stan is one of Europe's largest and best-preserved medieval city centers and one of Stockholm's main attractions.  In the area there are several well-known sights such as Stockholm Palace, Storkyrkan, Riddarholm Church, Nobel Prize Museum, the Government building, Gustav III Statue, German Church, Mårten Trotzig's alley, etc. It was here that Stockholm was founded in 1252. Gamla stan also houses many of Stockholm's finest restaurants and bars. Since Gamla stan is the center of Stockholm you can walk or easily take public transportation to all places in the city.

details.full_description:
We love our home and hope you will too! It is a unique and stylish (160 sq.m) four-storey 18th century town house on a quiet street in a very central location in Stockholm. Although it is right in the city centre the area is very quiet and peaceful. 
On the ground floor you find the entrance hall with a small restroom. 
On the first floor there is a lovely newly renovated kitchen, a dining area with a fireplace as well as a comfortable living room, also with a cosy fireplace. 
On the second floor there is a dining room, a master bedroom with a luxurious king size double bed and a newly renovated bathroom. 
On the top floor there are three children’s bedrooms, two with single beds and one with a bunk bed.
Outside our front door is a small cobbled patio with beautiful plants, chairs and tables that we share with our friendly neighbours.
details.full_area_description:
We live in the charming area Södermalm in the very heart of Stockholm. (The area was recently ranked by American Vogue as the world's third coolest neighborhood!) It's an ideal location for exploring everything this great city has to offer. Popular restaurants, bars, cafés, shopping, design and art galleries etc are just around the corner. A couple of the scenes in the film “The Girl With the Dragon Tattoo” (Stieg Larsson’s Millennium Trilogy) was by the way shot in a café in our very street! The beautiful Old City with the royal castle is only a 10-minute walk away and you will find that many other main attractions in Stockholm are also within easy walking distance. 
Walking is by far the best way to get around in this compact capital, known as the “Worlds Smallest Big City” or the “Worlds Biggest Small Town”.  But if you prefer other means of transportation our nearest underground station ”Slussen” is just around the corner. From this point you can go anywhere you want in Stockholm by underground, bus or even by boat – if you plan to explore the beautiful Stockholm archipelago. Strongly recommended!
For hot summer days there is a lovely little beach and a great outdoor pool area right here in Södermalm.

More about Stockholm on: www.visit-stockholm.com

Södermalm in Vogue: www.vogue.com/slideshow/1080625/fifteen-coolest-street-style-neighborhoods
details.full_other:
Perfect central location! 
Beautiful, charming and cozy
High standard

details.full_area_description:
Our apartment is situated on a quiet street just 2 min walk from Mariatorget and the subway. 
In the warm months, Mariatorget Square is a bustling social scene. There are scores of restaurants, cafés and galleries. The blocks are packed with interesting, cool and creative shops specializing in clothing, design, jewelry, knickknacks, vintage and second-hand, houseware, books and magazines, music and much more. Several fashion brands have their own stores in this district. 

Three blocks away you find the biggest park in the area wich also have a little beach. The water in the city of Stockholm is perfectly healthy to swim in, so go for an evening swim if the days are hot. 5 min with the bus you find a small green island with lots of rocky beaches where the lokals gather at summer. 10 min walk or one stop with the metro you find the ferry boats out to the archipelago.
details.full_other: Apartment is in need of new wallpapers and paint, see last pics, but that might not happen before summer. It's however well functioning and clean, I have an heroic cleaning lady.

details.full_area_description:
Vasastaden (often just called “Vasastan”) is a charming and vibrant neighborhood in central Stockholm, Sweden. It blends classic European architecture with a modern, urban lifestyle. Think of it as Stockholm’s version of a quieter, more residential Upper West Side in New York — tree-lined streets, cozy cafes, and a strong sense of community, all just minutes from the city center.

The area is known for its beautiful early 20th-century buildings, wide boulevards, and local parks like Vasaparken, a popular spot for families and picnics in the summer and ice skating in winter. Odenplan, one of the main squares, is a hub of activity with restaurants, boutiques, and excellent public transport connections — including subways and commuter trains.

Vasastan also offers great access to culture. It’s close to the Stockholm Public Library (a landmark building designed by Gunnar Asplund), theaters, and small art galleries. Despite its central location, it maintains a relaxed, livable atmosphere that appeals to both young professionals and families.
details.full_other: For the use of guest points a cleaning fee of 70 euros will be added.

details.full_area_description:
Step outside our door and you’re in one of Stockholm’s most beloved neighborhoods, Södermalm, where creative energy meets laid-back charm. Our street is peaceful and quiet, but just around the corner you’ll find a world of cafés, independent restaurants, vintage shops, design boutiques, and friendly local bars.

The Mariatorget metro station is just a short stroll away, only 3 stops to Central Station and even closer to the storybook charm of Gamla Stan. You can also reach the commuter train at Södra Station in under 10 minutes, connecting you directly to Arlanda Airport.

Within walking distance, you’ll discover Tantolunden park, a local favorite for picnics, jogging, and summer swims in the lake. Stockholm’s crystal-clear water makes city swimming a treat! For even more of the outdoors, hop on a bus or bike and you’ll be on a green island with rocky bathing spots loved by locals.

Södermalm is the perfect base to experience Stockholm, close enough to stroll to historic sights and ferries to the archipelago, yet full of its own treasures: hidden courtyards, street art, record stores, and views over the city that will stop you in your tracks.

If you want a true local experience in the cultural heart of the city, this is the place to be.

details.full_area_description:
Gustavsberg is the capital of the Vämdö Archipelago. If you are interested in culture, arts, design and staying by the ocean - this is the place to go!

It is a charmig small community located 20 km southeast of Stocholm. It offers both the closeness to the archipelago as well as to the Stockholm city with its wide range of attractions for all ages and interests. 

In the summertime many tourists enjoy a day-visit to Gustavsberg by boat.  Within 10 minute walk from our home, a variety of design shops, factory outlets, cafés, museums and restaurants can be found. 

The area we live in has open green areas. The local stable has its horse path right outside our house. Our apartment is situated in a lush and green area. 

Public transportation is very easy to use when going into the heart of the city. The buss-stop is 5 minutes walk away. If you prefer to discover the Archipelago, there are many day trips by boat departing from Gustavsberg and other harbors close by, taking you to beutifull islands.
details.full_other:
Beautiful nature 25 min from the Stockholm city center

details.full_description:

One bedroom with a luxurious 180 cm bed, plus extra sleeping options. Spacious bathroom with tub and washer. Elevator access, fully equipped kitchen, fast Wi-Fi, books, music, coffee, and tea always ready. Sheets and towels included.

A perfect retreat for creatives, dreamers, and those who appreciate the beauty in the details.
details.full_area_description:
Where City Meets Nature – All Year Round

My flat is nestled in Östermalm, one of Stockholm’s most beautiful and walkable neighbourhoods – perfect for a getaway in any season. Just steps from the waters of Strandvägen, lined with boats, cafés and restaurants, and a short stroll to Royal Djurgården – once a royal hunting ground, now a peaceful island of museums, forests, and winding trails.

Whether you come for spring blossoms, summer swims, crisp autumn walks or snowy winter light, the city and nature are always just outside the door.

You’ll live in a stylish, central area with everything you need close by. As a bonus, you’re also welcome to borrow my e-bike, perfect for getting around the city quickly and effortlessly.
listings.area_description: Hagastaden is one of Stockholm’s newest and most vibrant neighborhoods, perfectly combining modern architecture with green spaces. listings.other_notes:

Children's room with comfortable bed, large desk, and plenty of toys.
Lovely balcony for outdoor enjoyment.

Facilities and Amenities:

Fully equipped kitchen (no dishwasher).
High-speed internet connection.
Cable TV and audio system.

listings.title: Scandinavian Mid Century Modernism
listings.description:
My apartment is located in a quiet yet very central part of Vasastan. What makes it unique is the natural light that floods in through the large floor-to-ceiling windows from morning to evening.

This effect is enhanced by the three-meter-high ceilings, the open floor plan, and the light interior design, all intended to create a sense of calm and tranquility.

The apartment features high-end materials and is equipped with all the modern amenities of a newly built home, including soundproofing, u
listings.area_description:
The apartment is located on a quiet and peaceful street in Vasastan, with three parks within a five-minute walk. Here, you’ll have easy access to cozy cafés, restaurants, and charming boutiques. From here, it’s easy to reach different parts of the city, including various attractions and museums. For example, the famous Stockholm Public Library is just a few blocks away.

If you enjoy jogging, you can head out in different directions depending on what you want to experience. On a warm summer day,
listings.other_notes:
Please write your request well in advance if possible, so I can plan accordingly. 

I would kindly request 50 Euros/500 SEK contribution towards the cleaning fee for guest point stay.

listings.title: Madeleine's city apartment
listings.description: Central apartment close to everything you could ever ask for, but still on a calm street with a beautiful view over the city. Social open floor plan and high ceilings with a Scandinavian cozy vibe. A lovely balcony and courtyard(shared) and a newly renovated green kitchen that is the center of the apartment! Perfect if you’re in Stockholm for work!
listings.area_description: Really nice central area with plenty of restaurants, bars and grocery stores within 5-10 min walking distance. Only 10 min to the sea where you can go swimming, walking or running depending on what you prefer. Only 3 min walking to metro that takes 5 minutes to central station.
listings.other_notes: Fast Wi-Fi

listings.title: New 3 room apartment close to both nature and city
listings.description:
We live in a newly built apartment in Gröndal, close to Stockholm city life and it's popular attractions. 
You will enjoy the quiet apartment as well as the green surroundings from our sunny balcony.
listings.area_description:
With 30 minutes from Arlanda airport you can easily get here from all corners of the world, both by car or by bus. Once in place, you can enjoy a swimming lake 2 minutes from our home, or if you prefer jumping from cliffs straight out in Lake Mälaren, it's just as close.

There are plenty of green areas and nice walking paths we would love to recommend. If you want to stay local, there is a well-known café, grocery store and many nice restaurants within walking distance.

With a 10 minute walk y

listings.title: A cozy and comfortable apartment located on the top floor in the heart of Stockholm.
listings.description:
Guests will surely appreciate our cozy and comfortable top floor apartment situated in the heart of Stockholm. It is located in the trendy neighborhood of Södermalm, with convenient access to the subway just around the corner. Within approximately seven minutes, you can reach Stockholm Central, making it an ideal location for exploring the city.

The apartment itself is filled with natural light, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. It is also well-equipped with all the amenities you may nee
listings.area_description: Hornsgatan is a lively street bustling with an array of cafés, restaurants, galleries, charming boutiques, and second-hand shops. Within a convenient 2-minute walk, you can easily access subways and buses, providing excellent transportation options. Just a 5-minute stroll away, you'll discover cozy squares like Mariatorget and Bysistorget, as well as recreational parks such as Tanto, featuring a delightful sandy beach where you can take a refreshing swim. Another nearby option is Skinnarviken, w
listings.other_notes: In consideration of allergies, smoking, strong perfumes, and pets are not allowed.

listings.title: Studio apartment in Hornstull Södermalm
listings.description:
****Please know that from may 2025 and forward this apartment is not an option... I'm relocating! Updated adress and exchange will be sorted once settled in my new home****


Welcome to my charming 24-square-meter studio apartment! Despite its compact size, the high ceilings and well-thought-out floor plan create a spacious feel. The industrial-style decor adds a unique touch, and the garden-facing windows ensure a quiet and calm atmosphere.

As a food and beverage enthusiast, I've equipped the
listings.area_description:
Do you thrive on the vibrant energy of the city and love exploring trendy, edgy, cultural hotspots? Welcome to Hornstull! 

Here, you'll discover secondhand shops, amazing spot for restaurants, local breweries, and live concerts and so on.. My apartment is right by the water, where you can enjoy the view, swimming, park life, and bustling markets. In the winter, the lake outside transforms into an ice-skating wonderland. The apartment do have heated floors.. So cold feet and a warm cup of coffee

listings.title: Stina's appartmnet
listings.description:
Welcome to my cosy apartment, ideal for relaxing while making the most of Stockholm.

The apartment has one bedroom with a 120cm bed. But there is also an 140cm air bed that can be used in the living room.  The kitchen is fully equipped.

The apartment has a l balcony with beautiful views over the river where you can enjoy the sunset during the evenings.
listings.area_description: My apartment is located on Kungsholmen, one of the island of Stockholm's inner city. Stockholm, with views of the water and the beautiful Karlberg Castle. A five minute walk takes you to the subway and several bus lines, as well as grocery shops, restaurants and bars. A 20 minute walk along the riverside takes you to the city center where you can find the main tourist attractions. A 10 minute walk to the other direction you find Hornsberg Strand where you can go for a swim.
listings.other_notes: This used to be my main home, but I now live with my boyfriend.

listings.title: Silvia's apartment
listings.description: Central position, quiet and calm
listings.area_description: Walking distance to main tourist attractions, restaurant, parks, galleries. The apartment is located in the bohemienne Södermalm neighborhood, that is in the heart of Stockholm city.

listings.title: Longer exchanges only! Cozy and stylish apartment in Stockholm
listings.description: My home is really something else, built in 1924 and furnished with stylish mid-century modern furniture. The sleek kitchen and peachy bathroom were both carefully designed by myself, the bed is super comfy and the apartment has windows in both directions of the building, so it gets fantastic light. Walk-in closet, grand piano in bedroom. It's really special, and very dear to me.
listings.area_description: I live in Blecktornsområdet, a hidden gem in SoFo/Skanstull in southern Södermalm. It's one of the nicest areas in all of Stockholm, a lush and green quiet oasis tucked between two parks. Even locals are stunned when they find their way here, I for sure was when I found it 10 years ago.
listings.other_notes: Would love to swap for longer periods of time if possible, I work remotely and love to have ample time to feel at home in a new place. My dates and timings are super flexible, so please reach out directly and we can work something out :)

listings.title: Modern 2 bedroom apartment in cosy and trendy area
listings.description: Our apartment is modern (built in 2013) and bright, yet with a nice and cosy atmosphere. You will find two well separated bedrooms and a generous bathroom with a bathtub, washing machine and dryer. The master bedroom offers a 160 cm double bed, and the smaller bedroom a 120 cm single bed. The kitchen and living room are combined in an open plan, with windows facing three directions and access to a private balcony. We love cooking so the kitchen is well-equipped, and there are chairs and stools f
listings.area_description:
Aspudden is a cosy and trendy part of Stockholm, and is the perfect place to stay for both families and other travellers looking to explore the city of Stockholm, but seeking a calmer place to stay than the innercity.

The apartment building lies at the end of a local road, in a lovely area that is listed as cultural heritage due to its 1940's buildings. Still you're only 500 meters from Aspudden main street. Here you'll find a supermarket, a pharmacy, a bakery (Bonne Femme), a library, a book s
listings.other_notes:
- Pet free apartment (due to allergies)
- Travel crib for babies and toddlers available, as well as a smalll selection of toys and cutlery.
- Travel guide provided
- Linens and towels provided as per agreement

listings.title: Beautiful luxurious penthouse with amazing terraces right by all tourist sites
listings.description: Location: 700 m fantastic walk to the centre of Stockholm with all the shops and 200m to the museum island and National city park Djurgården. You can take a plunge in the Baltic sea 80 steps from the front door, so there can't be a better spot to stay. The penthouse is amazing and our dream home. Vast spaces for social life and cozy bedrooms. Welcome to heaven!

listings.description: With it's size of 31m2 the flat is perfect for a couple or a solo traveller. It has a very comfortable double bed, a sofa and kitchen table that seats four. There is also an inflatable extra bed if needed.  It has a complete kitchen with dishwasher. It has everything you need in order to function as the base for exploring the vibrant city of Stockholm.

The neighborhood of Skanstull has an eclectic mix of boutique shops, cozy cafes, and diverse dining options. With the proximity to Årstaviken and Vitabergsparken, you have plenty of options if you prefer scenic parks and relaxing strolls along the waterfront. Eriksdalsbadet is just around the corner and if you're looking for night life you'll find Trädgården in the same area. There is
