listings.title: Cosy Bright Apartment in Central Stockholm
listings.description:
Step into our warm and welcoming home nestled in Gardet. Start your day on our cosy balcony adorned with lush plants, basking in the morning light - a serene spot for breakfast. Our apartment boasts a modern kitchen complete with top-notch amenities, including a state-of-the-art coffee machine for those perfect morning brews. 
Dive into a realm of entertainment with our Apple TV or indulge in a workout session at our in-building gym. 
Situated on the 2nd floor, with lift access, every corner of
listings.area_description:
We live on the sweet spot of being surrounded by nature while staying at a stone's throw of the city. Well connected to all areas of town, a 10min ride to the city center by public transport or taxi, and 20min walk to both the most elegant area in Stockholm (Östermalm) and the island of the museums (Djurdgarden). 
Two supermarkets in the area and a shopping mall 10min walking distance. Quiet neighbours, and plenty of dogs enjoying green spaces to watch out from a balcony facing the valley.
listings.other_notes: No smoking

listings.title: Heart of Södermalm in Stockholm
listings.description:
We live in a very sunny and beautiful turn of the century flat on Södermalm in Stockholm. High ceilings, generously spaced rooms, especially the living room looking over a football field where you can always go down and play. 

We also have a holiday home at Väddö in Roslagen, the archipelago 1.5 hrs drive from Stockholm. If you would like the best of two worlds.
listings.area_description: The neighborhood, Zinkensdamm is great, close to parks and the ocean but also right around the corner from cosy cafes, restaurants and shops. We buy our weekend coffee at Svedjan who have the best cinnamon rolls in town. We play in the parks of Tantolunden, Drakenbergsparken and around Mariatorget and Hornstull. Södermalm is the coziest part of Stockholm inner city.
listings.other_notes:
We also have a holiday home at Väddö in Roslagen, the archipelago 1.5 hrs drive from Stockholm. If you would like the best of two worlds we could make this available too.
And, a car!
We have a fifth family member, a Labrador called Bobbie. So if you’re extremely allergic maybe this is not the place

listings.title: Spacious flat in Central Stockholm
listings.description: Come stay in our charming modern home in Central Stockholm. The apartment is located in an old building with characteristics from the 1930's on a calm street with only ten minutes walking to one of the busiest hot spots in Stockholm. Near the water (one of my favorites with this apartment - perfect for jogging!) and close to public transport where two out of three metro lines takes you anywhere in the city.
listings.area_description: Kungsholmen is one of the city center islands of Stockholm. Home of the famous Stockholm city hall (host of the yearly Nobel prize dinner), Norr Mälarstrand (that holds spectacular views of Swedens third largest lake Mälaren) and has a wide range of bars, high-end restaurants, clubs and great shopping (my favorites are the many second hand shops with opportunities to find Scandinavian designs at great prices). All of Central Stockholm is accessible by 20 min walk from Fridhemsplan!
listings.other_notes:
For certain dates it's only the guest room that's available (with full access to the whole apartment of course)
For non-reciprocal exchanges there will be a cleaning fee of 600 SEK

Enjoy the fantastic surroundings, and the extreme closeness to the city pulse without being too busy or intense. Or just the fact to be able to dispose a fully equipped house, a rare object so close to the inner city. The house

listings.description: Located on the Top floor of the building with spectacular view over the water and west parts of the Stockholm skyline, you find a modern Nordic designed and spacious home with all nescessary facilities.

Just outside the Stockholm city center you find peace an quite but have all that Stockholm can offer walking or biking distance (or subway in 7 minutes).
listings.other_notes: Access to sauna and relax in the building.

listings.title: Dejan's house
listings.description:
Our Hornstull apartment perfectly blends classic Scandinavian urban living with modern updates.  This charming home, built in the 1940s, offers a comfortable and stylish base for exploring Stockholm.

One of the best things about our location is its proximity to the water.  Enjoy refreshing summer swims, and if you're brave, join the locals for a winter dip! When the ice freezes, the area transforms into a picturesque skating rink.
Getting around is a breeze thanks to excellent public transport
listings.area_description: Located on the hip island of Södermalm in the Hornstull district.
listings.other_notes: To get around the city we usually cycle. Our bicycles will be at your disposal during your stay.

listings.description:

It’s a very green and child-friendly area, but still close to the city and with excellent communications (bus 3 minutes away and subway 10 minutes away). There is a small food store in our block and a big food store 5-10 minutes’ walk from here. 

 In the summer there is an outdoor public swimming pool 5 minutes’ walk from our home. There are many playgrounds nearby and our house is situated on the verge of the Ro
listings.other_notes:
We have the most amazing view over Stockholm!
Our neighbourhood is very quiet and friendly...
...but still within walking distance from downtown.

The apartment is clo

details.full_description:
This is a stylish, cozy, modern, newly renovated and fully equipped boutique apartment with wi-fi located in central Stockholm's most popular "Vasastan" area.

The apartment is located in an ideal central location for sightseeing within walking distance to all sights in central Stockholm, very close to Odenplan, the Stockholm School of Economics, the Royal Institute of Technology, the Stockholm Public Library and the trendy Stureplan, with all of its popular stores and bars. The apartment is close to public transportation, the subway and all main bus lines in the city. A bank and currency exchange office, galleries, a 24-hour 7-Eleven, two grocery stores and several boutiques are within one block from the apartment.  One of Stockholm's largest outdoor swimming pools is a five minute walk from the house. 

Many of the best restaurants, coffee shops and stores of Vasastan are located around the corner as the legendary “Claes på Hörnet”, “Svartengrens” and “Sirap”, which offers one of Stockholm’s best brunches.  Every part of the city is accessible on foot from here within 20 minutes. The airport coach (Flygbussarna) stops only one metro stop away at S:t Eriksplan, and will take you directly to/from Arlanda Airport in 40 minutes!

Brunnsviken with Hagaparken is about a 5 minute walk away, one of Stockholm's best outdoor areas during the summer.

The apartment is fully equipped with furniture and all amenities you need during your stay. It has an open living room with a fully equipped kitchen (hot plates, kitchen stove, washing machine, fridge/freezer as well as all kitchen utilities as plates, cutlery, glasses, pots and pans, water cooker), a large dinner table where you can enjoy meals, a comfortable sofa and large LCD-TV. 

The bedroom has a large single bed (200x120m). An additional sleeping place is available on the couch in the living room (please note it does not fold out and there is no door between rooms). There is an iron and ironing board. Bathroom with shower and bathtub for your usage. Total living area of 35 square meters. Fresh linens, sheets and towels are included.  There is a cleaning fee to be paid before arrival.

The flat is located on the fourth, top floor and receives plenty of natural light. The high ceilings and white interior makes the apartment  feel spacious and relaxing. The large balcony, my favorite place in the spring/summer you can enjoy sun all day, overlooking the inner yard. 

This apartment is mostly suited for a single traveler or a couple. I would be more than happy to show you around the neighborhood and give you tips on sights and restaurants in Stockholm. Please e-mail me a short description about yourself before sending a reservation request so we can discuss further.
details.full_area_description: The apartment is located in an ideal central location for sightseeing within walking distance to all sights in central Stockholm, very close to Odenplan, the Stockholm School of Economics, the Royal Institute of Technology, the Stockholm Public Library and the trendy Stureplan, with all of its popular stores and bars. The apartment is close to public transportation, the subway and all main bus lines in the city. A bank and currency exchange office, galleries, a 24-hour 7-Eleven, two grocery stores and several boutiques are within one block from the apartment.  One of Stockholm's largest outdoor swimming pools and a nice park is are two minute walk from the house.
details.full_other: Wifi, workspace and Netflix included. There is a cleaning fee ($75) for GP exchanges.

details.full_description:
We love our home! A bright apartment in childfriendly hoods in trendy Södermalm (116 sqm). 

We live on the second floor with a view over a quiet street in picturesque quartiers with wooden red cottages and the Sofia church up in the Vitabergsparken. Good communications by bus, metro – or ferry!

3 bedrooms (1 bedroom with a twin bed & 2 bedrooms with 3 children beds). Fully equipped kitchen. Livingroom with a big sunny balcony. Three bathrooms/wc. Washer in the apartment and a fully equipped wash house two floors down. Child friendly playground just outside the kitchen window. A BBQ and a ping-pong table is also avaliable. Our bikes, kick bikes, skate boards and helmets are avaliable for you if you want. 

Our apartment is located right in the beating heart of Stockholm's trendiest area - Södermalm. Great area - a fantastic location surrounded by unique shops, restaurants, bars and sights. Step outside and you are on the bottom of Vitabergsparken, a beautiful park, crossing the road you reach Nytorget and SoFo, the hot spot of Södermalm. Stora Blecktornsparken is a playground –  just 5 minutes from here with goats, sheeps, two pigs and rabbits.

Stockholm is of the most child-friendly European cities full of museums and parks to make it a top destination for little ones.

The archipelago is a perfect summer adventure. Travelling from our apartment is easy. There are plenty of busses, a ferry and subway. Closest underground is Skanstull (two bus stops from here).
details.full_area_description:
Södermalm has a lot to offer. We live on one of Stockholm's most piqtueresque street and up to 15 minutes away from everything worth to see on Södermalm. Lots of restaurants and cafes. Parks and playgrounds in every corner.

To do on Södermalm: Explore the unique streets by bike. Visit Europe's best photographs museum Fotografiska. The art galleries nearby. Or walk the Millennium tour. Open air gyms. Picnic with a view on the mountains of Vita bergsparken. Saturday strolling at Farmers market and pedestrian streets watching people. The summer venue Trädgården, located beneath the bridges by the southern borders of Södermalm. See Stockholm under the bridges via Långholmen Kajak. Play tennis or basket in Lilla Blecktornsparken. Have a Swedish fika. 

Indoor- and outdoor pool: Eriksdalsbadet. Or our closest "plaskdamm" (outdoor public baby pool) in Lilla Blecktornsparken!

Sightings with breathtaking view over Stockholm: Fjällgatan, Fåfängan & Monteliusvägen. 

Unique public playgrounds: Bryggartäppan, Stora Blecktornsparken, Anders Franzens park.

Our best local stores: Acne, Weekday, Farmer's market, Urban deli, Le Labo, ATP Atelier, Marimekko, Grandpa, Stutterheim, Swedish Hasbeens. 

Our fav bars, cafes and restaurants near by: Bar Agrikultur, Stikki Nikki, Shanti Gossip, Bleck, Babylon, Vina, Urban Deli, Älskade traditioner, Trädgården, Bananas, Gelato Caput Mundi, Pom & Flora, Café Pascal, Fotografiska, Teatern foodcourt etc.

https://www.visitstockholm.com/guides/see-the-sights-of-sodermalm/

https://www.visitstockholm.com/search/?area=s%C3%B6dermalm
details.full_other:
Child friendly hoods close to beautiful parks
Our quiet street in picturesque quartiers
Stockholm is a fantastic city for kids

listings.title: Central flat in Stockholm
listings.description:
We do not host any guests at the moment. 

Our flat is built in 2012 in Hammarby Sjöstad – a beautiful part of central Stockholm built on the waterfront, with world renown for its architecture. Staying here you are close to everything – the water (around the corner), city nightlife, shopping, nature and the most popular tourist attractions.  The flat has three bedrooms and two bathrooms and can accommodate 6 people. Fully equipped kitchen, wi-fi, cable tv and access to washing machines + parking
listings.area_description: The neighbourhood was developed in the late 1990's. It used to be an abandoned harbour and industrial area but it was turned into a residential area. it was supposed to host the athletes village when Stockholm bid to host the Olympic Games in 2004, but the bid failed and tenants could move in earlier. It is built on the waterfront so water is all around. Which gives it a spacious and marine feeling. We highly recommend a swim tour in the lake around 15 minutes walk from the flat.
listings.other_notes:
The royal park Djurgården with all it´s museums and tourists attractions is only 10 minutes away by ferry. 
The cosy marina with cafés, restaurants and ferries just around the corner. 
You can sit comfortably on the balcony and watch the sailing boats and ferries go by just outside the house.

The bedroom is amazingly quiet for its central location, offering a good night's sleep. The shared courtyard is best enjoyed with a barbecue.

It’s best for three, but could probably take four (the bed in the guestroom is 120cm wide, or if needed mattresses are also avail

The metro is only a few minutes away and takes you anywhere you want to go in Stockholm. The bus from the airport is a 45-minute ride and stops 3 minutes from the apartment.

listings.description:
Come stay in our special apartment from 1932, which has a nice backyard. We are in a convenient spot - it only takes 2 minutes to walk to the closest station, Enskede Gård. From there, it's a quick 15-minute metro ride to the city center. We are also close to a nature reserve so you will very likely see deers crossing the streets or from the windows to the back garden.

Welcome to a unique and cozy home!

details.full_area_description:
Our apartment is located in the heart of Kungsholmen, offering the perfect blend of city life and proximity to nature, water, and recreational activities. Here you can find everything from bustling restaurant streets to peaceful water adventures just around the corner.

The Area Around Industrigatan

Kungsholmen provides a unique mix of urban energy and tranquil, scenic surroundings. There’s something for everyone – from swimming and walking to shopping and dining:
	•	Rörstrandsgatan: Just a short walk away, Rörstrandsgatan is one of Vasastan’s most popular pedestrian streets. It’s packed with restaurants, cafés, and bars offering everything from trendy culinary experiences to relaxed dinners. In summer, the street transforms into a lively hub of outdoor dining.
	•	Hornsbergs Strandpark: Perfect for a swim or a relaxing moment by Ulvsundasjön. This modern waterfront area with lake side restaurants is a favorite among locals and visitors.
	•	Smedsuddsbadet: A classic, peaceful beach at Riddarfjärden, where you can spend summer days in lush surroundings.

For those who enjoy water activities, the nearby Karlberg Canal offers other opportunities:
	•	Kayaking or Paddleboarding: Launch directly from the canal and explore the city from the water. Glide between green spaces and urban landscapes while enjoying a unique view of Stockholm’s skyline.

The area is also rich in walking paths, such as Norr Mälarstrand, and green spaces like Rålambshov Park and Kronoberg Park.

A Convenient and Lively Everyday Life

Industrigatan is easily accessible, whether you’re traveling by subway, bus, or bike. The proximity to Västermalmsgallerian and other shops makes everyday life seamless, while the cultural and social options in the area always offer something new to discover.

A Place to Experience Stockholm

Industrigatan is the perfect base for exploring Stockholm, with public transportation just around the corner, alongside walking distance to anything from the royal palace to the famous open air museum Skansen. Whatever you’re looking for, you’ll find it here – a lively and welcoming place that combines city life and nature in the best possible way.

details.full_description:
NOTE LOOKING FOR AN EXCHANGE FOR THIS SUMMER

A warm welcome to our home in Stockholm, in the middle of trendy Södermalm. 

Our apartment is large and spacious at 82 square meters with two bedrooms. A large bedroom with a double bed and a smaller guest room/children's room with a double bed.  So it's perfect for 4 people but we have two inflatable mattresses where 3 more people can sleep. 

A kitchen with everything you need, including coffee and espresso machine and a small wine fridge. A bathroom with a bathtub and a big living room with TV. We also have a balcony that is connected to the kitchen that can be used during the summer months.

*Just a few minutes away you will find many restaurants and shopping. The nearest grocery store is around the corner. 

*Just a 10-minute walk takes you to the middle of nature in central Stockholm, with a lake where you can swim. 

*Just 10 minutes away there is a swimming pool (indoor and outdoor pool) which is perfect for swimmers and families with children. 

*5 min walk to the trendy area called Nytorget and Skånegatan. 

*There are also many parks in the area that really flourish during the summer season. 

*The nearest subway is Skanstull, 5 minutes away. If you appreciate walking, you can walk through Södermalm, Old Town and all the way to the core of Stockholm in just 35 minutes.
details.full_area_description:
About Södermalm: 
Södermalm - also called Söder - has developed into one of Stockholm's hottest neighborhoods. The atmosphere is relaxed, creative and trendy, and the neighborhood offers a myriad of vintage, fashion and design shops. In addition to smaller boutiques and galleries there is an abundance of places to eat and drink. Many of the places are located in style-conscious SoFo (South of Folkungagatan), Hornstull and Mariatorget. Söder also has many parks and breathtaking panoramic views of Stockholm. Two of the best viewpoints are Fjällgatan and Monteliusvägen.

Vi har två stora sovrum m dubbelsäng respektive, 
i ena rummet går sängarna arr flytta isär om så önskas. Vi har två separata sovrum med en enkelsäng i vardera. ( Är två barnrum )
Vi har en stor rymlig hall, vardagsrum och stort kök. 
är fin stuckatur och tidstypiska detaljer.
details.full_area_description:
Jag bor i gamla stan i stockholm. 
Lägenheten har utsikt mot slussen och mot andra sidan idylliska stora nygatan en klassisk gamla stan ny. 
Huset är från 1600-talet med tidstypiska detaljer . 
Är tio minuters gång avstånd till stureplan och city, 
fem minuter till färjorna som går över till Djurgården, tio minuter till Södermalm och fem. minuter till tunnelbanan. Vi bor mitt i smeten av allt man vill upptäcka som turist, Slottet, Nobel museet, Stortorget och en massa mysiga restauranger och Caféer runt hörnan.

details.full_description:
Our apartment is situated at the heart of Södermalm. It's on a calm and leafy street only a stone's throw away from Nytorget where you find a plethora of trendy restaurants, bars, shopping and cafes. The beautiful turn-of-the-century building (1905) offers high ceilings, wooden floors and floods of light.

The apartment has two bedrooms, 1 bath and a combined living room and kitchen. It can easily accommodate 3 people, up to 4 with an extra mattress that we can provide. The smaller bedroom is equipped with a work station, perfect for anyone looking to work remotely during their stay. The modern kitchen comes with all the expected conveniences (induction stove, oven, dishwasher, Moccamaster, fridge, freezer, microwave) and plenty of extra equipment (we have a cooking enthusiast in the house). Next to the kitchen you find the living room area with a generous corner sofa and a 42' smart tv, perfect for socializing or movie nights. 

The master bedroom has a continental king size bed. 
The smaller bedroom is equipped with a single bed.
We also have a baby bedside crib and a cot.
details.full_area_description:
Södermalm, or "söder" as it is called by locals, is known for its trendy yet relaxed vibe.

Expect to find lot's of good restaurants, vintage & boutique stores and cosy cafes with great coffee. 

Södermalm's architecture is a fascinating mix of old and new, reflecting the neighborhood's rich history and evolving character. Stroll along Fjällgatan and Katarinavägen for beautiful views of the city.

In the summer visit outdoor club Trädgården (the garden) and catch the latest new indie music (15 min walk), or take the subway just a few stations (5 min) to visit Tele2 Arena for international artistst like Beyonce or The Weekend, or the club and concert filled district Slakthusområdet for smaller venues.

Want to mix with the locals for a beer? Harvest Home is just around the corner, and you're almost guaranteed to stay late and make new friends and enemies.

There are lots of young people living in the area, with or without kids, and if you're bringing your kids to Stockholm you'll find plenty of green areas and playgrounds around our block.

There is a nice balcony as well.

The bathroom is has a shower/bathtub combined.

The kitchen is old but functional with electric stove, oven, refrigirator and other utilities n

details.full_description:
Welcome to Stockholm & my flat in posh highend city center called Östermalm. Walking distance to almost everywhere : 
To best pubs, bars & clubs of Stockholms nightlife, best highend shops(Gucci, Prada), departmentstores (NK, Åhléns) & shopping malls (Sturegallerian, Gallerian) & shoppingstreets is only a short walk away or 40m to get the Bus or  subway, Taxi stand a 150m close. 
Experience Culture Life(Opera, Ballet, Drama Theatre, Museums, Big Funfair(Gröna Lund) on the Royal island (Djurgården) where your children would like to see Pippi Longstocking (Juni backen) & don't miss experience one of the World oldest outdoor museum Skansen, where they have music, dance, food, drinks showing how we sweeds celibrate our traditions! Why do they dance around a may pole? Why jump around at the same time? All a swears you'll get here! Summer big concerts out looking the view of almost half of Stockholm citycenter! 

Enjoy the comfort of high-speed WiFi, big working desk, smart TV, a
Netflix, MAX (HBO), Viaplay, gym equipment such as bicycle, barr,  weights, for yoga&meditation, special e-bicycle for wheelchair disabled, also mini bicycle pedals while sitting down. High-tech e-bed that can tip & make you sit very comfy while reading or watching app on your device. You can click fasten it to an arm that are already in place on the
details.full_area_description:
Located in a quiet residential neighborhood and our home is minutes from local shops, luxurious departmentstore(Åhléns), cafes, restaurants, parks. We love the friendly atmosphere of our neighbourhood, fancy & posh meet the calm & tranquility. Especially the church with all big green trees, bushes & lovely flowerbeds on the grass where you feel calmness, tranquility & rejuvenated walking along on pebble path & a hidden gem just around the church is a area for the summer-church cafe with cute tables & chairs on the pathway. Also accessible for disabled. 
Some hammocks are in between giant trees! Enjoy yummy sandwiches, Swedish prawn sandwich that's to die for. Celection of creamy pastries, cakes, cookies to your coffee, tea or juice. Just remember it's holy ground so NO DOGS ALLOWEED & DON'T lay on the grass. 2 real parks are a few minutes away where you can bring dogs, lay on the grass & play soccer.
details.full_other:
Wheelchair & disabled friendly flat & also the building with its two elevators that are extra big. Code in the elevators for security, and double doors at the entrance. Parking is available in the building for a parking-fee. Re-cycle & trash rooms are in the building & a short walk away. 
Very close to Bus, Subway & Taxi stand. Rent e-scooter or e-bicycle. Very close to a lot of restaurants, (&Italian posh pizzeria restaurants)  both big & posh and also petite & family owned! All offers also takeaway. 
Very close to Systembolaget, the only place where alcohol is sold except in restaurants, pubs, bars & clubs. Sweden has monopoly on selling bottles of alcohol to its people, it's only allowed in stores called "Systembolaget". Very close walking distance.
Buy something to grill on our e~barbecue & relax on the balcony with a glass of wine or soda!
Take an evening stroll in our tranquil surroundings, then relax with a film/serie from MAX, Viaplay, Netflix, Disney+, TV channels or choose from about 400 dvds!
Next day might continue into the nightlife where several bars, clubs & posh nightlife is only 5min walk away! Regardless of what's your fancy, you will come home to this flat & sleep lovely with plump pillows & soft beddings, eat lovely breakfast to rejuvenate & relax indoors, on the balcony or in the big backyard (innergård). Treat yourself to relax in between all that you want to see & do in Stockholm!

details.full_description:
We love our apartment. A bright and quite white home with a really nice feeling. 
It has one quite big bedroom with a single bed (1,20 m). The second bedroom has a queen size bed (1,40). 

We have an eary living room with big windows facing south. It has a small balcony, where you can enjoy the sun mornings until late afternoon in summertime. There is also an extra bed in the livingroom wich daytime also is used as an extra sofa. 
We have a flat screen tv connected to internet. Watch Netflix, HBO etc. 
Wireless, fast speed.

The fully equipped kitchen has space for at least six persons by the dinner table.  

Our living room is spacy with a lovely view of the church Högalidskyrkan, the sun sets behind the church and at evenings the room has a lovely light! 


Our house is built in typical Swedish 30th style, practical, well planned and bright. 
There is a garden where you can enjoy dinners or have a glass of wine. 

The best thing about our apartment is the location. It is close to everything! You have the trendy and in summertimes crowded Nytorget, at Södermalm, where you can find a lot of bars and nice restaurants. There is also a large park for kids to play in. You reach Tantolunden in five minutes walk, by the sea. A huge park where you can stroll around for hours. If you take a stroll by the water you will get a lovely insight of living in Stockholm. There are several outdoor gyms, small cafes and bathing jetty where people in summertimes go to have a swim. Our closest bathing jetty is about 15 minutes walk away. Five if you go by bicycle. You have a city beach for kids about 30 minutes walk away. 
If you want to leave Södermalm the subway takes 7 minutes to Central Station of Stockholm. We recommend you to walk there though, it will take you approximately 30 minutes, and you will then pass Old town, Gamla stan, and several other attractions. It is a beautiful walk by the ocean!

We have made three exchanges, the last one in 2019. Now we would really like to get back to this lovely way of travelling! We love to show you Stockholm!
details.full_area_description:
Stockholm is one of the most beautiful cities in the world. It has great shopping, a brilliant night life, a lot of top restaurants and bars and a great historical value. 

We live in Skanstull, a part of Södermalm, a trendy and lively part of Stockholm.

You find a popular flea market here during weekends.

Tantolunden is just a few minutes walk away, a large park by the sea Mälaren. It is an area for walking, running and hanging out for picnics or having a swim. Two stops away with the subway, or 15 minutes walk away, you will find the harbour that connects you with the famous archipelago of Stockholm. 

If you visit during winter time, you might be able to ice skate the lakes and go pulka riding (slade) in the park Tanto, or go iceskating in the city centre of Stockholm. 

Södermalm is a trendy area in Stockholm. This is where you find the coolest bars, some of the best restaurants in town, and it is a very nice area to hang out in with a really good and friendly vibe.

And also, do not miss the Guardians guide to Stockholm:
http://www.theguardian.com/travel/2014/oct/12/-sp-stockholm-city-guide-bars-restaurants-hotels
details.full_other:
City vibe and nature in a perfect mix!
Walking distance to several city beaches!

details.full_description:
Our home is located in Södermalm, in SoFo (South of Folkungagatatan) one of Stockholms most creative areas known for its many boutiques, restaurants and shops and theaters.

The house was built in 1885 and completely renovated 2024. Therefore everything in the whole apartment is brand new.

The apartment has a kitchen and an open plan solution with the living room. It has a charming master bedroom and another bedroom with two beautiful bunkbeds.

The apartment is renovated in solid materials such as oak wood and carrara marble with bathroom porcelain from England. The internal decoration goes in classical Gustavian style.

The apartment has exit to the inner courtyard. Our home is very charming and that's why we love it so much.

The environment:
Our apartment is close to Stockholm's rich cultural life with parks, shopping, markets and restaurants. We live just a walk away to Old Town where you can take a fairy to the biggest green area, Djurgården, The Royal National City Park, surunded by the kanal and the ocean with its old ships, restaurants and hotels.

Our apartment is situated just tre block from the closest buss, and tube that takes you to the rest of Stockholms attractions.

We are interested of exchange homes this dates:

Christmas 2024 

Spring 2025

Easter 2025

Summer 2025

And long weekends all year long 2025-2026
details.full_area_description:
Our apartment is close to Stockholm's rich cultural life and beautiful parks, shopping, markets and restaurants.

About Södermalm:
"Södermalm - also called Söder - has developed into one of Stockholm's hottest neighborhoods. The atmosphere is relaxed, creative and trendy, and the neighborhood offers a myriad of vintage, fashion and design shops.
In addition to smaller boutiques and galleries there is an abundance of places to eat and drink. Many of the places are located in style-conscious SoFo (South of Folkungagatan)."

About Old Town:
Gamla Stan is at the crossroads of past and present. Among its historical buildings you'll find unique boutiques and innovative restaurants.

Stockholm's oldest district, Gamla Stan (or Old Town), was founded sometime during the 13th century. Naturally, you'll find some of Stockholm's oldest establishments here, on the streets surrounding the Royal Palace.

About Djurgården:
"Many of the most popular museums and attractions are situated on the green island of Djurgården, which is also part of the Royal National City Park. Djurgården is also a popular recreation area. The island offers excellent walks, jogging, cycling and paddling, and is a lovely place to enjoy a picnic. In addition, Djurgården has loads of restaurants and sightseeing options. If you are traveling with children, then Djurgården is a must: here you will find the city’s best attractions for children, all within walking distance of one another."

Communications:
Our apartment is situated just tre block from the closest buss and tube that takes you to the rest of Stockholms attractions.

Events, what to do and transportations:

details.full_area_description: My apartment is 10 minutes by metro from the very centre, but you can walk along water and reach centre in 25 minutes. The apartment is in top notch condition and has all you need for a nice stay in the city. Metro is reached within 2 minutes walk.

listings.title: Mathildes apartment
listings.description: I live in a small but very cozy studio apartement, that I've put a lot of effort into making it feel like home for me. I spend most of my evenings in my couch that is just as comfy as it looks. The kitchen is compact but you can absolutely cook a nice meal in it. I have a pretty large tv, with a PS5 and netflix, if you want to have a chill day inside.
listings.area_description: I've actually moved back to the neighbourhood that I was brought up in, my family lives 4 minutes away, and I love it. The neighbourhood is one of Stockholms many hidden gems, with just a few minutes walk to the royal national city park. There's a bus stop 150 m from the apartment that takes you to Odenplan in 10 minutes, from where you can walk to the city center, or exchange to the subway to get there in 5 minutes. There are several nice restaurants withing walking distance from where I live,
listings.other_notes: The bed is 140 cm, and one person can sleep comfortably in my couch as well. I also have a small balcony.

listings.title: Shandra's house
listings.description:
*Please no exchange requests under 1 week! 
Cozy, light filled 115 m2, 3 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment in Mariatorget (Södermalm) in the heart of Stockholm. This apartment is located on the 4th floor, and was recently and immaculately renovated (Jan 2020). We are located in one of Stockholm's best neighborhoods, just steps away from public transportation, grocery stores, great cafes/restaurants, beautiful parks, and within walking distance to the Old Town. The master bedroom has a King Size bed,
listings.area_description: Mariatorget is located on Södermalm, and is known to be the hippest part of Stockholm. A short walk away from one of Stockholm’s most beautiful parks (Tanto Parken), and Stockholm's best restaurants.
listings.other_notes: We have two adult bikes, and one bike for a child that you're welcome to use during your stay.

*Please no exchange requests under 1 week! 
Cozy, light filled 115 m2, 3 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment in Mariatorget (Södermalm) in the heart of Stockholm. This apartment is located on the 4th floor, and was recently and immaculately renovated (Jan 2020). We are located in one of Stockholm's best neighborhoods, just steps away from public transportation, grocery stores, great cafes/restaurants, beautiful parks, and within walking distance to the Old Town. The master bedroom has a King Size bed, second and third bedrooms both have queen beds. There is a shared backyard that has a grill, outdoor seating for meals, and a small playhouse area for children.
Our space is modern, clean, free of clutter, and has everything that you'll need to feel at home during your stay in Stockholm.

listings.title: 3 bed waterfront apartment in family friendly area
listings.description:
Our apartment on two levels is located in the heart of the Hammarby Sjöstad district. The light floods in through the floor-to-ceiling windows. The patio gives the feeling of living in a townhouse.
The apartment is newly renovated and has a fully equipped kitchen. The patio has an outdoor kitchen.
Public transport is a few minutes' walk away.
listings.area_description:
The apartment is located in environmentally friendly Hammarby Sjöstad overlooking the lake. 
The area has several good restaurants, boat transport into town, tram and buses that take you to the city in 20 minutes. The nearest grocery store is a 5-minute walk away.
Bathing is done in Sickla lake, a short walk from the apartment.

listings.title: Stylish apartment in Stockholm
listings.description:
This is a large one bedroom apartment located on the 4th floor of a building built in 1982. 
The bedroom has an attached bathroom and an empty walk in closet which could easily be used as a small room for children.
Beside the queen bed, we can provide one single and one queen mattresses which could sleep up to 3 additional guests. 
The balcony connects the apartment to the communal gardens
The apartment is only 10 minutes walk from Subway, Bars, shops and restaurants. 
Only 10, 15 minutes away f
listings.area_description:
The apartment is located in one of the hippest neighborhood of Stockholm, Hornstull, which has some of the best bars, cafes and restaurants in town.

5 minutes walk would transfer you from busy city vibe to middle of nature close to water where you can choose to go for a walk or swim in the water during hot days of summer.
You can take a stroll in the Hornstull market every weekend during summer time or go for a cross country ski or skate on a frozen Långholmen canal during winter.

listings.title: Stockholm Central with Nature
listings.description: Welcome to this optimally planned 3-room apartment on the 3rd floor (with elevator), surrounded by greenery yet only minutes from central Stockholm. • Spacious corner unit with light on three sides • Newly renovated bathroom with heated floors • Calm location just steps from Lake Mälaren and Trekanten for walks, swimming, or kayaking • Excellent transit: 1 min to bus & tram, 5 min to the subway, 15 min to Slussen/Gamla Stan • Elevated hilltop setting with panoramic views • Shared courtyard with
listings.area_description: About the neighborhood Gröndal is one of Stockholm’s hidden gems: a leafy, residential area with a village feel right in the city. You’ll find charming cafés, local bakeries (as a French, Lindberg makes the best bread, croissants and pains au chocolat in town), vintage shops, and waterside promenades where locals swim in summer, early autumns and late springs. The nearby Vinterviken park (Alfred Nobel’s former factory grounds, now a cultural hub) offers gardens, art spaces, and a well-loved café
listings.other_notes:
Best bakery in town (Lundbergs) is down the hill. Tons of mushrooms to pick.
Our building is made of friends and families. No late night crazy party is allowed (we can actually force an owner to sell his or her appartment if given too many warnings… meaning 2 !).

listings.title: Brand New Flat in Leafy Part of Central Stockholm - 11 Minutes from T-Centralen and a train to Arlanda out front!
listings.description:
Hi there!  Welcome to a brand new, well-designed 30m2 studio flat in central Stockholm!  Located 3 min from a train station (Årstaberg) you can be at T-Centralen/Central Station in 1 1 minutes, Södermalm in 6 minutes, and Odenplan in 13 minutes.  Unfortunately this apartment is not suitable for children due to size.  

I have a 30m2 studio that I have managed to make spacious, with an easily expandable bed that goes from a single 80cm to a double 160cm.  I have a 75 inch TV, dishwasher, washer
listings.area_description:
You can get a train to/from Arlanda airport directly to my flat without changes, taking only 48 minutes.  All major attractions are within 20 minutes and it is possible to walk to Södermalm across the bridge.  

Årstaberg is extremely well-located, within a quick walk to the Liljeholmen waterfront, and Tanto beach!  I bought it because of the amazing location and many transport links.  Liljeholmen is known for being fancy, expensive, and full of great restaurants.  You're right in the middle o
listings.other_notes: My flat is brand new and absolutely spotless :)  I love it and I hope you do too!

listings.title: Nice city flat, 40 meters from parks and water.
listings.description:
Our flat resides on the sunny side of Kungsholmen just next to the water with a sea view and a balcony.  

You’ll find great restaurants, shops and bakery’s as well as transportation just around the corner. 

The historical city center is a 15 minutes walk away or you borrow our bikes and get there in 5. Just outside the house you have a scenic boardwalk with restaurants coffee shops or you can just go for a swim, hire kayaks, SUP boards and wind surfing boards. 

The apartment is spacious and
listings.area_description: Kungsholmen, one of the four major islands that Stockholm resides on, has its own culture. 30 years ago it was a quite residential neighborhood but now, stores and restaurants pops up everywhere. Its parks and notable access to water has made it one of the more attractive islands of Stockholm providing comfortable living very close to the city center.
listings.other_notes:
The sea is 40 meters from the door.
5 parks less than 4 minutes away . Transportation, 
Restaurants and shopping around the corner.

listings.title: Cozy Stockholm Apartment
listings.description: Cozy apartment in Vasastan, Stockholm. Walking distance to cafés, parks, city centre. Small cozy typically Stockholm apartment in a house from 1920. Simple apartment for a cozy stay in Stockholm city centre!
listings.area_description: Hudiksvallsgatan is the street where multiple art galleries are. Calm area but with all necessary things around the corner. Put on your best shoes and walk around Stockholm islands and city centre!

listings.title: Fantastic 180m2 with stunning seaview, 2 balconies
listings.description:
Our apartment is situated in one of Stockholm’s most exclusive adresses. Based on the fourth floor, facing south, the apartment bathes in light. Overlooking the bay of lake Mälaren you can see the sun rise in the west and set in the east. Livingroom, bedrooms and kitchen have lake view - which is adorable any time of day. 
Modern Scandinavian decoration.
listings.area_description:
Norr Mälarstrand and Kungsholmen is based by the lake so you can easily go out for walks, running or just strolling. There are several really nice restaurants, bars and cafes in short walking distance. Would you like to do shopping in central Stockholm, it is just a 15-20 minutes walk.

 Buzzy restaurants: Mäster Anders, Orangeriet, Mälarpaviljongen 
- Cool bars: Mälarpaviljongen 
- Cozy cafés: Petit france 
- Retail therapy: Lots of shopping opportunities in entire city! 
- Bit of culture: The
listings.other_notes: We are offering entire July 2025 for exchange with a house or apartment i Cote de Azur, France for the same period, or for an exchange in Bali or Thailand during 3 weeks in Christmas 2025/2026.

listings.title: Sandra's house. 2 1/2 room apartment in the heart of Stockholm
listings.description: Welcome to our cozy and modern 2 room apartment at Mariatorget. We have one room with a double bed, a living room with an extra queen size bed and a fully equipped kitchen. Its a bright and calm apartment thanks to the large windows even though its on the ground floor. We love this place and hope you will enjoy and feel at home.
listings.area_description: Mariatorget is a beautiful part of Stockholm with restaurants, parks and strolling areas just around the corner. The subway is just 200 m from the door and although the apartment is located in the heart of Södermalm it is quite and calm in this courtyard house. Perfect for a weekend in the city, for a couple or a small family who wants to enjoy both peaceful surroundings and vibrant city life.

listings.title: Central and calm in beautiful Stockholm, in the middle of trendy SoFo
listings.description: Charming artist home with a generous green inner yard. The apartment i suited for four persons with one bedroom with a double bed and two smaller rooms with single beds. The comfortable living room has two sofas and the spacious kictchen a large dining table. The big balcony faces a green and beautiful private inner yard with facilities for barbecue and a playground for children.
listings.area_description: A calm and secure street right in the middle of popular and trendy SoFo with lots of restaurants and small scale shopping. In the neighbouring street outdoor restaurants take over the street in the summertime. Just a few minutes away il Vita bergsparken, a big beautiful park with an outdoor scene for theatre and other perfomances. Buses and underground station is not far away and it's only two stops to the historic center Old Town and three stops to the Central Station. Training facilities with
listings.other_notes:
Trains and buses from the airport at Central Station, four stops away by underground.
Smoking is allowed in the yard but not in the building.

Training facilities with swimming, tennis, badminton och outdoor gym are also near.  Alsol close to nature with a beutiful walk along the water and bathing places. Seven minutes away by underground is Nackareservatet, a nature reserve with golf court, lakes, and hiking trails.

listings.description:
Cozy apartment, with a mix of desig classics and self-made home textiles, arts and crafts. Two patios. Centrally located in Vasastan, with lots of restaurants, cafes and cultural offerings in the area.
.

listings.description: A very cozy and nice apartment in a beautiful building. It has a nice dining area and a fully equipped kitchen.
listings.area_description: The apartment is in the heart of Stockholm. The area has a lot of restaurants and cafes and is right by the public transportation.

The apartment has its own, shared garden (only 2 apartments are sharing) with my own, private area. Also with wonderful view.

Metro is 6-7 min away and its only 4-6 min to the Central station. 10 min walk to Old Town.

listings.area_description: The view and the central location. Laidback area.

listings.title: Quynh Tran's house
listings.description:
My home is at the heart of Stockholm, easy access to the main areas and 3 minutes away from station. It is located on a busy street lined with all amenities, lots of restaurants, supermartkets, gyms and pubs.

The apartment is 31m2, cozy, bright, fresh with balcony. Can accommodate up to 2 people. There is one big sofa and one double bed of 160cm.
listings.area_description: I live in the center of Stockholm, in between Vasastan and Norrmalm. Main attractions are 15-20 min walk away, for further attractions, train station is 3 minute walk away.

Mitt på centrala Kungsholmen. Nära till vatten, fina promenader, många trevliga kaféer, restauranger och butiker. 
Stor innergård med planteringar, grillplatser och uteplatser.

listings.title: Stefan's house
listings.description:
Our two floored appartement offers a social first floor with a spacious kitchen and cosy living room. The kitchen is newly renovated. From the kitchen you reach the balcony with sunshine during the evening. 

The top floor is reached by the staircase in the living room. Upstairs you will have a fantastic view over the roof tops. 

The whole appartement is renovated and offers a mixed scandinavian design together with details from the 20th century.
listings.area_description:
Our neighborhood offers a great variety of shopping, restaurants and city parks just minutes away from the appartement. You will find the Royal park "Haga parken" 20 minutes away with wonderful strolling areas, kayaking and tennis courts. 

If you want to explore the center of Stockholm you either walk 20-30 minutes or enter the metro 5 minutes from the appartement.
listings.other_notes: There is a parking place available in a garage 5 minutes walk from the appartement.

details.full_description:
If you are looking for a house close to nature, water and the city of Stockholm, this is the place for you! 

We love our house build in 1936 and renovated during the last couple of years. 
The house is charming and full of daylight. Our house is 170m2 divided on three floors. We have 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. All together you can comfortable stay six persons in the house. 

Our garden is 1 300m2 with a big lawn for the kids to play on. The house is facing the sun all day and you can enjoy our outdoor house and terrace. Our home is ideal for families with kids.

Our kitchen is fully equipped and outdoors we have a Weber gasol grill.
We want to welcome you to come to our home and enjoy the long bright summer nights or the cold snowy winter days.

listings.title: Katarina's city hideaway
listings.description:
Experience the charm of Stockholm from our cozy attic apartment nestled in the heart of the city! With a spacious bedroom featuring a large double bed and an additional room equipped with a single bed (with the option to add an extra mattress on the floor if needed), our space is perfect for a family getaway or a group of friends. 

Enjoy the open floor plan connecting the kitchen to the spacious living room, where you can relax and take in the views of the city's rooftops and rustic beams of
listings.area_description: Conveniently located right in the centre of the city and just a 7-minute walk from Stockholm Central Station, our apartment provides easy access to all the city has to offer. Explore the cosy streets of Vasastan and Kungsholmen, both just around the corner, or walk along Drottninggatan right to the city centre to discover even more of Stockholm's attractions. Don't miss out on this prime location for your next vacation exchange adventure!
listings.other_notes:
Se have a small poodle in the house occasionally but it does not live in the flat. This is an allergy friendly breed but if you have a serious allergy take this into consideration.

I am mainly looking for an exchange within Sweden for the summer of 2024 and within Europe during the summer or fall.

It has an air of old times all the things inside are more or less from 1757 and the house itself is medieval.

listings.description:
We are currently looking for a exchange (1-2 weeks) during summer 2025. Our home is a beutiful apartment perfect for a couple or a family with one or two kids. We have two bedrooms, one with a double bed and one with a bunkbed. 
The kitchen is very modern with a dishwasher, microwave, oven, fridge, freezer and a great coffee machine. 

The building we live in is very central but it's still quiet and a great atmosphere. 
Kungsholmen is an up and coming area with lots of nice cafés, bars, restaura
listings.area_description:
Kungsholmen, where we live is one of five areas in central Stockholm. Kungsholmen is actually an island so there is water everywhere and Kungsholmen is connected to the rest of Stockholm via bridges and ferries. Summertime is when Stockholm and Kungsholmen is at it's best. Loads of cafés and restaurants open up. 
Stockholm has one of the worlds most beautiful archipelagos which is easy to access via ferries for a day trip or longer. 
Kungsholmen is a clean and proper area where you'll find man

details.full_description:
We are currently looking for a exchange (1-2 weeks) during summer 2025. Our home is a beutiful apartment perfect for a couple or a family with one or two kids. We have two bedrooms, one with a double bed and one with a bunkbed. 
The kitchen is very modern with a dishwasher, microwave, oven, fridge, freezer and a great coffee machine. 

The building we live in is very central but it's still quiet and a great atmosphere. 
Kungsholmen is an up and coming area with lots of nice cafés, bars, restaurants and parks.
details.full_area_description:
Kungsholmen, where we live is one of five areas in central Stockholm. Kungsholmen is actually an island so there is water everywhere and Kungsholmen is connected to the rest of Stockholm via bridges and ferries. Summertime is when Stockholm and Kungsholmen is at it's best. Loads of cafés and restaurants open up. 
Stockholm has one of the worlds most beautiful archipelagos which is easy to access via ferries for a day trip or longer. 
Kungsholmen is a clean and proper area where you'll find many families and people of all ages.
details.full_other:
Our apartment is supernice after an extensive renovation, we really love it. 
Kungsholmen (name of the area), is very central but yet quiet. It only takes ten minutes to walk to the central station and even better is it only a 2 minute walk to the water where it is possible to take a swim.
Our neighboors are really cool and we love to hang out with their kids. There is a busstop 20meters from our door, the subway is only 250meters away and we just had a ferrystop established 500meters from our house.

listings.title: Cosy pied-a-terre in the center of Stockholm’s historic Old Town, just a stones throw from the Royal Castle.
listings.description:
Beautiful studio apartment located in the heart of Stockholms Gamla Stan. This is the historic center of Stockholm, primarily built up during the 11th to the 18th century. A lot of the citys sights are located just around the corner, as well as metro, buses and ferries reaching the archipelago within 2 minutes walk.
The apartment normally has a double-bed and a sofa, but a spare bed could easily be arranged.
It has a fully equipped kitchen and a small but functional bathroom with shower. 
If
listings.area_description:
The apartment is located in Gamla stan with the Royal Castle, the Nobel museum and the parliament all within a two minute walk.
Just down the street is the Acne headquarters, and Stockholms newest fine dining cluster with Djuret and Frantzén (2 stars in Guide Michelin) being the most notable.
There's also more or less every type of communication imaginable, sans flying, within a few hundred meters.
listings.other_notes:
Unique location in the middle of Old Town, 400 year old building with great atmosphere.
Great restaurants, hip Södermalm, the Royal castle and boats to the archipelago within a stone's throw.

listings.title: Christoffer's house
listings.description: Our newly renovated townhouse, located in Vasastan, was originally an old stable built in 1895, but today it is a private residence with two floors and approximately 135 square meters. The house has three bedrooms and a loft, two working fireplaces, a hot tub, a steam sauna, a separate heating system in all rooms, and its own garden with a grill... Yes, we hope that you who want to exchange homes with us will enjoy it here.
listings.area_description: From Upplandsgatan, everything is close by. It's barely a 10-minute walk to the central station and Arlanda Express. 20 minutes to the Royal Palace and the Old Town. 5 minutes to Odenplan and the restaurants there. 10 minutes to T-Centralen, and so on. In other words, a fantastic location!

details.full_area_description:
The apartment is located in probably the most prestigious residential area in central Stockholm, only minutes from first class shopping, restaurants, museums, the Royal Operahouse, the Royal Dramatic Theatre, concerthalls, the Royal Castle etc. Right outside our home are boats that can take you out to sightseeing tours as well as longer trips into the Stockholm Archipelago. Also within walking distance is "Stockholms Central Park" - Djurgården with a huge outdoor museum as well as many of Sweden's finest museums, zoo, entertainment park, playground and the American Embassy. 

For more info go to: http://cityguide-europe.com/se/stockholm/?menu=att&cat=/attractions/city1 
where there are pictures of nearby surroundings as well as our house!

A brand new, proper kitchen, comfortable bed and nice bathroom. You have also access to another balcony/terrace with morning sun, a sauna and a nice backyard where you can barbecue or play boule

It is close to pretty much everything on Södermalm and Stockholm has to offer. The neighbourhood is as calm or busy as you like it to be. A couple of minutes walk in each direction you can find shops, restaurants, bars, cinemas and cafés but also green parks and Årstaviken, one of the most popular walking areas in Stockholm. In the summer I go swim there ev

details.full_description: Beautiful 96 sqm historic and stylish apartment in the heart of Södermalm. Very homey and artsy home. With 3 bedrooms, 1 bathroom plus a WC, charming balcony. Comfortable beds, great light and atmosphere. Full high quality equipped kitchen with everything you need. You can also take a warm bath in our beautiful bathtub. The building is very charming, from 1899, beautiful staircase and entrance. It also has a small elevator.
details.full_area_description: Our apartment is located in the best and most beautiful part of Södermalm. In the street of the best thrift shops in the city. Surrounded by the coziest cafes and coolest stores. 2 minutes walking to the subway station and with plenty of bus lines just some steps outside. You can walk from the apartments to the Old City (Gamla Stan) and we are just some steps from the very scenic Mariaberget. 14 minutes walking from Slussen ferries where you can take boats to different parts of the city, including Skansen and Moderna Museet. The location is 10 out of 10.
details.full_other:
Sometimes you can choose to not have our cat under your stay. My cat is a 5 years old lady cat, she is the most beautiful Siamese girl. And is very veeeeeery child friendly. Loves to play and cuddle and is very communicative. She loves her home so we like her to stay, but we can try to arrange so the apartment is pet free during your stay.

The 3rd room (which is not in the pictures) is locked during the stay, which means only 2 rooms are available. This can be negotiated in advance if the number of guests demand a 3rd room. :)

We love our apartment so we expect our guests to return it clean and tidy as they found it. 

A house manual with instructions about the practicalities will be at the apartment when you arrive.

listings.title: Apartment in central Stockholm with stunning view!
listings.description:
Welcome to our home in Stockholm’s nicest area Södermalm! In the city, close to everything, but located in a large green park by the water and with an absolutely stunning view over southern Stockholm. 

Our neighbourhood is called Tanto (after the park it’s located in) and consists of five 60s brutalist Le Corbusier-inspired residential buildings. 50 meters from the water with a public bathing jetty right outside. Lots of nice restaurants in the area, you will also find a beach, outdoor cafes, b
listings.area_description:
- Bit of culture: Fotografiska (don't miss the café & restaurant)
- Walks in the park: Tantolunden, Årstaviken, Långholmen 
- Spot of exercise: Rent SUP & Kayak: langholmenkajak.se, Eriksdalsbadet (public swimmingpools) Public outdoor gyms in Tantolunden or check out Jympa3000 in Tantolunden for an extra everything workout!
- Day tripping: Stockholm Archipelago (10 000 islands)
- Royal castle, 30 min walk. Modern museum and amusement park (Gröna Lund), 30 min walk + boat 15 min.
listings.other_notes: In the summer of 2025 we are looking for a 2 week exchange in July or first half of August. We are looking for the west of France (Brittany or Normandy). But we are open to other suggestions.

Our apartment is located in a fantastic heritage-listed building from the 1890s, with 3.20-meter-high ceilings.

The apartment is on the first floor, but because the building is on a slope, all windows and the balcony are on the third floor.

The kitchen and living room feature an open-plan layout with a dining area for 8 people. The kitchen is well equipped and newly renovated, and includes, among other things, a coffee machine, a soda maker, and an ice cream maker. From the living room, you ca
listings.area_description:
The apartment is located on a quiet, secluded street, just a couple of minutes from all the cozy cafés and bars around Mariatorget. 

Within five minutes of walk you can reach the Slussen metro station or all the shopping along Götgatan and across Södermalm, with its many small, unique SoHo-style shops.

If you prefer to walk into the city center, it takes about 20 minutes to reach the Royal Palace and 25–30 minutes to the main shopping streets.

details.full_area_description:
Apartment in central Stockholm on Södermalm, located close to a wonderful park in the trendy "Sofo" area, with great coffee shops, shopping, restaurants and bars.

Some info about the neighborhood and the area.

GROCERY/FOOD STORES
Coop, small but nice grocery store  that we use a lot. Rot has a lot of ecological food and more exclusive products.
and Urban Deli nearby that is a really nice grocerystore and bar. Cheaper and bigger grocery store is Lidl or Ica next to the subwaystation Medborgarplatsen.

CAFES, RESTAURANTS AND BARS IN SOFO
Pom och Flora, Bondegatan 64 (very nice café also has a great breakfast menu)
Delselius at Renstiernasgata (Pastery and bread. Fresch in the morning) 
Ai Ramen, Erstagatan 22, Japanese noodle soup. 
Nytorget 6, Nytorget 6 (Restaurant)
Urban deli, Nytorget 4 (restaurant, bar and grocery store)
Greasy Spoon, Tjärhovsgatan 19 (great brunch)
Blue Light Yokohama, Åsögatan 170 (Nice small japanese place)
Ah glassbar, Nytorget (home made icecream in Stockholm)


OTHER FAVOURITES ON SÖDERMALM
Restaurant Triton near Skanstull.
Medborgarplatsen: Babylon (restaurant, bar) – great place for lunch, coffee, dinner or just drinks 
Mariatorget: Hotel Rival and Café Rival (brunch and café)
Mariatorget: Kalf and Hansen (lunch)
Herr Judit (vintage clothing/accessories)
Judits (vintage clothing/accessories)
Tjoget/Linje 10 (food and drinks)
Barbro (Asian food and drinks/cocktails)
Debaser Strand (live stage. restaurant, bar and club)
Dello Sport VIP (great coffee and pastries) – if the weather allows get a take away and head over to the playground 

Nytorget:
Nytorgsgatan, Södermannagatan, Skånegatan and Bondegatan are full off nice shops and cafes

PLAYGROUNDS
Södermalm/Sofo:
Vita bergs parken (The park beside us has a playground on top of the theatre stage, 3 minutes walk) Nyorget (a playground in the middle of Nytorget, 5 minutes walk)
Blecktornsparken (close to Nytorget, 10 minute walk)
Hornstull:
Högalidsparken Skinnarviksparken
Kungsholmen:
Rålambshovsparken

OTHER FUN STUFF FOR KIDS
Södermalm:
Movie -SF Bio, Folkungatrappan 2, Filmstaden Söder, Cinema 10 minutes walk from us. With movies often in english. Book tickets at www.sf.se
Rock and bowl, Mariatorget, Hornsgatan 54. From 5 pm there ́s discobowling.

Outdoor swimming on Södermalm:
Eriksdalsbadet. Tantolunden and Långholmen.

Djurgården:
Junibacken, Galärvarvsvägen 8. The world of famous children author “Astrid Lindgren”. 
The Story Train is magical. Take the boat from Slussen (15 minutes walk from us), it ́s stops at “Djurgården” and it ́s a 5 minutes walk from there.

Gröna Lund, Djurgården, A fun theme park, Take the boat from slussen (15 minutes walk from us), it ́s stops at “Djurgården” and your ́re there.

Moderna museet / The modern museum, Skeppsholmen, Stockholm. A great museum, also for kids. 

Skansen, The Zoo, Djurgårdsslätten 49-51. It ́s also the world's first open-air museum, founded in 1891. Here you can stroll through five centuries of Swedish history, from north to south, with a real sense of the past all around in the historical buildings and dwellings, peopled by characters in period dress. 


TRANSPORT
Take bus number 3 or number 76 on Renstiernasgatan (Beside the food store coop).
Bus number 3 and 76 arrives every 5-10 minutes and will take you to “Slussen” in 5 minutes. 
From slussen you can take the Metro with the green and red line.
Bus number 66 on Bondegatan arrives every 15 minutes and will take you to different directions on Södermalm.(Medborgarplatsen, Mariatorget and Hornstull),
You can easily reach the archipelago by near ferries at Nybrokajen or Strandvägen.


TAXI
Taxi Stockholm: 08-15 00 00 is polite and nice.
(Bolt or Uber is cheaper)

EMERGENCY
Hospitals: Södersjukhuset and Sachsska barnakut (10 min away by cab) and Astrid Lindgrens Barnsjukhus
You have a pharmacy across the road, Renstiernas gata 26
details.full_other: Parking available in the street or in a car-garage 4 minutes away for a fee.

listings.area_description:
Stockholm is a fantastic town to visit, both for children and adults!
There are lots of tourists attractions such as museums, for example the famous Vasa museum, or the Royal castle, and the old town is well worth the visit.
In the surroundings of the city you have beautiful nature and the fantastic Stockholm archipielago, wich is easy to go to for a day excursion by boat.
In Stockholm there are also lots of big greenareas, and you can also go to one of the small beaches to take a swim or sun
listings.other_notes:
SPECIFICALLY LOOKING FOR NICE BEACHSDESTINATIONS!

details.full_description:
Our newly luxury renovated apartment in the centre of beautiful Stockholm is 100 sqm, and it is very modern!

Central & newly renovated and modern apartment with all facilities!
Very nice and central part of beautiful Stockholm!
Lots of shops and restaurants in the area.

The apartment has a big, nice, fully equipped kitchen kitchen - we love to cook, that connects with the livingroom area, with tv 52", dvd and Apple-tv. We offer free high speed internet/WiFi as well as Netflix, HBO etc.

In the bathroom there is a bathtub, washingmachine and a tumbledryer. 

We can in special cases, by agreement, arrange for 6 people to stay in the apartment, but I would say it’s best for 4.

We also have a very nice big terrace fronting the big backyard in witch there is a barbecue, playground for children as well as greenareas.

In the garage we have a SUV Seat Ateca, wich - after agreement - you can use if you want to take a trip outside Stockholm. Car is not available in GP-situations.

Cleaning service will be charged in case of GP-exchanges, in case of simultaneous we hopefully make an agreement about cleaning service in each other places!


*     *     *     *     *

Nuestro lujoso apartamento recién reformado en el centro de la hermosa Estocolmo tiene 100 m² y es muy moderno.

¡Un apartamento céntrico, recién reformado y moderno con todas las comodidades!

¡Una zona muy bonita y céntrica de la hermosa Estocolmo!

Muchas tiendas y restaurantes en la zona.

El apartamento cuenta con una cocina grande, bonita y totalmente equipada (nos encanta cocinar) que conecta con el salón y cuenta con TV de 52", DVD y Apple TV. Ofrecemos internet/wifi de alta velocidad gratuito, además de Netflix, HBO, etc.

El baño cuenta con bañera, lavadora y secadora.

En casos especiales, según acuerdo, podemos alojar a 6 personas en el apartamento, aunque lo ideal sería 4.

También disponemos de una terraza muy bonita que da al amplio patio trasero, donde hay barbacoa, parque infantil y zonas verdes.

En el garaje tenemos un SUV Seat Ateca, que, según acuerdo, puede utilizar si desea salir de Estocolmo. No disponemos de coche para estancias con GP.

Se cobrará el servicio de limpieza en caso de intercambio de médicos de cabecera. En caso de intercambio simultáneo, esperamos poder llegar a un acuerdo sobre el servicio de limpieza en cada una de las estancias.


*   *   *   *   *   *
details.full_area_description:
Stockholm is a fantastic town to visit, both for children and adults!
There are lots of tourists attractions such as museums, for example the famous Vasa museum, or the Royal castle, and the old town is well worth the visit.
In the surroundings of the city you have beautiful nature and the fantastic Stockholm archipielago, wich is easy to go to for a day excursion by boat.
In Stockholm there are also lots of big greenareas, and you can also go to one of the small beaches to take a swim or sunbathe.
If you wonder or need anything else about Stockholm, don´t hesitate to ask!

Visit Stockholms's official visitors guide at: http://beta.stockholmtown.com/en/ 

Article in New York Times about Stockholm: 

https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2017/07/06/travel/what-to-do-36-hours-in-stockholm-sweden.html?smid=ig-nytimes&smtyp=cur&utm_source=soldsie&utm_medium=referral


https://www.facebook.com/placesandmoments2826/videos/1169074466469788/

* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

Estocolmo es una ciudad fantástica para visitar, tanto para adultos como para niños. 

Hay un montón de atracciones turísticas como los museos, por ejemplo, el famoso Museo Vasa, o el Castillo Real, y el casco antiguo merece la pena la visita. 
 
En los alrededores de la ciudad que tienen la hermosa naturaleza y el fantástico archipiélago de Estocolmo, que es fácil ir a una excursión de un día en barco.
En Estocolmo, también hay un montón de grandes áreas verdes, y también se puede ir a una de las pequeñas playas para tomar un baño o tomar el sol.

Si te preguntas o necesita algo más acerca de Estocolmo, no dude en preguntar!

Guía oficial de Estocolmo en: http://beta.stockholmtown.com/en/


Artículo en New York Times sobre Estocolmo: 

https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2017/07/06/travel/what-to-do-36-hours-in-stockholm-sweden.html?smid=ig-nytimes&smtyp=cur&utm_source=soldsie&utm_medium=referral

https://www.facebook.com/placesandmoments2826/videos/1169074466469788/

Located on the first floor (1,5 flight of stairs up) with small elevator available available half a flight of stairs up. Laundry room is available on the 6th floor/attic. There’s an elevator that goes to the 5th floor. There’s a little
listings.area_description:
Located on Södermalm in an area called SoFo, right next to parks, restaurants and bars with a bus stop right outside the door and the subway is a 7 minute walk away. Very walkable and nice neighborhood, cafes and secondhand shops!

Cose to Fotografiska Museet, walking distance to Gamla Stan (Old Town) with the Swedish Palace and an array of museums. Walking distance to the ocean in any direction (Stockholm is made up of many islands after all).

I’m happy to recommend some of my favorite places

listings.title: Quiet and cosy nest in "Stockholm Laketown"
listings.description: Furnished bedroom with one 90-cm bed. (Second person possible on a mattress on the floor). Terrace in the shadow. Bathroom and kitchen shared with your host. Kitchen only for cooking. The bedroom also has a small table where you can have your meals. (We use the kitchen as our extended living room.)
listings.area_description:
This city district, Hammarby Sjöstad, is kind of a mix of suburb and city centre. And it is located on the brink of a lake separating  it from the more central parts of Stockholm. There are restaurants, pubs, cafés and shops in the area. And you can stroll along the lake and some canals running through the area.

Well serviced with tram and busses (24/7). Easy and quick access to the centre of Stockholm. Free ferry boat commuting to Södermalm every 20 min.
listings.other_notes: We do NOT charge any cleaning fee. We take it that you keep the house tidy and leave it in the same state as it was when you arrived.

listings.title: Scandinavian Elegance Meets Urban Convenience
listings.description: Our home is a perfect balance of modern comfort and Scandinavian elegance,. nestled in the bustling heart of Stockholm. Our space provides a cozy, yet sophisticated, retreat for those looking to explore the city. The inviting interiors and well-equipped kitchen make for a homely atmosphere, while our unbeatable location puts guests in the midst of the city’s best cafes, boutiques, and cultural spots. It's the ideal home base for an unforgettable Stockholm experience.
listings.area_description: Guests will be captivated by the vibrant, yet laid-back atmosphere of our Södermalm neighborhood. Situated only steps away from Mariatorget, the area boasts leafy, picturesque streets lined with unique boutiques and small art galleries. What sets our locale apart, however, is its culinary scene. From artisanal cafes to a wide array of restaurants serving international and local cuisine, there's something to satisfy every foodie. Add to this the convenience of having a subway station just 100 met

details.full_area_description: Guests will be captivated by the vibrant, yet laid-back atmosphere of our Södermalm neighborhood. Situated only steps away from Mariatorget, the area boasts leafy, picturesque streets lined with unique boutiques and small art galleries. What sets our locale apart, however, is its culinary scene. From artisanal cafes to a wide array of restaurants serving international and local cuisine, there's something to satisfy every foodie. Add to this the convenience of having a subway station just 100 meters away, and you've got an unbeatable location for exploring Stockholm's many attractions.

listings.title: Christofer's house
listings.description: This spacious two bedroom studio apartment is situated on two floors and also featuring a secluded private 20 square meter patio. Fully equipped kitchen and comfortably furnished living and dining area. The main bedroom has a King sized bed and the guest bedroom has a 120 cm bed. High speed fiber internet with both wifi and lan connection.
listings.area_description:
The apartment is located in one of the city centers more quiet areas with big parks and lots of great nature walks, museums and local boutiques yet only 10min on foot or a 3min subway raid to downtown Stockholm for shopping, great restaurants and bustling nightlife if so desired. 
A few minuts more and you reach the royal castle and the historical beauty of the Old Town and cityhall. 
Friendly, safe and quiet residential area with the Metro station Gardet only one minute walk away.
Perfectly
listings.other_notes:
The indoor area is 73 m2 and outdoors 20 m2 
There is one Bathroom with a bathtub, shower and a toilet.
The second Bathroom has a toilet and tasing basin but no shower

listings.description:
Built 1902 in the very center of Södermalm with restaurants, bars and small shops. Close to Mariatorget.
Old classic style apartment in good shape. Clean. Very quite house.
listings.area_description: Located at a small quite one way street, close to everything there is here. Almost no traffic outside, very peaceful. Train station next block takes you directly to Arlanda Airport, 3-4 minutes walk to subway. Plenty of restaurants and bars one block away.

listings.title: Josefine’s and Mikael’s apartment
listings.description: Nice five room flat with a view to a big park with a playground. Building in the style of Swedish functionalism built in 1946. Big balcony facing the park. Just outside the city centre.
listings.area_description: Just outside the inner city limits of Stockholm. 3 minute walk to underground Gullmarsplan with shops, bakery and café. 15 minute walk over a bridge to lively Södermalm.

listings.title: Anders & Franc Home. Swedish charming in central Stockholm!
listings.description:
We live in a building from 1882, in a generous and full of natural light 2 bedrooms apartmemt facing to a beautiful park in the heart of Stockholm. 

Equipped with all the standard facilities and a lovely balcony overlooking the park and Sofia’s church, perfect for having breakfast or an aperitivo on.

The large main bedroom has a 180 cm wide double bed, while in the smaller second bedroom there’s a possibility of adding an extra folding bed. 
The dinner table comfortably seats up to six persons
listings.area_description:
Located next to vibrant area of Nytorget, filled with restaurants, cafes and shops, on one side. On the other side next door to the charming park Vitabergsparken, with its cultural heritage houses.

Bus stop located twenty meters from building entrance, with direct lines to the central station as well as other parts of the city centre. 

The metro can also be found within a five minute walking distance. All sorts of supermarkets can be found in the area.

And a charming balcony with a lovely view towards Stockholm skyline! Nice neighbourhood, just walking distance from the water and greenery. Also supermarkets and shopping at less than 1 km distance.

Street parking is available around the apartment, how ever ‘finding an empty spot’ is always a challenge in Stockh

Our place is centraly located with shops, cafés and communications just round the corner. You reach the metro in two minutes and the busstop in less than one. Green parks in the neighborhood.

Our apartment (120 m2) has three bedrooms and a living room. Two toilets. The kitchen is spacious. There are 4 beds and we also have two extras, if needed.

There is also a sauna in the house th
listings.area_description:
In this area of town (Södermalm) you will find both the trendy shops, cafés and bars, but also a lot of green spots perfect for picnics or for a swim. Only a ten/fifteen minutes walk from our place there is a nice little child friendly beach as well as some cliffs where you can dive (not for kids, though).

All the sightseeing spots like the Castle, the Modern Museum, the Old Town, etc are all reachable by foot approx. a half-hour.
listings.other_notes:
Very centraly located, vibrant with city life
Nice, green areas nearby and child friendly inner yard
Light and spacious apartment

Welcome to our bright and stylish apartment with authentic Södermalm feel. The apartment blends classic Stockholm architecture with warm, stylish interiors, natural light, and thoughtful details that make it feel like a real home.

From here, many of Stockholm’s highlights are within easy walking distance. You can walk to Old Town and several waterfront areas. Ferries to the Stockholm archipelago are also nearby, making it easy to take a day trip out to the islands.

details.full_area_description: Located on Södermalm our house is in a culturally classified area often depicted in literature. It is a small number of streets with small houses dating from the 17-19th century. The immediate area is famous for offering the most beautiful and spectacular view of of the city and its waters, a view we have been enjoying daily for almost 20 years and never tire of. Within minutes of walking distance you can reach the hip parts of town as regards cafés, restaurants, shops and nightlife and you can reach more or less all that Stockholm has to offer by foot, bike or public transportation. Really, this IS the best location for a visit to Stockholm, regardless of whether you are interested in culture or nature or both. And if you're a runner you can easily do anything between 5-15k along the waterfront daily.
details.full_other:
The amazing view of beautiful Stockholm.
Lovely private garden and historic neighbourhood.
Close to literally everything.

No smoking or animals.
50 euro cleaning fee
