details.place: Sankt Anton am Arlberg, TR, Österrike

details.full_description:
THE APPARTMENT: 
Newly renovated in Scandinavian design with a great view over Gärdet/Royal Djurgården and one of Sweden’s landmarks – Kaknästornet. One balcony and a roof terrace enables you to enjoy the Swedish summer at it’s best. 

THE NEIGHBORHOOD: 
The grean oasis The Royal Djurgården is just outside the doorstep, where you have almost all major tourist attractions such as Wasa museet, Skansen and Gröna lund within walking distance. The fashionable area Östermalm is quiet and safe and known for great restaurants and designer stores. City center (15 min walk or 2 min by subway).

THE AMAZING ARCHIPELAGO: 
You have walking distance to the boats taking you to the amazing archipelago in 45 min!

SHOPPING: 
Across the street you have a shopping mall, where you find everything you need such as – supermarket, fashion, restaurant, hair dressers, book shops etc etc. The city center is reached within a 15 min nice walk by the water or by 2 minutes on the subway. 

CULTURE: 
Lots and lots of things to do and see! And the best part, it’s within walking distance from the apartment. 

FOOD & DRINK: 
Stockholm is know for it’s cousin and you find both fine dining as well as nice local restaurants in the area. Lot’s of great options for cool bars – don’t hesitate to ask for tips!

FAMILY & KIDS: 
Children friendly area with lots of parks with playgrounds just around the corner. The amusement park Gröna Lund, the animal park Skansen and the wonderful Junibacken are all reached within a short walk.

APPARTMENT DETAILS
First floor
•	Social areas with connected kitchen, dining area and living room
Fully equipped kitchen and a dining table which easily seats 8 persons (12 with added leafs)
•	Smaller balcony with a sometimes magnificent view of the sunrise, which makes it the perfect place for a morning coffee. Why not run across the street to Valhallabageriet and pick up one of their specialties Kardemummabulle or sourdough bread?
•	Private master bedroom 
•	Bathroom w shower

Second floor
•	Second living / TV / play room with an open fireplace and roof window
Nintendo Wii and Xbox with various of games 
•	3 smaller bedrooms with desks and lots of toys/Lego
•	Separate WC
•	Laundry and shower

General
•	Wi-Fi
•	Bicycles in various sizes
•	Easy to find parking places outside the real estate
•	100 m to subway station (Karlaplan)
details.full_area_description:
Our apartment is located on Gärdet, a quiet and safe part of Östermalm, known as a one of the most fashionable areas of Stockholm. 

It’s perfectly located just by the national park the Royal Djurgården, a green oasis where you find several of the city’s top museums and attractions as well as several really nice cafes and restaurants. You reach two parks (Gustav Adolfsparken and Tessinparken) within minutes and just across the street you have the shopping mall Fältöversten with around 60 stores where you find everything you might need, food, drinks, fashion, toy store, library, bookstore, pharmacy, cafés, restaurants etc. 

If you want to go to the old town, you can either take a nice walk by the water, or hop on a bus / subway situated ca 100 m from our house. 

From Strömkajen or Strandvägen (also within a walking distance), you can reach a whole new world, the archipelago of Stockholm. This is something out of the ordinary and should not be missed! 

If you are interested in shopping, there are several interesting areas to visit, all reachable either by foot or 2-10 minutes by bus or subway.


If you’re interested to read more about Stockholm, I can recommend the sight: 

http://beta.stockholmtown.com/en/ 


But to mention some of the attractions to which you have walking distance you have:

Skansen 
A popular outdoor museum where you find both lots of Scandinavian animals (elks, wolfs etc) but also gives you a big piece of Swedish culture history with historical buildings. In the summer time, one of Sweden’s most popular TV-shows “Allsång på Skansen” is broad casted from here. Over 10 000 people comes to the big stage to sing along with national as well as international stars.

Gröna Lund 
An amusement park located just by the water front.

Vasa museet 
The most visited museum in Scandinavia, with over one million visitors a year. The Vasa is the only preserved seventeenth-century ship in the world, and a unique art treasure. More than 95 percent of the ship is original, and it is decorated with hundreds of carved sculptures.

Junibacken 
A story book world based on the beloved characters by Astrid Lindgren and other children’s authors. Here you will meet Pippi Longstocking, Madicken, Emil and many other and you can also take a journey through Astrid’s magical world in the Story Train. Don’t miss the kid-friendly café and the wonderful children’s bookstore where they also sell books in several languages.

Rosendals trädgård
One of our favorite places to spend a day for a picnic in the beautiful apple garden. If you don’t have the time to fix a picnic, they have a great café which serves delicious lunches!

Gamla stan (The old town)
This is where Stockholm was founded in 1252. This is a picturesque part of Stockholm, which is like a living pedestrian-friendly museum full of sights, attractions, restaurants, cafés, bars and places to shop. Gamla stan is one of the foremost attractions in Stockholm and well worth a visit!

The Royal Palace 
The Royal Palace is the official residence of His majesty the King of Sweden and is situated in Gamla Stan. The palace, which is the biggest palace in Europe with over 600 rooms, is open to the public and offers no less than five museums. 

Waxolmsbåtarna 
From Strömkajen, you can reach the fantastic archipelago of Stockholm. Whether you like to go for a short day trip or a longer trip, you can start your journey here. Really nice daytrips are Vaxholm, Fjäderholmarna, Grinda and Sandhamn. If you want to take longer excursions and explore the archipelago, several of the thousand small islands offer Bed & Breakfast and hostels. Read more on: http://www.waxholmsbolaget.se/visitor/archipelago-traffic/plan-trip/
http://www.archipelagofoundation.se/

NK 
The famous department store established in 1902, where you find international fashion, cosmetics, jewelry, crystals, design, fine foods and much more. Not the cheapest place to spend your holiday, but if you are interested in shopping of high quality, this is the place to go!
details.full_other:
Beautiful 4-bedroom penthouse with a view. One small balcony for enjoying breakfast coffee and a roof terrace for long hot summer nights.
Quiet yet central location, with walking distance to all major attractions in Stockholm. The Royal national park Djurgården just around the corner.
Reach the amazing archipelago in 45 min

The apartment is on the 5th floor (of 6) and overlooks the lake of Mälaren. It has three bedrooms and beds for 4 people. The apartment is made to entertain and has been in various interior magazines. You can use our California cruisers bikes and bikes around the whole city, you can easily walk, bike or scooter anywhere or swap cars if you like to. You have great restaurants and bars 5 min walk away. In the summer you can stroll down to the water in your bathrobe and swim (Stockholm is the capital of the world with the cleanest water!) There is a great big park for picnics, concerts and workout on the other side of the street and you have a 5 min walk to shopping malls and grocery stores.

You can easily take the airport coach from Skavsta or Arlanda Airport to the Central station and either walk 10 min to our home or take a bus or cab. 

We do not have to exchange simultaneously. we have a Lexus jeep to use if you want to exchange cars.
details.full_area_description:
It is one of the most popular neighbourhoods in the city thanks to the walking paths along the waterside and the closeness to the center of the city. Everything you need is within 10 min walking distance and the house is a lovely building from 1920 with a totally renovated apartment!

The area "Kungsholmen" is one of 7 islands Stockholm is built on and it is a safe and very nice area of town. Alot of small shops and restaurants. Everything is within walking distance and there are buses and subways easily taking you around if you do not enjoy walking.
details.full_other:
When you arrive in the city centre you can stroll in the area and enjoy the island of Old Town which is listed as cultured marked. You can take the ferry directly over to Djurgården where you will find the famous Wasa museum, wonderful parks in the middle of town as well as popular venues such as open-air museum Skansen and Prince Eugene's Waldemarsudde. Or you can take a 10 min walk and you will be right downtown Stockholm in the middle of the shopping centres!

Cleaning: We have a cleaning lady who always clean in our homes when you leave so there will be a cleaning fee that you can leave on the kitchen table (1000 SEK/approx 100 euros)

details.full_description:
Our apartment is a cosy place in the heart of the city. It is located on the 2nd floor of the building. The house is sheltered from traffic noise since our windows face the green and quiet courtyard on one side and a pedestrian and bicycle street on the other side , making the area incredibly quiet and perfect for restful nights. 
We have a cozy south-facing balcony that gets sunlight from early morning to afternoon during summer.

We moved in i July 2024 and we have been renovating the flat since then. Our home is already fully functional but we´re working on enhancing storage solutions, furnishing and the overall cozyness! More pictures are to come, as the rooms get ready and we aim to be fully done by late spring 2025.
  
The apartment is designed to maximize social spaces, with a living room featuring two sofas (one of which converts into an extra double bed, 160x200), seamlessly connected to the kitchen.
The living room features many bookshelves with litterature for adults and children, mainly in swedish and french.
The kitchen was completely rebuilt in 2024 and is equipped with everything a food enthusiast needs to cook. We have 2 high chairs for children (Stokke), one of which is also adaptable for babies (Stokke baby set) and even newborn (Stokke newborn set).

The bathroom has underfloor heating, a shower, a toilet, a washing machine and a foldable bathtub for children.

There are two large bedrooms and one smaller one.
One of the large bedrooms, the parents´ bedroom, is furnished with a double bed (160x200). The second has a baby crib from Stokke (it can either be “closed” to function as a crib for younger children or left open, making it suitable for children up to 8–10 years old) a futon (140x200, which can be folded into a sofa), and a changing table.

The smaller bedroom features a cozy single bed 90x200 cm with books and toys in underneath storage. It is somewhat surelevated but our firstborn daughter (3,5 years old) climbs up on it without problem thanks to the little shelves that serves as a ladder. The bed also has a removable safetyrack / bedrail aimed for young children.

Our cozy hallway is spacious, features underfloor heating and has plenty of room for strollers, shoes and jackets/coats.

The building has a very practical and spacious elevator that is fully accessible and can easily accommodate a few strollers, walkers or bicycles.
There´s a sauna and a gym in our building and the lush innergarden offers plenty of possibilties for fun activities : barbecue/grill, picknick tables, etc. There´s also a very popular watergame (a stream with a pump and floodgates) for children where they can spend hours playing! The innergarden is safely closed by two large gates making it a safe and easy place for the whole family to relax and enjoy outdoor time.
details.full_area_description:
We live in an incredibly cozy and child-friendly area, at the very heart of Södermalm. 

The apartment is close to wonderful allotment gardens (Tanto, Årstalunden), the large park areas Tanto, Drakenbergsparken, Medborgarplatsen, just a 5-minute walk from Tanto’s beach.

We have friendly neighbors since many of us are families with young children who know each other well. There are plenty of playgrounds, a popular children’s activity park, and an outdoor gym just a few minutes from our house.

The neighborhood also offers a variety of restaurants, bars, a wonderful artisan bakery (Svedjans Bageri), and grocery stores. About a 10 minutes walk to the west, you’ll find Hornstull and Långholmen, while an 8-minute walk to the east takes you to Mariatorget, with its array of cafés, second-hand shops, and theaters.
Take a walk or go for a run alongside lake Mälaren´s bank and enjoy breath-taking views!

Our place is very well connected to the public transportation system, with many bus lines and close to the metro´s red (Mariatorget) and green line (Medborgarplatsen) and even the communter train-system (Södra station). But if you´re able to, biking remains the nicest and most easy way to discover the city and roam around Södermalm with the expanding network of bike lanes connecting the city.

A bit further into the reserve there is a golf course and a small lake perfect for swimming and sunbathing. At summertime you can use our three adult bikes to go to the lake. It will take about 10 min by bike.

There is also a small public
listings.other_notes: This is our home and we expect our guest to take good care of it, as we will take care of your home. As so many other Swedish homes we have soft wooden flors and therefor ask our guests not to use shoes inside. No smoking inside.

details.full_description:
We live in the popular area Södermalm in central Stockholm. The beautiful six floor house was built in 1916, in so-called National Romanticism style. Our apartment is located one floor up in the house. It is very spacious with high ceiling (3 meters), with generous space for social life. The kitchen, bathroom and one of the two children's bedrooms are recently renovated. We love our two fully functional fire places and the balcony towards a beautiful and quiet backyard.

Comfortable living room with a big and cosy sofa, coffee table, 2 armchairs, fireplace (Swedish style), TV... 

Kitchen with a big table for 8 people, stove with integrated fan, 2 ovens with an integrated microwave oven, 2 refrigerators, 2 freezers, dishwasher, toaster, coffee machine...

Master bedroom with a double bed "king size" (180 cm/ 5.9 feet) and a working desk. 

Childrens bedroom with a bunkbed, the one on top is 90 cm and the one below is 120 cm, including many toys, next to the living room (sliding double doors between the two rooms). 

Another children's bedroom in connection to the balcony with a double put-up bed (160 cm) and a (children's) working desk. 

A "cosy room" with two single put-up beds (80 cm each) and an open fireplace. 

Bathroom with toilet, bathtub with shower, sink, washing machine and dryer.

Small guest toilet in connection to the entrance hall with toilet and sink. 

Our apartment is 133 square meters (1432 square feet). It has wifi, wooden floors, is quiet although we are located on a busy street (thanks to double glass windows), and ideal for a family with children. 

We live on the 1st floor. Entering the main gate from the street you have first a small stair (6 steps) and then an elevator. 

Do not hesitate to contact us for additional information.
details.full_area_description:
We live on the island Södermalm which has an abundance of places to eat and drink, foodshops, interesting small boutiques and galleries, parks and breathtaking panoramic views of Stockholm. 

Our apartment is situated in a lively neighbourhood a 100 meters from the street Fjällgatan and on walking distance to Monteliusvägen - two of the best viewpoints over Stockholm. We have the beautiful Vita Bergen park (Vitabergsparken) close by, which is a popular picnic hangout in summertime and popular for sledding with children in wintertime. You also find typical 19th century, red houses in the park, built for factory workers with families. 

The Stockholm Central Railway station is the central hub for travelling and there is a direct bus from there, with a bus stop immediately outside our gate (see picture). You travel easily wherever you want with local transport such as bus, subway and boats available close to our aparment. Nearest subway station is Medborgarplatsen. 

Together with the Old Town, Södermalm is considered the most popular area for tourists. 

We are on walking distance to the Old Town as well as to Slussen where boats leave to go to the Stockholm archipelago.
details.full_other:
Please no shoes in the apartment, no smoking/vaping indoors/on the balcony/in the backyard, no pets and no parties.

We do not have a cleaner and ask and expect that you will clean and restore our home to the condition that you found it.

We ask that our Home Exchange guests do not entertain additional visitors without our approval in advance. 

Sheets and towels available. 

Our apartment is our primary and only residence, which means that we are only able to make exchanges when we ourselves are away. 

Thomas' adult daughter and her daughter (born in 2022) might sometimes travel together with us.

listings.area_description: Really central location and yet close to parks, lakes and forests

details.full_description:
Jag älskar att ge människor möjligheten att njuta av vackra naturen, vattnet, parkerna och stora utbud av restauranger och livfullhet som området bjuder på. Självklart så  är jag stolt över vårt fina hem som är topp utrustad och är fylld med kärlek och värme. Jag gör mitt bästa att också ge er all hjälp som ni önskar under er vistelse tid!
Den ligger centralt och är ett populärt och fint område med mycket natur och restaurang liv.
details.full_area_description:
Helt enkelt ett guldläge! Kungsholmen är en ö i Stockholms innerstad, ca 15 min promenad till T-centralen och bara några meter till kollektivtrafik. Här finns ett stort utbud av restauranger och caféer, allt från mysiga kvarterskrogar till trendiga matställen.

Vi bor precis vid vattnet Mälaren, omgivna av flera parker – bl.a. Rålambshovsparken med utegym, scen, bio och skatepark – en av Stockholms största och mest populära. Det finns även en badstrand i närheten.

Du kan promenera längs vattnet, och på ca 10 minuter når du Stockholms Stadshus (med de tre guldkronorna på taket). Fridhemsplan – närmaste centrum – ligger bara 6 minuters promenad bort. Googla gärna Kungsholmen och Fridhemsplan!

details.full_description: Trevlig 4-rums lägenhet i centrala Stockholm 600 meter från Stadshuset. Ligger invid Norr Mälarstrand och Riddarfjärden. Fina promenader längs med vattnet och 15 minuters gångavstånd in till centrala city i Stockholm. Det finns trevliga barer och restauranger i närområdet och mycket enkelt att ta buss eller tunnelbana i Stockholm.
details.full_area_description: Ni bor centralt i en vacker del av Stockholm nära vattnet. På sommaren går det att bada från strandpromenaden eller från Smedsuddsbadet 1 km från lägenheten. Här hittarna små restauranger, caféer och barer nära lägenheten. Promenadavstånd till shopping och stadsliv i centrala Stockholm eller kulturarv med Stockholms slott, gamla stan eller operan.

Today it’s the centre for art studies (Konstfack) and the areas has gone through great changes over the past five, ten years, an development that continues. Parks and other recreations are close by, the fourth biggest lake in Sweden (Malaren) is only 20 minute from our home by walking. Downtown Stockholm is 13 minutes away by subway. Bicycles are availab
listings.other_notes: It's convenient, easy to handle and inspiring to spend time in!

listings.title: Spacious apartment with abundant natural light close to Stockholm city center.
listings.description:
Here you stay in a charming brick house, surrounded by trees and greenery. The apartment is bright, modern and spacious with a large combined living room and kitchen, two bedrooms, a work room, and a 7-meter long south-facing balcony.
4 minutes walk to the subway, and then 5 minutes on the train to the urban pulse of Södermalm. The apartment is fully equipped with all amenities. Perfect for up to 4 people. Welcome!
listings.area_description: Top floor with a view, surrounded by trees. The accommodation has a unique location, just a short walk from the scenic Nacka Nature Reserve, where you can enjoy cozy forest walks, swimming, and recreation. At the same time, you live close to the city, as it only takes four minutes to walk to the subway and then 5 minutes on the train to Södermalm and the city pulse.

listings.title: Anja's house
listings.description: We live on the 8th floor. Balcony. Bus below the house that takes you to Slussen in 4 minutes and to the city centre just another 10 minutes away. One room with a double bed and two children's rooms with beds. Large living room with spacious sofa, dining table. Kitchen with everything you need.
listings.area_description: It’s a quaiet house.

listings.title: Apartment in cozy Södermalm

listings.area_description: Located near Hornstull in Södermalm, you will have a large amount of great restaurants and the water is just a couple of meters away. Several nice walking paths nearby along the shores of Södermalm, Långholmen and Reimersholmen. 5 minutes walk to the metro station Hornstull (red line). We are happy to give suggestions of what to visit, see and taste!

listings.title: Cosy 3 bedroom apartment near nature, 20 min to city centre
listings.description:
Our spacious home is located a 2 min walk from Lake Trekanten and 5 min walk from Lake Mälaren which makes it a bathrobe distance. Don't be surprised if people walk around with bathrobes on sometimes. It is common to take a late afternoon swim when all the families went home for supper with the kids. 

Otherwise it's a family friendly neighborhood with parks nearby.

If you're interested in history, Alfred Nobel had his dynamite factory just a walking distance from our house. Don't be alarmed, t
listings.area_description:
Gröndal is a small town in a big city. Friendly and warm surrounded by Lake Mälaren and nature.
Surrounded with lakes with swimming and sunbathing oppurtunities
It's 15-20 min to the city centre but still a feel to a small town
listings.other_notes: This is our primary home so we are looking for people who respect and can take care of our home as it would be their own.

Welcome to our home! We're delighted to offer a modern Scandinavian-style apartment that blends simplicity with comfort. Thoughtfully decorated with clean lines and curated artworks from our travels, the apartment has the polished comfort of a boutique hotel — serene, stylish, and uncluttered.

Located on the first floor (with elevator access), the apartment opens onto a small balco
listings.area_description:
Our apartment is located on Kungsholmen, a vibrant island in the heart of Stockholm. With its relaxed atmosphere, stylish waterfront promenades, and abundance of cafés, restaurants, and bars, Kungsholmen strikes the perfect balance between city energy and neighborhood charm.

You’ll find yourself just a short stroll from Stockholm City Hall, a stunning landmark with panoramic views, and within walking distance of Gamla Stan, the city’s beautifully preserved Old Town with winding cobblestone stre
listings.other_notes:
Our apartment is tucked away in a peaceful, elevated setting that offers a welcome escape from the city’s energy — yet it’s still wonderfully central. The location is quiet and discreet, making it easy to unwind after a day of exploring.

For effortless city access, there’s a T-Bana (metro) entrance

Central, but still quiet location.

House built in 2019 - everything is fresh and modern. 
We live with two small children, perfect for small family or couples who want to explore Stockholm.

Easy access to the city center by tram, bus or bicycle. There is a ferry going directly to Djurgården and city center 10 min away from our house.

listings.title: Quiet oasis near 2 lakes, 20 min from the center!

listings.title: Nice apartment in Central Stockholm, Vasastan
listings.description: Nice apartment located on the second floor. There is three bedrooms and also a fold down bed in the living room. Nice and renovated kitchen and bathroom with an extra toilet. There is a back yard with furnitures with easy access only a half a stair down. I have a small 3,5 kilos dog, a poodlemix, who’s allergy friendly and she does not shed any fur.
listings.area_description: My apartment is located in a very nice area in central Stockholm, called Sankt Eriksplan/Birkastan. Lots of nice cafes and restaurants in the neighborhood. There is a cool movie theater next door, Capitol, which is worth a visit. Subway and buses are just around the corner and walking distance in to city center.
listings.other_notes: I´m very flexible with both dates and whereabouts your home is located. I would very much like to have a longer swap, like a month, if possible. If you have a small garden or terrass where I can have my morning coffee that would be amazing!

We have three rooms, (68 sqm.), a WC and a bathroom and a kitchen;

We have one regular bedroom with a bed for two. A living room and a dining

There are a lot of small parks and restaurants and bars nearby and cinemas, theatres and shopping mall at walking distance.

- Buzzy restaurants: Nytorget 6, Eriks, Urban Deli, Akkurat

A block away there is a popular restaurant street. In ten minutes you can walk to the canal and be in nature. In another direction after 15 minutes you are in Stockholms large Haga park (with the home of our crown princess Victoria). Another fifteen minute walk and you are downtown.

City centre with bus outside, and front garden

listings.title: Family-friendly home in Hammarbyhöjden (only 6 minutes to Södermalm and 11 to the center)
listings.description:
Welcome to our cosy and family-friendly apartment, ideal for relaxing while making the most of the surroundings!

We have two bedrooms, one large with a double bed and a smaller one with a crib, a fully equipped kitchen, as well a warm and peaceful living room with a bed sofa thanks to the terrace and the forest beside the apartment.
listings.area_description: Located in a quiet residential neighborhood, our home is just minutes from local shops, cafes and parks. We love the friendly atmosphere of our neighborhood, easy access to public transport, and above all our friendly neighbors. The city center is a 11 minutes tube ride, so you can enjoy the best of both worlds: peaceful surroundings and city life.

listings.other_notes:

- Beautiful parks and water around the corner!

details.full_description: Summer of 2025 mostly looking for exchange in Britain. Our flat is in an old house from 1892. It's located at Mariaberget which is one of the most desired locations in Stockholm. The flat is cosy with great social spaces, and we love to live here! details.full_area_description: Our flat is in the heart of Södermalm, one of Stockholm’s islands. Just around the corner there are retro shops, restaurants, bars, cafés and pubs. It is walking distans to parks, the old town, beaches and much more. You can walk to the ferry to Djurgården and the amusement park Gröna Lund.
details.full_other:
The metro is three minutes away. You can reach the most of Stockholm easily with the metro or take a boat out in the archipelago.

Some will say that Södermalm is the cultural and hipster neighbourhood of Stockholm. You will find vegan restaurants, indie music clubs, tiny cafés serving the most elaborated ecological coffee, retro shops and falafel bars just blocks away. And just a couple of minutes walk from our home you will find the most stunning view over Stockholm (Monteliusvägen and Ivar Los park). Perfect for an evening picnic. 

If you're into mountainbiking, the hosts can give you the best guide to Stockholm's trails. The hosts can also provide you with the best dining guide to Södermalm.

details.place: City of New York, United States

details.full_description:
Our home is elegant, comfortable and tasteful, placed in a building from 1928 in one of the most popular neighbourhoods in town. The apartment is a perfect choice for a family with high demands or friends travelling together. 

The apartment, built in 1930, is 144 sqm with three bedrooms. There are two bathrooms with showers. There is also an additional restroom. The living room is cozy with a smart-TV connected to the internet. Our kitchen has most of the amenities you may wish for such as oven, stove, dish washer, microwave, fridge and freezer, large countertops with a big dining table seating 10 in the center of the room. We have high speed internet and a sound system throughout the apartment which is connected to Spotify and other music communities. The bedroom's beds are 160 cm, 160 cm and 105 cm wide respectively.

The balcony is facing a spacious green courtyard and on a sunny day the balcony is flooded in sun from lunch to late afternoon.
details.full_area_description:
Close by the apartment is the very beautiful royal park Hagaparken where you can go for a  morning run or visit the Butterfly House Museum or walk by the castle where the crown princesses family lives. 
Within a minutes walk you are at Odenplan where you can go shopping or go to a café. Right next to Odenplan you have Vasaparken, a city park full of leisure and family fun. From Odenplan you can go by subway or commuter train anywhere in the wider Stockholm area. And from Odenplan you can also reach the city centre within 10-15 minutes walk.

The Vasastan area is a hip neighbourhood full of restaurants, coffee shops and bars.
details.full_other:
Location is lovely, central and fun
Our home is modern and very comfortable.
The apartment is close to both nature and city life

listings.description: I live in the most amazing building from the 30’s and my neighbors are friendly and social. My apartment is not big but very homey. A perfect place for one or two persons who need a place to relax while exploring Stockholm. There’s a 120cm bed. There’s also a couch that a lot of my friends sleep in, or a mattress that you can put on the floor in the living room.
listings.area_description: Midsommarkransen is a quiet but still lively neighborhood. It’s close to as well restaurants and bars, as nature and swimming. It’s only 10 minutes with public transport or 20 minutes with bike from the central parts of Stockholm.

listings.title: Big apartment in the heart of the city. Close to restaurants, shops, parks and little beach.

The appartment has a big balcony where you can sit and enjoy

We have several supermarkets in the area, a shopping mall 10 minutes walk from us, several gyms as well as nice cafées and restaurants.

It is also close to the water, green parks for nice walks, biking, the zoo, museums or the Gröna Lund amusement park. We have kickbikes and children b
listings.other_notes:
Walking distance to the best of Stockholm.
It's spaceous, light and child friendly.
It has a big balcony with evening sun.
Close to the beach (10 min walk) and outdoor public pool (30 min walk/10min by bus)

details.full_description:
A five room apartment, 119 sqm in beautiful and cozy Södermalm, Stockholm. Fully equpped with dishwasher, washing machine and dryer as well as everything you need in a kitchen to prepare every meal. We have two bathrooms, one with a tub/shower, and one with a shower. We have a master bedroom for grownups with a brand new continental bed, one bedroom for a child with a queen size bed and another bedrom for a younger child with a 90 bed. The appartment has a big balcony where you can sit and enjoy dinner or drinks. Smoking is ONLY allowed on the balcony. The immediate area has lots of parks and playgrounds, several large supermarkets and lots of bars and restaurants. 15minutes walking distance to the beach. 

We have plenty of plants so be prepared to water them at least once/week, I will leave you thorough instructions.

listings.title: Spacious flat in central Stockholm
listings.description: Wonderful flat at trendy Södermalm in the centre of Stockholm. 152 m2, 4 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms (one with shower, one with bathtub) and a balcony. Our kitchen is fully equipped and you can prepare all your meals at home or just step outside and you have numerous restaurants and cafés to choose between. The magazine Vogue has recently listed "The 15 Coolest Neighborhoods in the World" and Södermalm is no 3!
listings.area_description: The café Johan & Nyström is the best in Sweden according to White guide and it's just around the corner.
listings.other_notes:
Sunny flat at the best spot in Stockholm.
Big rooms, all with first class continental beds.
Subway and commuter train around the corner.

listings.description: We are interested in design and have put a lot of time and money into our home, where we want to express our personalities and a warm and welcoming environment.
listings.area_description: We are placed in the best spot of Stockholm with a huge national park and water right outside our door. It's only 10 min with the bus or bike to the city of the town.

listings.title: Bright flat in hip Södermalm
listings.description:
Cozy apartment on hipster's paradise in Stockholm: Södermalm. 

I'm currently working on some changes in the apartment so it will definitely be greener once you'll get here to feel like at after exploring the hippest island of Stockholm. The floors are newly done, big windows which invites the light in and also perfect to just sit there and observe what's happening on the streets - great for a glass of something and some people watching.
listings.area_description:
Just a few steps away from the water and some minutes to the green islands Långholmen and Reimersholme. Amazing spots for swimming or kayaking in the summer or nice autumn/winter walks. A lot of cafés, bars and great little restaurants in this area and not even a minute walking to the subway station Hornstull. 

I will provide you with my impeccably curated food guide, so you won't miss out on the best restaurants in town!
listings.other_notes:
Nice things to have:
- dishwasher
- Bang & Olufsen speaker
- projector for movie nights
- big comfy bed (180x200cm)
- elevator in the building

listings.title: Elizabets private room
listings.description: My home is in a classic building from 1886 with walking distance to the central Stockholm. It’s located in Östermalm close to subway and buses. But you can walk all over, also to the old city Gamla Stan, the opera house and the kings castle. It is also close to boats where you can take a trip to the archipelago. Jogging areas are very near.
listings.area_description: City centre with old fancy buildings

listings.title: Unique apartment with a fantastic location in central Stockholm
listings.description:
My apartment is conveniently located near the water on a hill at one of Stockholm´s most attractive addresses on the island Sodermalm. The area has a picturesque and charming character with a blend of history and modern culture. Surrounded by houses, cobblestone streets, and lamps from the 18th century my home offers you a quiet countryside feeling in the middle of the city pulse.

The location makes it easy for you to discover Stockholm by foot, bus subway (just a block form the apartment) or a
listings.area_description: My home is the perfect base from which to launch yourselves into the beautiful dynamism of Stockholm. Great location with walking distance to everything you’ll need.
listings.other_notes: I love travelling all over the world. I am flexible about destinations and dates.

listings.title: Cosy flat in central Stockholm
listings.description: A beautiful "fin-de-siècle" apartment newly renovated with old details preserved. The apartment has a great deal af charm with carefully selected interior design and furniture, and a luxurious bathroom with bathtube and shower.
listings.area_description:
The apartment is located in the heart of Stockholm city, only 50 m away from the busy fridhemsplan where you can find any service and shopping you need. If you walk 100 m in the other direction you reach the waterline and one of Stockholms most famous and busy parks and even a small sandbeach where you can swim summertime. 

With a 15 min walk you reach the royal castle and the old town of Stockholm.

listings.title: Peaceful, Top-Floor Apartment neighboring nature reserve
listings.description:
This south-facing apartment overlooks treetops and the glimmering water of Årstaviken. The large windows fill the top-floor property with sunshine while the ceiling height of 3.5 meters makes it spacious. In addition, the absence of busy nearby roads provides a quiet living space devoid of traffic noise.  

Relax in beautiful and comfortable furniture from Svenskt Tenn after a day in town.
The king-sized SISSI bed from Pauly is an experience in itself. Try sleeping in one of the world's most lux

It borders Söder's famous allotments and is only 300 meters from an inviting jetty. Here you can enjoy peace and quiet in the middle of the big city! In addition, you are close to Stockholm's largest bathing complex, Eriksdalsbadet, which offers adventure pools and outdoor swimming. Along the promenade, you will also find Söder's best outdoor gym. You can walk along the Årstaviken shoreline and enjoy cozy cafes, restaurants, and bars.
If you are interested in football, there is a nice football f

The very big living room has a crystal chandelier and a fireplace in form of a tiled stove. The guest room has TV, a piano and a sofa bed for two grownup persons. The bathroom has tiles, bathtub and is floorheated. From the kitchen you can open t

The area where we live is "K-märkt" (i.e. culture-marked) due to its buildings from the beginning of the 20th century. details.full_description:
Our home is a charming, nice four room apartment in a house from the beginning of the 20th century in central Stockholm. 

The apartment has a large hall, one bedroom, a large living room, a large kitchen, one guestroom, one bathroom and an office room. The very big living room has a crystal chandelier and a fireplace in form of a tiled stove. The guest room has TV, a piano and a sofa bed for two grownup persons. The bathroom has tiles, bathtub and is floorheated. From the kitchen you can open the door to the balcony that is situated towards the beautiful green inner-yard where you can have breakfast or dinner if you want to.  
 
The house is situated on a height close to the Old Town in Stockholm and within 200 m you have a wonderful view of Stockholm with lots of water and islands. Even though you are in central Stockholm, close to shopping areas and restaurants the neighboring streets has very little traffic.
details.full_area_description:
The house is situated at Mosebacke Square, on Södermalm, one of the islands that Stockholm is built upon. It is very close to the Old Town in central Stockholm. The area where we live is "K-märkt" (i.e. culture-marked) due to its buildings from the beginning of the 20th century. Within walking distances you have the Old Town, lots of shopping areas, market hall, restaurants, pubs, ferries to the archipelago and Finland, green parks and the best view of Stockholm and its inlet. 

Stockholm is a very beautiful city. The town has lots of museums, theaters, outdoor cafes, restaurants, golf clubs, hiking tracks, shopping areas, amusement park, etc, etc. Stockholm is built on islands so you are always close to water. The incredible archipelago with 30000 islands is easy accessible by an extensive net of boatlines. 

From central Stockholm you can also make boattrips to Finland (Helsinki, Turku, Aland) , Estonia (Talinn) and Latvia (Riga) . From Nynashamn (57 km south of Stockholm) you can make boattrips to Gotland and the historical, medieval town of Visby.
details.full_other:
Our home is on a height close to the Stockholm Old Town with a wonderful view of Stockholm.
Stockholm has a lovely archipelago and is built on islands and therefore you are always close to water
Stockholm has many good restaurants

listings.title: Martina's apartment
listings.description:
Welcome to our unique and cozy apartment, a home with great character and comfort. It is 187 square meters big and was originally built as an art studio, hence the amazing windows and light. 

There are three bedrooms with space for up to 8 people. 

The heart of our home is the kitchen, equipped with top-tier Gaggenau kitchenware. Designed with social cooking in mind, it ensures that every meal is not just food but an experience to be shared and cherished.

With its breathtaking 4-meter high ce
listings.area_description: Our home sits in the vibrant heart of Södermalm, Stockholm, perfectly positioned next to major transport links, including metro, bus, and commuter train services. Just a stone's throw away is Tantolunden, one of Södermalm's largest parks, where you can enjoy a refreshing dip in the lake or a stroll. The area is bustling with many fantastic bars and restaurants, ensuring you're never far from a memorable dining experience or a lively night out.

details.full_description:
Welcome to our unique and cozy apartment, a home with great character and comfort. It is 187 square meters big and was originally built as an art studio, hence the amazing windows and light. 

There are three bedrooms with space for up to 8 people. 

The heart of our home is the kitchen, equipped with top-tier Gaggenau kitchenware. Designed with social cooking in mind, it ensures that every meal is not just food but an experience to be shared and cherished.

With its breathtaking 4-meter high ceiling, our living room creates an airy, open atmosphere that perfectly complements the colorful, cozy decor. Large windows frame the stunning views of Södermalm, inviting the city's charm into your living room. We have a 75 cm disco ball hanging from the ceiling, ready to transform the space into your private dance floor, a favorite feature for our family, especially with our spirited two-year-old.

The main bathroom is spacious, complete with a bathtub. Additionally, there's a smaller second bathroom, finished in marble.

Our two-year-old has a room with a wide array of toys. It's a space where little ones hopefully can dive into their world of adventure and creativity :)

We have a projector coupled with a Chromecast or HDMI-cable, where you can stream anything from your devices directly onto the big screen. The room features a spacious sofa with plenty of room for your movie-night. During a sunny day, there might however be too much light in the room to enjoy the movie properly. .

Accessibility is easy, but please note that the elevator only runs to floor five and that you must walk the last staircase to floor six independently.
details.full_area_description: Our home sits in the vibrant heart of Södermalm, Stockholm, perfectly positioned next to major transport links, including metro, bus, and commuter train services. Just a stone's throw away is Tantolunden, one of Södermalm's largest parks, where you can enjoy a refreshing dip in the lake or a stroll. The area is bustling with many fantastic bars and restaurants, ensuring you're never far from a memorable dining experience or a lively night out.

listings.title: Charlotte's house
listings.description: Welcome to our cosy home in Södermalm, Stockholm.
listings.area_description: Located in the middle of Södermalm. Close to the city centre, popular restaurants and parks.

listings.title: The "Tree House" Apartment - 10 minutes from hip Södermalm
listings.description:
The apartment features an impressive number of windows that form a long row throughout the living room, kitchen, and bedroom. These create a seamless flow of light from sunrise to sunset and offer unobstructed views. The unique floor plan utilises the angles and eight windows to create a sense of spaciousness and a panoramic view.

Situated in a well-kept property from the late 1950s, the apartment exudes a clear 1960s charm with many period details preserved.
listings.area_description: Located in Hägersten/Gröndal, a mere 10 minutes from the city, the home offers a serene, small-town atmosphere with plenty of greenery, while being easily accessible to the City by Tram or Subway, or a short bike ride away. A staircase just outside the apartment leads to the high street, with access to the tram and buses, and convenience stores and supermarket. Nearby, you'll find Vinterviken's scenic promenade, Lake Trekanten with seasonal swimming and skating, and the bustling hub of Liljeholm
listings.other_notes: We have a lovely cat who’s name is Nino who is super social and cuddly, well behaved and calm, so he comes with the apartment in most cases. If that’s a problem, we can discuss him staying somewhere else, but if you love animals, we're sure Nino will only enhance your stay!

listings.title: Mauricio’s house
listings.description: A cozy, funky apartment on Furusundsgatan with a playful twist on Swedish style—clean lines, warm lighting, pops of color, and plants everywhere. Relaxed, stylish, and full of personality.
listings.area_description: Gärdet is a vibrant, green neighborhood in Stockholm known for its wide open spaces, modernist architecture, and relaxed vibe—perfect for morning runs, picnics, or just soaking up the city.

listings.title: Cozy terrace house just outside Stockholm
listings.description: A nice and spacious three floor terrace house with a cozy patio and a small quaint garden. The house has two bathrooms with showers, a nice fully equipped kitchen. The second floor has a relaxing master bedroom with a king size bed, and two  smaller bedrooms. The third floor bedroom offers privacy and coziness with its slanted ceiling.
listings.area_description: The house is situated in a quiet suburban neighborhood north of Stockholm, and is surrounded by green areas, forests, golf courses and farmland. Just three minute you find a supermarket, a local coffee shop, a pizza place and the light rail station, where the train takes you to central Stockholm in 25 minutes. A 15 minute car ride away you find swimming lake, hiking trails and other recreational destinations. One of Stockholms biggest malls is situated a ten minute train or car ride away.

listings.title: Margareta's house
listings.description:
Our apartment is on the top floor and full of light. It has big windows and a balcony facing a green park. 

The apartment has a large living room, a modern kitchen seating 8 people. It has three bedrooms including one master bedroom, and two bedrooms with single beds. 

There is one bathroom with a bathtub and shower, washing machine and a dryer. There is also another smaller bathroom.
listings.area_description:
Our apartment is located in Östermalm, one of Stockholms most popular elegant, quiet residential areas close to both nature and some of the citys best restaurants and cafés. 

The building is on a quiet side street next to a small park with a playground for children.

Walking distance to Strandvägen with boats departing to the archipelago, the Vasa museum and many other sites. 

The underground is just five minutes away and busses stop around the corner.
listings.other_notes: Close to Djurgården and the amusement park Gröna Lund. Boats to the archipelago are departing nearby. The city center is within walking distance with museums and restaurants.

details.full_description: My home is an 80m2, beautiful apartment in the heart of Stockholm's trendy 'Sofo' district, with a balcony and a small sauna, and plenty of space to entertain. There is a large open plan, L-shaped living room, which has the main living area with sofa and TV with apple tv, netflix, etc. and dining room with capacity for 8 people, as well as a very well equipped kitchen with large fridge freezer, oven, microwave, dishwasher, coffee machines and all the utensils you could need! The main double bedroom which has the balcony leads off the living room, with a king size bed and dressing table. The spare bedroom leads off the kitchen, which can either function as the office, or with the pull out sofa bed it becomes a small double bed. It comfortably sleeps 1, but 2 people could squish in there!
details.full_area_description:
My apartment is located on Stockholm's trendy south island, 'Södermalm'. We live on the main street 'Götgatan' with all of its shops, restaurants and bars, yet being on the 6th floor the apartment still remains peaceful! Södermalm has beautiful architecture, museums and viewpoints of the whole city, but also many trendy restaurants, bars and brunch spots. You can walk to 'Gamla Stan' (the old town island which is very popular with tourists) in around 15 minutes from our place. 
The entrance to the metro is literally right next door so it's a great base to explore all of the city and surrounding areas if you want to go further afield. Transport to the airport takes around 45 minutes door to door.
details.full_other:
There are communal washing machines and dryers on the ground floor of the building which are free to use. There is also a communal garden which in the summer time has a barbecue and outdoor furniture.
Please note that I have a dog (Wolfie), so the apartment may not be suitable for those of you with allergies. I have a dog allergy usually and I'm not allergic to her, but others might be. I have a regular cleaner, but it's good to note!

listings.title: Beautiful apartment in middle of Södermalm
listings.description: An old beautiful typical Stockholm apartment. The apartment contains of three bedrooms, kitchen and a large Livingroom. The apartment has a old charm but it is newly renovated and has therefor everything you would expect from a modern home.

If you're looking for a coffee or perhaps a Fika then you are in no doubt at the right place as the area has a countless amount of coffee shops and different restaurants.

Situated just metres from the water, with a view of natural reserves you still have some of the best restaurants and shopping a short walk away. 
The apartment is 80 m2 with 2 bedrooms, 1 living room, 1 bathroom, kitchen and a balcony. We recently renovated the entire place, so everything is new and modern. 
The kitchen is equipped with everything you need, such as oven, big fridge and freezer, induction stove, dishwasher, a grain mill etc. The kitchen table has room for 6 people. 
The master be
listings.area_description: Having lived in various parts of Stockholm for 20/40 years, we find this to be the best place you can find. Located in a quiet part of Södermalm with nature right outside the door, you find some of the best restaurants and nightlife just a 10 min walk away. Still, the immediate surroundings are very quiet and beautiful. To walk or jog along the water is highly recommended. Take a 10 min walk and 5 min train ride and you are in the very center of Stockholm.

listings.title: Newly renovated in the heart of Södermalm

Third smaller bedroom with singlebed but also small workspace.

Bathroom with shower and combined washingmachine, you can also use the separate washingroom in the building (we don`t but it`s available and very nice actually)

Fully equipped

details.full_description:
Newly renovated charming and effficent apartment with three bedrooms in the center of Stockholm and trendy Södermalm. 

Two big bedrooms facing the street. One master with doublebed and the other with single bed possible to share. Both with small workspace. 
Third smaller bedroom with singlebed but also small workspace.

Bathroom with shower and combined washingmachine, you can also use the separate washingroom in the building (we don`t but it`s available and very nice actually)

Fully equipped kitchenarea with barstools and all you need dishwasher. We usually gather here during weekdays. 
Kitchentable with four-six seatings facing the fireplace. 

Livingroomarea in the open space for TV-nights at home with window to the quiet backyard, no view to talk about really but nice to just hang out in this space. 

Backyard is furnished and available to sit and relax if you want.

On the addict there`s a small terrace with view over the nearby rooftops, very nice to sit here and relax with a drink or just hang out, bookable on a calendar just outside very easy and we sit there sometimes just for a coffee. 

(Will update with new images from the apartment shortly!)
details.full_area_description: Trendy and centrally located apartment but still very quiet and relaxed although it’s just where you want to be. Good wifi, charming, three bedrooms and combined dining and social area.
details.full_other:
You have restaurants and the hippest and most interesting area of Stockholm, Södermalm, just outside the doorstep and round the corner is restaurants,shops and cafes. 
Also very nearby is the public bath Forsgrenska badet, or outside bath Eriksdalsbadet a little bit further but still close in walking distance. There is also very nearby a public outdoor gym and great walking area along the Årstaviken water, we usually take a walk there on the weekends. Along it there is small cafes and places to relax and look at the stockholmers taking care of their boats or jogging or walking - why don't you bring your trainingshoes and go for it yourself? 
But the best part is having the best part of Stockholm just around the corner, nice cafe for breakfast cross the street, shops and restaurants is just outside your doorstep.

We love our home and we think you will too :-)

listings.title: Lisa's house
listings.description:
Small, cozy and central to the Haga/NW part of Stockholm. Next to Karolinska hospital. I dont have a Tv, but there is wifi and if you need to work, there is an extra monitor.
If it matters to you, bedding is ecological and cleaning has been done with ecological products :)
listings.area_description: This is my small home in Hagastaden a part of stockholm city. Haga parken is around the corner for nature and a small beach. St Eriksplan & Odenplan are two main stations 10-15 min walk away, from there you fint the tube and commuter train. Close to the hospital Karolinska.

listings.title: Central Stockholm - looking for London and Paris 2024
listings.description:
3 bdr apt in central Sthlm, in popular Sodermalm. Each bedroom has a 120 cm bed. Also 1 extra bed 90cm available. Two of the bedrooms are quite small since they used to be one large room.

Apartment is fully equipped with washing machine, dishwasher, kettle, stove, owen, microwave owen, toaster and coffee machine.

Spacious livingroom with balcony and a TV with Chrome Cast.

One bathroom with toilet, bathtub, shower and washing machine. Plus one extra toilet.

WiFi is available throughout the ap
listings.area_description:
The apartment is situated in a peaceful part of the inner city. Many parks close by and 5 minute walk to the water front.

Several bus lines serve the area. Bus line 2 takes you to Slussen next to Gamla stan (Old Town) where you can go by boat to Djurgården with museums, Gröna Lund (amusement park) or walk Västerlånggatan and Drottninggatan thorugh the city. Bus 2 and 66 stop right outside the building.

Only five minutes on foot takes you to trendy Nytorget with numerous cafes and restaurants.
listings.other_notes: Parking is available on the streets in my neighbourhood at a cost

listings.title: Comfortable, open-plan home in the heart of Södermalm.
listings.description: We have a comfortable and family-friendly home in the heart of bustling Södermalm, with an open view from the kitchen and bedrooms onto a quiet, leafy churchyard.
listings.area_description: Södermalm is where to come for trendy Swedish cafés, classic restaurant dining, vintage shopping, and the like. However, like all of Stockholm, it's built on islands so there are beaches and waterfronts and views of the sea within walking or biking distance in any direction. You're also a short walk from the major subway and ferry lines that can take you around the city, or out into the archipelago.

Second balcony with gym equipment like cross trainer (quite old but working) and other gym stuff.
listings.area_description: Björkhagen is situated just 15 min from city center with subway but still feels like being in the country side. Near by forests and lake (for swimming) is just 10 min away by bike.  Lots of playgrounds for kids and also some descent restaurants for take out just around the corner.

listings.title: Cozy flat in the heart of Stockholm - perfect for a relaxing & central stay!
listings.description: Welcome to our cozy and comfortable flat in the heart of town! Tucked away in a peaceful courtyard, our luminous and spacious apartment is the perfect place to unwind after a long day of exploring. We have a lovely piano for you to play and plenty of books to read. Our open kitchen is fully equipped with everything you need to whip up a delicious meal, including a kettle, KitchenAid, blender, and more. The art on our walls will make you feel right at home. Our flat is perfect for two people, and
listings.area_description: Welcome to Kungsholmen, one of Stockholm's most vibrant neighborhoods! Our home is located just a stone's throw away from the beautiful waterfront, perfect for a morning stroll or an afternoon picnic. The area is filled with great restaurants, cozy cafes, and lovely parks. You'll find everything you need just around the corner, from grocery stores to local boutiques. Plus, with easy access to public transportation, you can explore all that Stockholm has to offer. We can't wait for you to explore

listings.title: Private room in Stockholm city
listings.description:
Cosy fully furnished room in shared apartment on the second floor of a building from 1931 with a nice common backyard, situated in a very beautiful neighborhood, a 7 minute walk to the metro station Rådhuset and 2 minutes to the central station.

The room is ideal for ONE person who wants to experience Stockholm.

The kitchen is equipped with everything you need to make food if you like.

The shared small bathroom with window is basic with a shower and a washer/drier.

Free wifi is available thr
listings.area_description: There are several buses very close, less than 100 meters.

1 bed and one sleeping loft.
listings.area_description: Nice neighbourhood, quet part iof ”hectic” Södermalm. Near to the City City and the old town.

listings.area_description: It has cosy cafes, restaurants, bars and cool vintage shops and a gorgeous park within walking distance- vintviken. A lovely area to spend an afternoon.
listings.other_notes: Enjoy, have fun, and make yourself at home!

listings.area_description: I live walking distance to the city centre, 5min walk to shops, park, city beach. 3min to publoc transport.

listings.title: 3-room (88m2). Best location
listings.description:
3-room (88m2. Best location

3-room (88m2) apartment situated in Vasastan, and in one of Stockholm's most idyllic streets. This stylish apartment is in excellent condition, modern renovated and furnished.

The popular neighborhood in the Red Mountains has charming streets in peaceful location. Red mountains surrounded by parks and green areas in Solvändan, Vasa Park and Haga Park. Close to subway (450m), highway E4 (500m), Airbus (200m), Food market (250m), Main City Walking Street (1.4 km).
listings.area_description:
Read more: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vasastan,_Stockholm

Röda Bergen ("Red Mountains"), the hilly area just north of Birkastan, was unsuitable for the regular and perpendicular street pattern envisaged for Vasastaden, but proved excellent for the new city planning ideals where the terrain was allowed to govern city plans. The plan for Röda Bergen was designed by P O Hallman, who during the 1910s also produced similar plans for Lärkstaden inspired by the ideas of Austrian architect Camillo
listings.other_notes:
Best location in Stockholm
Modern design and furniture
Large

listings.title: Drömlägenhet precis vid Slussen. Stor terass och panoramautsikt över Stockholm
listings.description:
*NOT AVAILABLE 2026* 

Upptäck Stockholm från vår drömlägenhet precis vid Slussen!

Välkommen till en drömlägenhet mitt i hjärtat av Stockholm. Denna 3-rums lägenhet på 90 kvm är den perfekta basen för att utforska allt som Stockholm har att erbjuda.

Privat terrass på 30kvm där du kan njuta av panoramautsikt över Gamla stan, Skeppsholmen, Djurgården och Stockholms hamninlopp. Drick ditt morgonkaffe med en enastående vy och upplev solnedgången över stadens tak på kvällen.
listings.area_description: Lägenheten ligger 200m från Slussen, vilket ger dig enkel tillgång till all kollektivtrafik och gör det enkelt att utforska hela Stockholm. Omgivningen är full av restauranger, barer och butiker, och du har nära till alla stadens stora sevärdheter.

Even though it´s not the biggest of places it fits a twin bed in one room, a separate kitchen and separate living room. The balcony plus that the apartment is on the fitfth of five floors makes for a really light place, and you can gaze at the sky or the rooftops of the sur
listings.area_description: The area has many nice bars, cultural scenes, theaters etc. It´s a well-off, comfortable and safe area and you have a 3 minute walk to the subway and the regional train.

It has a spatious living room, a large kitchen and bathrum (with washing mashine, bathtube and separate shower) and three bedrooms. There is a lovely garden behind the house, shared with neighbours in the house, with fruit trees, flowers and a small playground for the kids. 

We live some 5 minutes walk from the metro station Aspudden, from where you can take the train to the city center (12 minutes). If you rather p
listings.other_notes:
It has a lovely shared garden - ideal for afternoon naps and BBQ!
The appartment har large, light rooms; a big kitchen and a spatious bathroom.
Only 12 minutes by metro to the city center - and 15 minutes walk to the lake!

Located in the lively Årsta neighborhood, our spacious 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom top-floor apartment combines comfort and convenience. Recently renovated, it features a modern, newly updated kitchen and a private balcony – perfect for relaxing with a morning coffee or evening drink.

The apartment offers an open-plan living area, creating a bright and airy space where the whole family can gather. With plenty of natural light, it’s a cozy and inviting space to unwind after a day of exploring.

For yo

Årsta Torg (2 minute walk) – A charming local area with cafes, restaurants, and shops.

Lilla Årstaviken (5 minutes walk) – A scenic lake perfect for walking or cycling.

Tele2 Arena (4 minutes by public transport) – A popular venue for concerts and events.

listings.description: Welcome to our peaceful and comfortable home, nestled in the heart of Stockholm's most vibrant district, but with an expansive view over the well-known Maria Magdalena Church.
listings.area_description: Södermalm is the cultural hub of Stockholm, with galleries, trendy cafés, and innovative restaurants, as well as beautiful city views and quaint parks. The entire island can be explored on foot, and our little square, Mariatorget, sits at the centre, with a mix of residential buildings, vintage shops, and places to eat and drink.

Our home is a musicians home with instruments and music. It has a great view
and its right by a park for picnic. The subway is 2 minutes walk and takes you to the center of the city in 5 minutes. There you can visit the ABBA museum, the WASA ship and the Nobel museum or take the ferry to the archipelago.
listings.area_description:
Our home is very friendly for families, right by a park and close to a city beach.
Our home is situated in the part of Stockholm called Södermalm, or Söder to the locals, is home to a burgeoning underground culture. The city’s former working class neighborhood had a makeover, and now boasts quirky retro clothing boutiques, contemporary art galleries and a fantastic range of restaurants. An island in itself, rising out of the water, Södermalm is perfect for a wild dip into the local charm, diale
listings.other_notes:
Nice garden, great view, close to park and transportation
10 minutes walk to city beach
2 terraces

Great communications with subway, busses and commuter trains just a block away.
listings.other_notes:
Two balconies gives our home light and beautiful veiw of the water and the city
In a vibrant neighbour with great restaurants, parks, water and communications

Welcome to this spacious 115 square meter apartment, designed to cater to the needs of a modern family seeking comfort, functionality, and style. Situated in a bustling urban area, this apartment provides a serene oasis amidst the city's hustle and bustle.
Upon entering, you're greeted by a welcoming foyer that leads you into the heart of the home. The open-plan living area serves as the central hub, featuring large windows that flood the space with natural light, creating an inviting and airy
listings.area_description:
Södermalm, often referred to as "Söder" by locals, is a vibrant and eclectic neighborhood situated in the heart of Stockholm, Sweden. Perched on a series of hills overlooking the city, Södermalm offers breathtaking views of the surrounding landscapes and the shimmering waters of Lake Mälaren.

What sets Södermalm apart is its distinct blend of bohemian charm, historical significance, and modern sophistication. The streets are lined with colorful buildings adorned with intricate architectural d

details.full_description: Vårt hem är en härlig oas för vår stora familj. En ljus och mycket fräsch nyrenoverad lägenhet mitt i centrala Stockholm.
details.full_area_description: Vi bor i Vasastan med närhet till Stockholms bästa restauranger (Lilla Ego en av de bästa i Stockholm ligger i samma hus). Tunnelbanan ligger 100 meter bort, och Vasaparken 200 meter bort. Promenadavstånd till härliga Hagaparken där Kronprinsessan bor med sin familj.

listings.title: Exclusive townhouse close to city and beach
listings.description: We live in a townhouse, built 2016, so it is very much up to date concerning amenities and living conditions. We have a terrass on our ground floor and a balcony on our upper floor. Our home is very confortable although has a lot of stairs. It is braight and we have sun in the morning on our terrass and sun in the evening at out balcony.
listings.area_description: Our house outside the city core which means you have ten minutes to different places to swim and cliffs to sunbath, green areas for a promenader and small local city cores like Aspudden and Gröndal. The subway it five minutes away and it takes 12 minutes to come to Stockholm central. We have a big mall 15 minutes walk from the house. Small and big playgrounds is also around the corner. Our neighbourhood has everything you need!

listings.title: Top floor, sea view apartment in trendy Hornstull, Stockholm city
listings.description:
Welcome to our Home! 
Our five room, two floor, city apartment with around 105 m2 offers a beautiful sea- and city (for example The Globe) view from the sunny balcony. Our home has a tasteful modern Scandinavian design and offers two bed rooms, two bathrooms, a washing machine and a fully equipped kitchen. There is wireless internet and two cable TV's.
listings.area_description:
The area Hornstull on Södermalm went from bearing the not so flattering nick name “Kniv-Söder” (Knife Söder) to becoming one of the most hip, trendy and upcoming parts in town. 
Our apartment is located 10 meters from the water and it's very close to two big park areas, bathing places and beautiful seaside walking/jogging rounds and opportunities for kajaking.
The area attracts a lot of creative people that makes it bubble of creativity and energy. That's also why it hosts a lot of trendy cafe

listings.title: Modern apartment in Stockholm
listings.description: Cozy and spacious appartement close to the water. Newly built building with a peaceful inner yard. Nordic style decoration with many plants. Modern home appliances. Big terrace with views to the inner yard. Three-bedroom and two-bathroom appartement.
listings.area_description: Many parks and playgrounds around. Three-minute walk to the water and one-minute walk to the tube-station (Kristinebergs station). Three km to Stockholm central station. Peaceful and extremely safe area. Big supermarket (ICA Maxi) nearby.

listings.title: Family house with lush garden in Stockholm
listings.description: Our house is an almost 100-year-old wooden house with state-of-the-art facilities. The house has 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a fully equipped modern kitchen. The garden is lush and privacy-protected with several seating areas and barbecue facilities. The dining room accommodates 8+ and the living room and basement room offer several streaming services. Bicycles are available to borrow for day trips to the central parts of Stockholm. Avici Arena with several shops is within walking distance.
listings.area_description:
We live 10 minutes (by subway) from Stockholm city. Our house is located in a quiet and peaceful area with cozy, culture protected buildings (100 year old wooden houses) with several playgrounds for kids around the corner and with a trampoline and other summer toys in the garden. 

If you prefer to visit the trendy part of town, Södermalm is only 5 minutes by subway or 10 minutes by bike. In Södermalm you will find a mix of shops, restaurants and people. In the city center you will find the big
listings.other_notes:
You can bicycle into the town
Relax and let the kids play in the large garden
Easy to get out in the Stockholm archipelago

details.full_area_description:
This part of Stockholm, 
Södermalm, often called "Söder" by locals, is a vibrant district in Stockholm, known for its bohemian charm, trendy cafes, and artistic vibe. This island neighborhood offers stunning views of the city from spots like Monteliusvägen and Fjällgatan. Explore its unique mix of historic cobblestone streets and modern boutiques, visit vintage shops, and enjoy world-class dining. Södermalm is also home to cultural landmarks like Fotografiska, a renowned photography museum. Whether you're looking culture, shopping, art, or simply a stroll by the waterfront, Södermalm has something for everyone.

details.full_description: In the heart of Södermalm, Stockholm, you will find our beautiful apartment with 3 bedrooms and a total of six beds (one queen bed). Our spacious and cozy apartment with fireplace and a large terrace which you reach from the kitchen. The apartment is very Suitable for families, lots of lego/ toys to borrow etc. Apple tv with many streaming services. The apartment is on floor one, right above a great and well equipped food store. In the close area you will find shopping centers, restaurants, bars, playgrounds, museums, amusement parks and recreational parks. Also close to swimming pools and with the hipster mecka SOFO is just around the corner. Three bedrooms, 5 beds + 1 very comfortable sofa bed in the larger of the children's rooms (see pictures). Our beautiful apartment is in the middle of everything, still it feels calm, cozy and comfortable.
details.full_area_description: Södermalm - also called "Söder" - has developed into one of Stockholm's hottest neighborhoods. The atmosphere is relaxed, creative and trendy, and the neighborhood offers a myriad of vintage, fashion and design shops. In addition to smaller boutiques and galleries there are PLENTY of places to eat and drink. Many of the places are located in style-conscious SoFo (South of Folkungagatan), where this apartment is located, Hornstull and Mariatorget. Söder also has many parks and breathtaking panoramic views of Stockholm. Two of the best viewpoints are Fjällgatan and Monteliusvägen, a short walk from the apartment. By a short subway ride or a nice stroll you reach the city center with all of its shops, restaurants and museums. Take the boat from Slussen to Djurgården, where you'll find Skansen and Gröna lund and lots of museums as well. Close to everything in the cozies area there is.
details.full_other: Nice and family friendly apartment in the middle of the island of sodermalm (Stockholm’s Brooklyn/Williamsburg) in Stockholm. Three bedrooms, sleeps 6 in total. Large living room and cozy well equipped kitchen. Backyard with grill and nice chill out opportunities. Located in area with many cafes, restaurants and bars. Close to everything.

details.full_description:
Ljus nyrenoverad lägenhet i sekelskiftesstil med ljust trägolv, högt i tak och ljust målade väggar. Utsikt över takåsarna från samtliga rum. 

TRE SOVRUM | Tre sovrum med fönster mot lugn innegård. Barnrummen har enkelsängar och garderober. Master bedroom har dubbelsäng, garderober och en kakelugn. 

KÖK | Hela köket renoverades under 2022 och består av ett träskåp och en stor arbetsbänk i naturfärgad terazzo. Köket har varmluftsugn, induktionshäll, kolfilterfläkt och integrerad diskmaskin. Bakom högskåp ryms övrig köksutrustning med espressomaskin och integrerad kyl och frys.  

VARDAGSRUM | Ljus yta med plats för stort sällskap. Vardagsrummet ligger i anslutning till köket, rummen kan separeras med två skjutdörrar. 

BADRUM | Helkaklat badrum med toalett, handfat, tvättmaskin/torktumlare och dusch. Kakel på väggarna och terazzogolv med golvvärme. Stort badkar. 

TOALETT | En extra toalett så det slipper bli kö. Terazzogolv och golvvärme. 

HALL | Hall med garderob och platsbyggda originalskåp i sekelskiftesstil. 

HISS | Hiss finns

details.full_description:
NOTE: This is our primary home and we cannot accept stays for guest points when our apartment is not available.

Our home is a 150 square meter apartment with three bedrooms on the 4th floor. It has two balconies: one facing the street and one facing a quiet courtyard. All rooms have wooden floors and high ceilings.
The building is from 1921 and situated on Kungsholmen in central Stockholm. 
 
The master bedroom has a large double bed and faces the quiet courtyard. There is a children's room with a balcony with a full-size loft bed and a 160 cm long children's bed. The third bedroom has two full-size loft beds and a sofa bed. The kitchen is fully equipped with oven, micro-oven, dishwasher, kettle etc. It has a small table seating five persons.
The dining room has a large table which can be expanded and seats 6-12. In this room there is also a sofa and TV. This room connects to the living room with a sofa group, fireplace and balcony.
There is one bathroom with a WC and one larger bathroom with a shower, washing machine and dryer.

Baby bed and baby chair is available upon request.
details.full_area_description:
The area has many restaurants, pubs and shops and is conveniently located to reach all attractions in Stockholm. There is a bus stop outside the door and 200m to the closest subway station. You can also easily walk to the Central Station in 10-15 minutes. Kungsholmen island is one of the central city districts and has several parks. The closest park  a block away. There are many good places for picnics and for bathing in the summer (even a small sandy beach, but water tends to be chilly).  It is a beautiful 9 km walk (or run!) around the island. In the summer it's possible to rent canoes.

In addition to public transportation, Stockholm has several companies renting out electric kickbikes (Voi), electric bikes and normal bikes if you want to get around the city. You do not need a car to get around Stockholm - it will most likely just be a hassle as parking is difficult to find and very expensive.
details.full_other:
Nice area on the island of Kungsholmen. Close to restaurants, shopping and access to all Stockholm attractions.
Spacious comfortable apartment with lots of sunlight, suitable for a big family.
Excellent communications, 10 minute walk from Central Station.

Restaurant, parks and the archipelago

details.full_description:
This is a newvly renovated design apartment 1313sqf (122sqm). The entire apartment has wood floors and is fully furnished with designer furnitures.
 
The apartment has 3 bedrooms, one master bedroom alongside the large balcony. The large, separate Uno Form kitchen has a dining table for 8-12 people and is fully equpied. A spacious livingroom with fully functional fireplace.
 
Large Bathroom with clawfoot tubs.  

It also features a small bathroom and facilities such as washing machine.
 
Apartment balcony is furnished with table and chairs and bench where you could have your breakfast or dinner during summertime. 

Street parking just outside the apartment.
details.full_area_description:
Conveniently located, in upper-class neighborhood Östermalm being one of the most attractive areas in the heart of Stockholm. 

The apartment is located in middle of the best shopping area and where the best restaurants are. Just step outside the apartment.

The apartment is 5 minutes walk from The Royal Djurgården, perfect for a stroll, picknick or jogging. The Royal  Djurgården is also home to historical buildings and monuments, museums, galleries and yacht harbours. 

Östermalm is suronded by many playgrounds, lawns and a lot of trendy restaurants and shops. 

Stockholm is one of the most beautiful cities in the world, especially in July: 
http://www.visitstockholm.com/en/To-Do/Tips/Stockholm-Top-10/

We have a short summer, but a very nice one and July is the time to be here. Our apartment is perfectly situated for all kind of excursions. Just outside our apartment you find a lovely park for picnics, grills or just to hang out. The best parts of Stockholms shopping and restaurang district is a 10 minutes walk from us or take the bus outside our home. 

Stockholm have a Royal national city park called "Kungliga Djurgården" which is more or less our neighborhood, it takes 5 minutes to reach the park for nice walks, restaurants,  bath or vistit  museums etc. 

Stockholms archipelago is fantastic and it is a must if you visit Stockholm:
http://www.visitskargarden.se/en/the-archipelago/
If you are intressted in Stockholm and do a exchange with us, we would love to help you with a good quide over things to do.
details.full_other:
Design home, absolutely top located in Stockholm
Nearby Östermalmstorg and Stureplan
Restaurant, parks and the archipelago

listings.title: Beautiful 1 bedroom 1920's apartment in Stockholm
listings.description:
My home is situated on the third floor in a beautiful building from the Swedish grace era. It has one big bedroom with one double bed (160 cm) and a working desk. You can enter the balcony from the bedroom, arranged with two relaxing chairs. 

Separated kitchen with a table for 4 persons and dishwasher. Living room  with sofa and TV, and a dining table for 6-8 persons. 

Washroom with bathtub, toilet, washing machine and drier.
listings.area_description:
Our apartment is situated at Kungsholmen, a residential area in Stockholm city. You are really close to the water and a big park. You can even find a small city beach 500-600 meters from the apartment. 

You can stroll for 10-15 min along the water and you will find the town hall and boats going out on Mälaren. There are several restaurants close to the apartment. 

The bus from Arlanda airport stops just 200-300 meters from the apartment.
listings.other_notes: Hope you will enjoy Stockholm!
