The balcony has a sofa and a small dining table, perfect for meals in the sun. It is on the 4th floor.

details.full_description: The apartment is very spacious and has three bedrooms. You can see the beautiful church Gustav Vasa from the livingroom windows. The kitchen has a big table and six chairs. You can easily socialise whilst cooking and the room is light with a small balcony.
details.full_area_description: The apartment is situated close to shops, restaurants and parks. You can easily walk in to the city centre of Stockholm.

Hornstull, on the western edge of Södermalm, is one of Stockholm’s most dynamic and sought-after neighborhoods. With its waterfront views, beaches, lush parks, and lively streets, it’s the perfect mix of nature and city life.

Södermalm is known for its creative vibe, offering endless cafes, bars, and restaurants, plus unique shops and a bustling food market. Whether you’re grabbing a coffee, enjoying a meal by the water, or checking out local boutiques, there’s always something happening.

Det finns många små butiker och även flera second hand butiker . 
Bra promenadstråk och väldigt nära att ta sig in till stadskärnan i centrala Stockholm. I Sundbyberg finns alla kommunikationer , tunnelbana , pendeltåg och tvärbanan.

My home is idyllic, the apartment was built in 1960 and contains everything that you want. 
It has a balcony watching out over the courtyard and is very cozy.
listings.area_description: A 20-minute walk from Stockholm city center. There are grocery stores, parks, cafes, and it's close to nature. It's a quiet street with good transportation to the city.

details.full_description: Mysig lägenhet centralt belägen i Stockholm. Vi har två sovrum med dubbelsängar, ett fullt utrustat kök, samt ett stort och ljust vardagsrum. En kaffe på balkongen på våren och sommaren gör känslan på topp. Ett mysigt litet badrum med dusch.
details.full_area_description: Bussar, tunnelbana och tåg är bara 1 minut gångavstånd. Stadsbiblioteket, parker, barer och caféer är utanför dörren. Gångavstånd till allt! En lägenhet i en levande stad.

listings.title: Charming apartment in the heart of Stockholm City
listings.description:
Are you looking for a lovely holiday in Stockholm? This is a good start. 

Beautiful three BR apartment, located in a popular area still in the middle of the city.
listings.area_description:
Since the apartment is located in the heart of Stockholm it's walking distance to everything a big city has to offer. Shops, restaurants, museums, parks, sightseeing etc. 

Shopping 
- around the corner there is a multiple of different shops; fashion, food etc. There is also many vintage/second hand stores in our area
- 5 min walk to Odenplan 
- 15 min walk to Stureplan (Biblioteksgatan, Birger Jarlsgatan) http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Biblioteksgatan

Restaurants and bars
- there is restaurants
listings.other_notes:
Charming house from 1880
Suitable for families as well as couples
Best neighbourhood in Stockholm

details.full_description:
Are you looking for a lovely holiday in Stockholm? This is a good start. 

Beautiful three BR apartment, located in a popular area still in the middle of the city.
details.full_area_description:
Since the apartment is located in the heart of Stockholm it's walking distance to everything a big city has to offer. Shops, restaurants, museums, parks, sightseeing etc. 

Shopping 
- around the corner there is a multiple of different shops; fashion, food etc. There is also many vintage/second hand stores in our area
- 5 min walk to Odenplan 
- 15 min walk to Stureplan (Biblioteksgatan, Birger Jarlsgatan) http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Biblioteksgatan

Restaurants and bars
- there is restaurants and cafés on every street in the surroundings, with kitchens from all over the world

Parks 
- 5 min walk to Vasaparken, one of Stockholms best parks, with large playground, football etc
- 15 min walk to Vanadislunden, a park located on a hill with a pool
- 25 min walk (or 10 by bus) to Djurgården where the zoo Skansen is located as well as theme park Gröna Lund, the Vasa museum and Djurgårdsbrunn. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Djurg%C3%A5rden
- 15 min walk to Humlegården, a nice park located right next to Stureplan
- 15 min walk to Hagaparken where the princess of Sweden, Victoria, lives. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hagaparken
details.full_other:
Charming house from 1880
Suitable for families as well as couples
Best neighbourhood in Stockholm

details.full_description:
Looking for the perfect city spot in Stockholm? Our charming, newly renovated 3-room apartment sits right by the Parliament House (Riksdagshuset) and just steps from Old Town, great cafés, restaurants, and shopping.

It’s in a beautiful turn-of-the-century building, tucked away on a quiet courtyard — so even though you’re in the middle of everything, it feels calm and peaceful at home.

We have two comfortable bedrooms:
- One is spacious with a big, cozy bed and a possibility to add a side crib
- The second bedroom is perfect for guests, kids, or as an extra office.

The heart of the apartment is the open kitchen and living room. The kitchen is fully equipped and modern but keeps the classic charm, perfect for cooking at home. The living room has a comfy sofa, space to relax, and big windows that let in lots of natural light. High ceilings and beautiful original details make the whole space feel airy and special.

We truly love this apartment and hope you’ll feel right at home too!
details.full_area_description:
The apartment is located in Norrmalm, right in the heart of Stockholm. This is one of the city’s most vibrant and central neighborhoods, full of top restaurants, cozy cafés, shopping, cultural spots, and beautiful parks.

You’re just steps away from Gamla Stan (the Old Town), the Royal Palace, the Parliament House (Riksdagshuset), and the waterfront. You’re also right next to Sergels Torg, NK department store, Hötorget, and Drottninggatan shopping street.

Best of all, you’re perfectly placed between Stockholm’s most popular districts: it’s just as easy to walk or bike to Östermalm, Vasastan, Södermalm, and Kungsholmen. Whether you’re heading to a trendy restaurant, a museum, a park, or the water — everything is close by.

Despite being in the middle of the city, the apartment’s courtyard location gives you a peaceful, quiet home to relax in after a day in the city.

listings.title: Apartment in central Stockholm
listings.description: Our home is a centrally located apartment with a nice view overlooking a green area. The apartment is located in an older building, originating from the late 19th century. The 86 square meters are well planned and accommodates two bedrooms, one kitchen and a living room. The bathroom has a spacious shower. The apartment has windows in two latitudes which makes it light. Furthermore, the kitchen is well equipped and has a balcony overlooking a courtyard.
listings.area_description: In close attachment to the residence, stores, restaurants and cafés are found. A close walk of ten minutes will take you to the city centralstation, running tracks, pathways by the Lake of Mälaren, grocery stores, boutiques and a gym. The area has all you need in a centrally located home. It also has many nearby green areas.

listings.title: Odeila's house
listings.description:
My hogar es acogedor, ubicado en el primer piso y está relativamente cerca del centro y de algunos lugares de interés. 
Libre de fumadores y mascotas. No aceptan ruidos, ni fiestas ni música con volumen medio alto ni alto.
listings.area_description: A unos 20 min. caminando aproximadamente hasta el centro y/o el ayuntamiento (Stad huset). También se puede caminar a la Ciudad vieja (Gamla stan). Entre otros. Cerca de 2 estaciones principales del metro y de parada de buses.
